chapters.title: Chapter 801 - Killing In One Move
chapters.body:
Chapter 801 - Killing In One Move

Chapter 801: Killing in One Move

The man’s tone was arrogant and his eyes filled with viciousness.

As the young master of one of the four clans, he possessed an innate grandeur. He looked at Chen Xiu with vicious eyes when he spoke in an indifferent voice.

Ming Xiu ridiculed him in his heart. Chen Xiu actually dared to fight for Ancient God Lakshmi.

Where exactly did his confidence come from?

Clearly, he was only a branch family’s descendant, but still extremely ambitious. If he could be used, Ming Xiu would naturally be extremely fond of his temperament. The man could become an able general in the future and one of his arms. However, since he couldn’t be used, he had to be killed.

“As the holy daughter of Pipa Clan, how can you believe this Chen Xiu’s words?”

Ming Xiu turned around and looked at Liu Bailing, who looked somewhat pure and tender, and his gaze grew bright. As someone from Asura City, he was extremely fond of beautiful women, to the point of damaging the country and causing suffering to people. Although he was accustomed to outstanding women, but at that moment, he was attracted by Liu Bailing’s petite face.

Anyone who saw her palm-sized small face, ruby-like mouth as well as her undeveloped body would want to protect her. But the most outstanding characteristic of hers was the red dot between her eyes which brought out her delicate and lovable temperament to the extreme.

Liu Bailing saw that Ming Xiu was staring at her, and her complexion sank.

“You lecher, I won’t believe in anyone from Asura City,” she said coldly.

Ming Xiu smiled and said, “Then I will tell you exactly why so many people of Asura City are here for the children shining with the five-colored light.

“Among them, there is one possessed by Ancient God Lakshmi’s soul. The four great clans of Asura City have received orders to return with it. Oh, that’s right, that also means that most of the soul of your esteemed Ancient God Lakshmi has already been devoured by our Ancient God Asura.”

Liu Bailing’s complexion instantly turned deathly pale. Sure enough, it was as she had thought. Something had happened to Ancient God Lakshmi. If it was not the case, then she would have summoned the twelve holy daughters to the divine palace after returning from the lost battle.

If Ancient God Lakshmi perished, then Lakshmi City would be devoured by the six ancient god sooner or later. From then on, they would be reduced to the position of slaves without any rights in Lanlou.

“Now that you told me this, it is even more impossible for me to hand over the children. As long as Ancient God Lakshmi doesn’t die, then sooner or later, she will find Ancient God Asura to settle the debt,” Liu Bailing said coldly.

The next moment, a dazzling light burst out of the red dot between her eyes. Her five slender fingers pressed on the jade pipa, and she looked at Ming Xiu with confidence on her face.

“Abandon your resistance, and I will protect your clan. I promise you here to take you as wife, and after you and I get married, your clan will also be my clan. But if you continue to resist, then after your Pipa Clan is destroyed, I will take you as my concubine,” Ming Xiu said with a gloomy smile on his face.

Liu Bailing could not escape, just fight till the end, which was not really an option. If she agreed to Ming Xiu’s conditions, however, then given her position as the holy daughter of Pipa Clan, she would definitely become a formal wife. But if she refused, he would force her to become a concubine without any power.

When all was said and done, a formal wife was on the same footing as a principal wife, while a concubine was tantamount to a servant.

Because of that, Ming Xiu felt that Liu Bailing should accept his offer.

Chen Xiu, who was ignored by his clan’s young master, looked at the silent Ming Xiu and Liu Bailing with gloominess. Inside, however, he was sneering at Ming Xiu for overestimating his capabilities. The position of the twelve music clans was equivalent to the four great clans of Asura City, and each of the twelve clans had a holy daughter.

Regardless of their strength, all the holy daughters could use an inherited treasure to forcefully raise their cultivation to the level of a god. Although this increase was temporary, the women were still half gods. Moreover, as long as the holy daughters survived, their cultivation would grow higher and higher, and together with an inherited treasure to raise their cultivation, they would become terrifying.

In the meantime, Ming Xiu was only a young master of one of the four great clans of Asura City. Whether or not he was able to climb to the position of a clan chief and successfully become a god was completely uncertain. The road to the throne was paved in bones.

The two of them were not on the same level.

The only reason Ming Xiu dared to raise such a condition in front of Liu Bailing was because Ancient God Lakshmi had almost died in war. It was what allowed him to be so arrogant.

Chen Xiu, of course, knew what Ming Xiu was scheming in his heart.

Although he was attracted by Liu Bailing’s beauty, he was even more attracted by her strength. If she really became his formal wife, then his plan to obtain the position of a clan chief would go smoothly.

A wife with the strength of a god would be a great assistance.

“Young master really knows how to jest! You surprisingly try to haggle with the holy daughter. Don’t tell me that you feel that a holy daughter would really agree?” Chen Xiu suddenly said without the slightest regard for Ming Xiu’s identity or his nine subordinates.

After all, Chen Xiu’s own nine subordinates possessed the strength of a god. If they clashed, then Chen Xiu was confident about winning.

So before Liu Bailing could reply, Chen Xiu’s taunting voice entered Ming Xiu’s ears, and his smile became stiff.

He knew that although Chen Xiu was a descendant of a branch family, his pride was higher than the heavens. But he hadn’t thought that Chen Xiu would be unbridled to such a degree and surprisingly dare to ridicule him, the young master of his clan.

“You really have great guts. I want to see what exactly is the basis of your courage! Let me think, is it the reward promised by Ancient God Asura? Or is it the subordinates you hired through the guild after spending a large amount of money? I thought that you were a member of my clan so I didn’t want to kill you, but you insist on inviting your death.”

After he finished speaking, Ming Xiu waved his hand.

From behind him, a woman with two faces, at the front and the back of her head, like Chen Xiu, and wearing a skintight dress walked out. She rushed toward Chen Xiu while brandishing two blades.

Chen Xiu looked at the woman, and his expression tightened.

“I didn’t expect that you would end up relying on the young master,” he said with some surprise. “I thought that given your pride, you would also fight over the soul of Ancient God Lakshmi like me. This is truly unexpected!”

The women curled her lips into a sneer and looked at Chen Xiu as if he was a retard.

“The one who is shocked is me,” she said with a smile. “Chen Xiu, your strength is at most at the upper mid level among the branch descendants, so how could you dare to fight with young master for contribution? You should know your position and act accordingly; otherwise, you will be invite disaster. Your life was in vain.”

Chen Xiu did not reply, but looked at the woman in regret. She was also a branch descendant like him, but her strength far higher than his own. Previously, the two of them had refused the offers by the young master, so he did not expect that a prideful person like her would compromise in the end.

Suddenly, a feeling of sympathy rose in his heart toward the woman.

“If you want to blame something, you can only blame your pride. You weren’t born in the right position, but you still wanted to compete, so you could only invite disaster onto yourself. I hope that you will have a good next life.”

After saying that, the woman turned into a blur and charged at Chen Xiu. A cold glint flashed in front of him.

Chen Xiu took note of the incoming attack, but didn’t show any reaction. Expressionless, he looked at the figure getting closer and closer to him.

chapters.title: Chapter 802 - The Four Young Masters
chapters.body:
Chapter 802 - The Four Young Masters

Chapter 802: The Four Young Masters

Was the man courting death?

The vigilant Liu Bailing looked at Ming Xiu’s subordinate rushing toward Chen Xiu without putting away the jade pipa. The two were from the same clan, but surprisingly, they were fighting with each other for the children releasing the five-colored light.

She could not understand this sort of situation which she was seeing for the first time. But this turn of events fitted perfectly with her plans. When she killed Doludo just a moment ago, she had generated a picture and used it to ask for help from the other music clans. She was convinced that when the music clans of Lakshmi City saw it, they would definitely rush over to her at the fastest speed.

But water far away could not extinguish the fire nearby, so it would take some time for the music clans to arrive, which meant that she needed to stall the enemy.

As long as the twelve holy daughters united, then even if they were jointly attacked by the four young masters of Asura City, they would end up winning and the four young masters could only walk away nursing a grievance.

Ming Xiu was also relatively suspicious about the situation in his heart. After Chen Xiu left Asura City, it was as if he had completely changed and become even more unbridled compared to before. But even if he was even more arrogant, so what? Without any strength to back his arrogance, he was just a lamb ready for slaughter.

Ming Xiu could guarantee that the woman herself could completely exterminate Chen Xiu’s squad. After all, Chen Xiu should be the strongest one among his people, and he was still a bit lacking compared to the woman. He would probably be killed instantly.

The nine black-armored soldiers behind Chen Xiu did not even enter his eyes. Even if the people hired through the guild were at the same level as descendants of branch families, they would still be ruthlessly crushed in a fight.

The woman charged forward, turning into a blur, but the next moment, another blur flew out from behind Chen Xiu and slammed into her. With a loud noise, the woman was thrown backwards, right to Ming Xiu’s feet, and had to wipe a stream of blood flowing down from the corner of her mouth.

Ming Xiu was startled for a moment. How did the script suddenly change? Shouldn’t the girl have used the two blades in her hands to lop off the heads of Chen Xiu and his nine subordinates one by one?

Ming Xiu looked at the girl in front of him and coldly said, “You disappoint me greatly!”

Just as the girl opened her mouth to explain herself, her body exploded like a bomb.

Ming Xiu was left completely startled, while Liu Bailing’s complexion turned deathly pale.

During the second attack of the blonde muscular man, she could see that his strength was comparable to that of gods. Unless someone closely observed the explosive increase in his presence at that instant when he attacked, no one would be able to notice his true strength.

Liu Bailing looked at the eight people standing together with the blond muscular man and a thought suddenly appeared in her heart. If all nine of them were gods, then she would not have the slightest strength to resist.

But fortunately, the internal strife between the two parties had shifted the crisis from her for the time being.

Liu Bailing was constantly praying in her heart for the other heavenly daughters to arrive quickly.

Ming Xiu did not react, too stunned by the sight of the pile of flesh in front of him.

A branch family descendant with good strength was surprisingly killed in one move?

After being silent for a long while, Ming Xiu looked at the nine subordinates of Chen Xiu and suddenly burst out laughing.

“Good, good, good! Chen Xiu, you are really trying to your utmost to obtain the chance to become a god. Surprisingly, you even managed to hire subordinates with such formidable strength. Pretty good, but wait until after this matter is concluded, then I will settle my debt with you.”

After those words, the smile on Ming Xiu’s face vanished, and he looked at Chen Xiu with frosty eyes. If it were not for the three other young masters hurrying over, he would have used the treasure bestowed by the clan to kill Chen Xiu.

“Younger Brother Ming Xiu really has a good temper. As the young master of Morrow Clan, although your subordinate was killed by a branch family descendant, you still didn’t attack to annihilate him. Admirable!”

Before those words could fade away, a group of people walked out of the mountain woods in the west. Chen Xiu glanced toward them and realized that it was the young master of Doro Clan whom he had just passed by, Domingle.

When Domingle’s silhouette appeared from the mountain woods, his fair face was filled with a benevolent smile which even reached the four blinking eyes on the palms of his four hands. Anyone seeing him for the first time would think that he was a completely harmless person.

When Ming Xiu heard Domingle’s words, he coldly said, “Hmph, there’s no need for Doro Clan’s young master to interfere in the matters of my Morrow Clan. Just mind your business, tentacle monster.”

Upon hearing the words ‘tentacle monster’, the smile on Domingle’s face became stiff and he said in a dull tone, “This Chen Xiu from your Morrow Clan passed by me on the road without showing proper etiquette. You are the young master of Morrow Clan so naturally I came to complain to you.”

“What came to complain? You really know how to joke. From the moment we took the mission of fighting for Ancient God Lakshmi’s soul, then regardless of whether our competitors are from our clan or outsiders, we must fight them all.

“If you are dissatisfied with Chen Xiu’s attitude, go and fight him. There’s no need to bother about my opinion, ” Ming Xiu said calmly.

His gaze was on Domingle, but he soon shifted it to Chen Xiu. A moment later, he began to watch like a spectator waiting for a fight.

Chen Xiu’s subordinates were extremely ferocious, so there was nothing better than Domingle provoking him. Regardless of which side lost, it would be beneficial for him.

Domingle examined the situation in front of him. The villagers were surrounding the children releasing the five-colored light, and regardless of whether they were old or sick, all of them were holding a pipa, and the holy daughter of Pipa Clan was standing in front of them.

Chen Xiu was standing three meters away from her, while Ming Xiu was standing even further away, almost at the edge of the plaza.

On the ground, there were two puddles of blood, which were stacked with piles of meat and squashed meat. They were clearly traces of the battle which had happened a bit earlier. Additionally, there were only eight people behind Ming Xiu.

Domingle could guess from those clues that a battle had happened between Chen Xiu and Ming Xiu just then, and the result was that Ming Xiu’s subordinate was killed.

Upon understanding that, Domingle smiled and looked at Ming Xiu who was watching like a spectator without saying anything.

Domingle clearly understood Ming Xiu’s intentions. The strength of Chen Xiu was formidable enough to make Ming Xiu eat a grievance without retaliating, which was why he then wanted to use Domingle as his lackey to waste away Chen Xiu’s strength.

Dominged, of course, was not stupid enough to do something so strenous and unrewarding.

Two of the four young masters had already arrived, and the other two should be arriving to fight for the children releasing the five-colored light as well. Before that, everyone should preserve their strength, since it would be the main battle.

For a while, the plaza turned completely silent.

Before long had passed, a sound echoed from the south and east signifying the appearance of the remaining two young masters. One of them was sitting on an enormous elephant, wearing jade armor on his plump body, and wearing a ruthless expression on his face. The most unique characteristic of this young master was that both his hands were like cattail leaf fans.

His name was Luo Tian, and he was the young master of Rahu Clan.

The last young master was even more carefree, sitting within a golden palanquin which was raised by four muscular men. Through the translucent cotton cloth hanging at the side, a woman with an extraordinary figure could be seen reclining along the seat.

A slight breeze pulled at the cotton cloth, unveiling what was inside. It exposed the woman wearing revealing clothes that showed off her fair white skin and who had a face that could be considered as absolutely perfect, especially her eyes which could leave anyone spellbound.

chapters.title: Chapter 803 - Retreat
chapters.body:
Chapter 803 - Retreat

Chapter 803: Retreat

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation

Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

The final young master was Jasmine of Deva Clan.

"It seems like this humble servant had made the other three young master wait," Jasmine said with a smile while hidden behind the cotton cloth. Her voice was melodious like tinkling bells, and anyone who heard it felt drowsy.

Upon hearing that laughter, Ming Xiu, who was staring at Liu Bailing, turned around and looked at the figure in the palanquin. His gaze revealed an even more intense desire while his expression became somewhat sluggish. Domingle's gaze was also attracted toward by the woman, and an impulse to forcefully take her rose in his heart.

A laughter to charm the crowds—that was what had been used.

The only people who remained unaffected were Luo Tian, Chen Xiu, as well as the Pipa clansmen.

"Have you all come here to enjoy beautiful women?" Luo Tian asked in a muffled voice, revealing a helpless expression while looking at Chen Xiu and Domingle.

The face at the back of Chen Xiu's head betrayed a hint of restrained fear. As a disciple of a branch family of Morrow Clan, he naturally had heard many stories related to the young master of Deva Clan.

Compared to the other three clans, the Deva Clan resembled the subordinates of Ancient God Lakshmi more. The other three clans were good at direct fighting, but the people of Deva Clan were handsome and most adept at using charming techniques.

Even without noticing it, people could be used by them.

The person most outstanding in using charming techniques among the younger generation of Deva Clan was Jasmine, and she had many pursuers in Asura City. Many people hadn't even seen her appearance but were charmed by her voice alone. From this, it was clear how terrifying she was.

Even Domingle and Ming Xiu were influenced by her voice.

"Elder brothers, don't you plan to gift Ancient God Lakshmi's soul to me? Before coming here, this humble servant had promised elder ancestor to definitely return with Ancient God Lakshmi's soul."

Jasmine's voice came from the palanquin, and it was filled with a hint of pitifulness mixed in with the tone of being wronged.

Anyone who heard it could not help but bow and surrender.

When Liu Bailing heard Jasmine's voice, she creased her brows slightly while cursing the vixen inwardly.

Luo Tian, who was sitting on the elephant, went dark-faced upon hearing what Jasmine asked for and said in a loud voice, "You want my pity? This father will destroy your palanquin if you won't speak properly."

Domingle sneered at the palanquin. "That's impossible."

Ming Xiu's complexion also recovered to normal and he said with ridicule, "If you married me, then I could give you the soul of Ancient God Lakshmi."

Jasmine turned silent for a moment. When she spoke again, her voice was no longer lovable like before but rather ice-cold.

"It will depend on who has the ability. It would've been better if you had politely handed him over to me, since it would have saved everyone the effort of fighting. In any case though, the one who will obtain the soul of Ancient God Lakshmi will be me."

"Hmph, stop boasting shamelessly."

The three young masters snorted coldly.

Jasmine turned silent, and her gaze passed through the cotton cloth to land on Chen Xiu standing near Liu Bailing. Upon seeing him, she spoke in astonishment.

"Which younger brother is this who surprisingly appeared here? I remember that Asura City only has four clans and not five."

"This younger brother is Morrow Clan's branch family's descendant Chen Xiu, and he has come to fight over Ancient God Lakshmi's soul. You shouldn't underestimate him, he is truly fearless," Domingle explained from the side.

He watched Jasmine while speaking, wanting to know whether she would provoke Chen Xiu or not.

"Hmph!"

Ming Xiu did not say anything, but his hatred for Domingle kept on increasing. He already considered Chen Xiu a dead person in his heart. Even if he did not die right away, as soon as Ming Xiu returned, he would send people to make Chen Xiu disappear.

"Ha ha ha ha ha, younger brother Chen Xiu is really courageous. He surprisingly dares to come here as a branch family descendant. Aren't you afraid of death?"

Jasmine's voice had again turned sweet and lovable like before.

But even after hearing it, Chen Xiu remained expressionless. The ferocious techniques of Deva clan were unable to charm him. If that was not the case, he would have turned into her follower in Asura City long ago.

The charming techniques were useless toward two types of people: those who were stubborn and those who had firm willpower.

For example, Luo Tian had a one-track mind while Chen Xiu had a firm mind. As far as he was concerned, nothing could compare to becoming a god.

Domingle and Ming Xiu's willpower was formidable as well, but since they were young masters, they had to focus more on scheming rather than cultivation, so they could be charmed by Jasmine if they were inattentive

"Alright, you don't need to continue your flirting. Let's just get down to business. The five of us will fight each other, and the one who wins will obtain Ancient God Lakshmi's soul, what do you say?"

Luo Tian impatiently waved his hand, causing a violent gale to appear suddenly.

Ming Xiu and Domingle looked at each other, then Ming Xiu said with a smile, "Naturally, the one who wins gets everything, but it wouldn't be a battle between five people but rather four. Chen Xiu is only a descendant of a branch family, and a person should have an understanding of their capabilities. He doesn't possess the qualifications to fight with us, what do you guys think?"

"Well said, I also agree to that. How can a descendant of a branch family intervene in our battle? Get lost, you trifling branch family's descendant!" Luo Tian roared in a thunderous voice.

"Indeed, little brother you must retreat obediently. If you don't go, then the four of us will first join hands to deal with you," Jasmine said with a smile.

The four then fixed their gazes on Chen Xiu standing beside Liu Bailing.

Chen Xiu remained expression, but his heart was violently thumping. However, he was still forced to endure it. Even if the four attacked together, they would not as ferocious as his master's nine shadows, but just a moment ago, he had heard his master's voice in his brain, commanding him to retreat.

He thus led his squad away from the middle of the plaza and stopped on the side.

The four young masters smiled but didn't say anything. Even if he had the most pride, he still had to kneel in front of strength and bad circumstances.

...

In the meantime, Brunhilda and Li Yunmu were standing near an enormous tree not far away, looking at the group of people inside the village.

"Yunmu, what are you doing?" Brunhilda asked suspiciously.

"Watching the drama," Li Yunmu said with his complete attention on the happenings in the plaza.

"Wouldn't it be better to let Chen Xiu exterminate those people and be done with it? Why are you asking him to withdraw and watch their battle?"

"If I really allowed Chen Xiu to kill the four young masters, we would be unable to enter Asura City. Not to mention, I don't want to exterminate the ancient gods of Lanlou. Instead, what I want is for the lowest level mortals to understand the goals of gods."

"Goals?"

Li Yunmu didn't reply while thinking about Brunhilda's question in his mind. He could clearly see that if he wanted to move to the next step, he had to destroy the reverence toward the gods in the hearts of mortals.

Afterwards, he could create a territory exclusive to him and attract those mortals. Since the system had told him that there were still enemies outside the five regions, then he naturally had to become stronger.

He had to create a territory where each and every person was like a dragon.

When Li Yunmu thought of that, light flashed in his eyes, and he became extremely excited in his heart.

chapters.title: Chapter 804 - The Start Of The Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 804 - The Start Of The Battle

Chapter 804: The Start of the Battle

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Chen Xiu, who had retreated to the side, was watching the four young masters standing in four directions, negotiating about how to battle each other.

Luo Tian first suggested a four way battle royale, but in the end, this proposal was shot down by the other three young masters. If the four of them engaged in a battle royale and one of them focused on dealing with one particular opponent, then it would influence the fairness of the competition.

Or perhaps, it would be better to say that if two of the four had already allied with each other, they could easily take out the other two from the battle royale and then fight among themselves to decide the winner.

Thus, the impartiality when using this sort of method was extremely low, and what’s more, the four young masters did not trust each other.

Afterwards, Domingle suggested using ballots to form two pairs that would fight each other. The winners of the two pairs would fight each other and then the stronger one would obtain the children releasing the five-colored light.

After Domingle finished speaking, Jasmine, who was still reclining in her palanquin, opposed it. After all, her combat strength in one on one battles was weaker than that of the other three, so it was also not completely fair.

As soon as this proposal was also shot down, Luo Tian rushed forth, leading his subordinates into the plaza to forcefully snatch the children for himself.

The other three young master did their utmost to stop him.

In the end, the four young masters entered a deadlock once more. Each of them was on alert that the others might not follow the rules and would try to kidnap the children.

Chen Xiu, who was watching the four young masters from the side, patted his monster lizard to advance forward and calmly said, “If you four cannot choose method for your battle, then why not allow your subordinates to act as chess pieces for you. Whoever’s subordinate can become the final victor will obtain the children.”

When Luo Tian and Domingle heard this, they found it somewhat reasonable and nodded their heads in approval. Ming Xiu coldly looked at the talking Chen Xiu and said with distaste, “This is also not fair, I only have eight subordinates while the other three have nine. In a league battle, I would be the first one to lose!”

“That’s easy to resolve. Every person will only dispatch eight subordinates and draw lots to determine their opponents. If this still isn’t fair, then it would be better if your four fought among yourselves. But each of you is distrustful of the other, so who knows when this deadlock would be resolved.”

Before his words could fade away, Jasmine let out a tinkling laugh from the palanquin while the complexions of the other three turned poor.

The meaning behind Chen Xiu’s words was that the four of them were in a deadlock not because they were greedy for life, but because they were paranoid and completely distrustful of the other. No one acknowledged it though, pretending that they had not heard it. Chen Xiu’s suggestion was the most impartial, and the subordinates chosen by the four of them were the best among their clan, so if they lost, they could not blame others.

“Then this method is good.”

The four sent people to draw ballots and determine their battle order and opponent.

While busy with that, no one paid any attention to the Pipa Clan at the center of the plaza. Liu Bailing bit her red lip and looked at the four young masters battling with each other without any regard for her people. It suffocated her.

Without the protection of Ancient God Lakshmi, the people of music clans turned into targets whom no one cared about.

She was absolutely sure that the four young masters had treasures bestowed to them by their families, which were similar to Pipa Clan, and could provide them an instantaneous burst in strength, raising their cultivation to the god realm.

It was because of it that the four young masters did not pay any attention to the possible counterattack of Liu Bailing.

In an instant, her heart filled with regret. Why did she have to be so weak? If she had become a god, then even if Ancient God Lakshmi perished, the four young masters would not have dared to come to her Pipa Clan.

Liu Bailing could only blame herself for being useless.

She turned around to look at the children and silently prayed in her heart while looking at the five-colored light being released by the children, Lord Lakshmi, protect the new blood of Pipa Clan and let them escape.

After she finished praying, she looked at the old and sick in the circle and sighed. The four young masters had come with four treasures so it was impossible for everyone to escape. Someone had to remain behind to stop them.

Liu Bailing as the holy daughter of Pipa Clan was naturally the first person to stay to stop the four young masters. The encircling old and sick also had to remain behind. In truth though, besides the few people who would need to lead the escaping children to Lakshmi City, everyone else would have to stay and keep the enemy occupied.

Liu Bailing began to play the jade pipa in her hand, asking the old and sick to choose who exactly would remain behind. When the crowd heard her tune, they began to discuss in whispers.

Before long, successive pipa sounds echoed in the plaza, and grief began to spread.

Right then, the four young masters were focused on the competition between their subordinates, but they still heard the grief-filled melody, and sneers appeared on their faces. They had a feeling that it was the final melody before Pipa Clan was exterminated.

When Liu Bailing heard two cheerful notes concealed in the grief-filled melody, she turned around to see that the majority of the old and sick were expressionless. Their eyes were filled with determination, and all of them were prepared to stay behind.

She then turned around and looked at the battle before her before shifting her gaze to Chen Xiu standing at the plaza. When their eyes met, a cold chill passed through her body, and she lowered her head. From the corner of her eyes, however, she still followed the battle, waiting for an opportunity for the children to escape.

As long as they reached Lakshmi City, everyone would be safe.

Chen Xiu watched the competition happening in the plaza for a time, but he soon felt bored and shifted his gaze to Pipa Clan. A distressed melody played around them, and he closed his eyes to listen, but suddenly, he sensed two cheerful notes concealed in the grief-filled melody and instantly felt that something was wrong.

The twelve music clans of Lakshmi City were specialized in different music instruments and naturally had the ability to converse using sound without the need to talk directly.

Could Liu Bailing still want to lead her clansmen out?

Chen Xiu thought about it, then glanced away and saw that the attention of the four young masters was still focused on the battle. If the Pipa Clan found a good opportunity to escape, they might really get away.

But that was completely unrelated to him.

Chen Xiu had thought that his task was to obtain the children from Pipa Clan, so he was surprised when conflict arose, his master secretly transmitted a different command to him. All of a sudden, he was turned into a spectator from a hunter, and he no longer needed to eliminate the four young masters or fight for the children. His only task was to stand there and watch.

Although Chen Xiu has complete trust in his master Li Yunmu and naturally followed his orders to the point, he was still suspicious in his heart about what exactly his master wanted to do.

Everyone had their own goal.

For example, he spent a large price to come to Lakshmi City to fight for the soul of Ancient God Lakshmi to become a god. The four young masters, on the other hand, had brought out the treasures of their clans to snatch the children and obtain the acknowledgement of Ancient God Asura.

But only his master acted as if… everything depended on his mood.

It was like that when he destroyed the reverence for gods in the hearts of mortals, then when he arrived in Pipa Clan but hadn’t tried to fight for the child possessed by Ancient God Lakshm’s soul.

Chen Xiu could not make sense of any of his actions.

“Alright, I win. Ha ha ha ha, these children are mine,” Luo Tian, who sat on an elephant, roared loudly, then followed his words by a thunderous laugh.

Chapter 806 - Attack And Kill

Chapter 806: Attack and Kill

With a loud boom, the nine subordinates of Chen Xiu took a step forward. Before doing so, they were all ordinary flux experts without any majesty. But after taking that step, a formidable pressure burst forth from each one of their bodies, which was only slightly weaker than that of Ming Xiu.

“Half god?!”

Ming Xiu sensed the presence emitted by the nine people and looked at them in shock.

It was not just one half god either, but nine! The divine might coming from Ming Xiu’s body instantly weakened in front of them. He had never expected that a branch family descendant could find nine great circle sage flux experts as subordinates, let alone something better. It should be known that powerhouses with the strength of half god did not act as hired thugs for money.

Every powerhouse had its pride.

But even Ming Xiu, the young master of Morrow Clan and the future chief, was only allowed to bring out a treasure from the clan, and that also because it was a critical time. In usual cases, such a treasure would not be given to him and would remain under the guard of the elder, let alone the command of a half god powerhouse that belonged to the clan.

Regardless of whether it was the direct descendant or branch family descendants, the half god powerhouses of the clan would not listen to any of them. They would only hear the commands of the clan chief.

Even if outsider half gods were weaker than the half gods of the four great clans, when all was said and done, they were still half gods. When faced with nine half gods, even normal gods might not be able to battle them, let alone Ming Xiu who had raised his cultivation temporarily using a treasure.

Ming Xiu’s expression returned to normal, and his gaze focused on Chen Xiu.

“You really are amazing,” he said with malice in his voice. “No wonder you had the confidence to come and fight for the soul of Ancient God Lakshmi. The other descendants of branch family, even if they had the dry heaven mirror, they were still focused on massacring the many mortals of this land.”

“You flatter me. Just now, when the four young masters were here, I was still somewhat uncertain. After all, nine half gods might not be able to deal with four gods, so I had to abandon that meat pie named Ancient God Lakshmi.”

Ming Xiu calmly nodded while looking at the nine expressionless half gods. A moment later, he suddenly said with a smile, “You are really fierce. Since this is the case, then I will leave the Pipa Clan to you.”

After saying that, he waved his hand, indicating for his subordinates to leave.

As soon as he turned the other way, a cold and gloomy expression appeared on his face. Who could have expected that a trifling branch family descendant could bring nine half gods. Even though he had raised his cultivation to god realm with the help of the clan treasure, he still wasn’t able to gain any advantage. Hence, his only choice was to try and rob Luo Tian of Ancient God Lakshmi’s soul.

But nothing was settled in his heart. After returning to clan, not only would he suppress Chen Xiu behind the scenes, he would talk to the elder regarding the matter. According to the rules, they could only bring great flux experts at ninth layer or lower as subordinates, but Chen Xiu had surprisingly dared to bring half gods as subordinates.

Just breaking this rule was enough for Chen Xiu to be thrown into the prison. And that would happen, since Ming Xiu did not believe that the nine half gods would follow Chen Xiu back to the clan.

At that time, Ming Xiu could also snatch the Pipa Clan back from him.

“Wait a moment, did I say you can go?” Chen Xiu said with a smile while caressing the monster lizard beneath him.

Ming Xiu’s complexion changed, and he turned around to look at the indifferent man that had spoke to him.

“Chen Xiu, don’t try to take a foot after getting an inch. I am the future clan chief!” he hollered in anger.

“Future. Clan. Chief,” Chen Xiu said one word at a time. “That would depend on whether you can return alive. Without being alive, how can you become the clan chief?”

As soon as Ming Xiu heard those words, his eyes went wide. Two rays of golden light shot out toward Chen Xiu before he flew into the sky and rushed toward the jungle.

“Mad, he really is a madman.”

Before Ming Xiu could finish saying that, he felt as if something had fallen on him, and the world around him began to change. The instant he landed on the ground, he raised his head and looked at the headless body falling down from the sky.

The blonde muscular man looked at Ming Xiu whose body and head were separated and who had died with a grievance of not knowing what happened to him until the end.

A pair of black golden eyes came out of Ming Xiu’s sockets and floated in the air.

The blonde muscular man collected them and returned to Pipa Village.

Constant wails echoed from the jungle. A moment earlier, Ming Xiu had sensed killing intent and abandoned his subordinates, escaping alone. The eight people who had followed him were fleeing in all directions at that moment.

But how could they escape? All of them were intercepted by Chen Xiu’s subordinates.

After a short while, they were captured, and Chen Xiu’s subordinates walked forth and stood by the side of the blonde muscular man.

Moments later, another person entered the scene.

Chen Xiu came down from the monster lizard and slowly walked to the blond muscular man before kneeling down in front of him and respectfully saying, “Master, you came.”

The blonde muscular man nodded without any emotion on his robust face. His eyes were fixed upon the shocked Liu Bailing, and he slowly walked toward her.

The blonde muscular man terrified Liu Bailing. After seeing his attack a moment ago, she was certain that his strength was definitely not at the ninth layer of great flux expert realm.

Perhaps he was also a god.

When the nine subordinates emitted the pressure of half gods, Liu Bailing had already given up in her heart. With each and every one of them being so formidable, how could the Pipa Clan escape alive?

After seeing the nine subordinates fuse with the blonde muscular man, Liu Bailing became sure that he was a god.

But what she did not understand was why he was acting as the subordinate of Morrow Clan’s branch family’s descendant when he was a god? What exactly did he want?

Liu Bailing was in a daze while countless suspicions took shape in her mind. She was so distracted by them that she did not even notice when he squatted down in front of her, bringing his face close to hers.

“Little girl, give me the jade pipa!” Li Yunmu slowly said while looking at the girl.

Liu Bailing’s attention snapped back to reality. When she looked at the enormous face so close to her, she suddenly felt a hot breathe brush past her, causing her little face to turn completely red.

What was going on here ?

“En? Don’t even think about that! This jade pipa is the supreme treasure of my Pipa Clan and the inheritance of the holy daughter, so how could I hand it over to you? Even if you want to use force, you won’t have the opportunity. I will destroy myself together with this jade pipa before that can happen.”

Li Yunmu smiled at the red-faced Liu Bailing. “If you want Ancient God Lakshmi to live, then give me the jade pipa. Otherwise, the ancient god you believe in will disappear.”

“I-I… Why should I believe you!”

Liu Bailing felt increasingly more flustered by the man’s smile, even clearly sensing the blood flowing through her veins.

The panic made her lose all bearing of a holy daughter and instantly brought back the real her, an ignorant girl of Pipa Clan.

chapters.title: Chapter 807 - Ancient God’S Soul
chapters.body:
Chapter 807 - Ancient God’S Soul

Chapter 807: Ancient God’s Soul

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

“I am a god, so even if you are the holy daughter of Pipa Clan and can use this jade pipa to increase your strength to god realm for a short time, how could this borrowed strength compare to mine? If I wanted to harm you, you would have already died without a body. How could you live for so long?”

Once Li Yunmu began to speak, he became even more happy at the sight of Liu Bailing’s flushed little face.

The girl did not reply, but her eyes were vigilant. She looked like a little beast who had encountered a crisis.

“I still don’t believe you!”

“After my subordinate Chen Xiu came, did he hurt any of your clansmen?” Li Yunmu asked.

“No.”

“Then what about the children emitting the multicoloured light? Were they kidnapped by me?”

“No.”

“Then did I attack you all after I appeared?”

“No…”

The three questions left Liu Bailing startled. She recalled that after Chen Xiu appeared, he had never attacked any Pipa clansmen, even though he had killed someone from Morrow Clan. Although the clans of Asura City were fond of battle, they did not kill someone on the same side without a good reason.

That being said, why did the blonde god want to assist Pipa Clan?

Liu Bailing looked at Li Yunmu’s handsome face and said with a strong guilt in her that she could place. “If you want to help Ancient God Lakshmi, why didn’t you attack when the children were captured?”

Upon hearing her words, Li Yunmu began to laugh. “Those children emitting the five-colored light are only a pretense, and Asura will also know that after checking them. At that time, he won’t make things difficult for the children but if I had attacked and the four young masters were killed, Asura might be provoked into personally coming here.”

“Prove it to me!” Liu Bailing said while tightly clutching the jade pipa in her hands.

When Chen Xiu, who knelt on the ground not far away, heard the conversation between Li Yunmu and Liu Bailing, he also became puzzled in his heart.

What exactly was going on?

Why did the Master’s and Pipa Clan’s holy daughter’s words sound so ambiguous, as if it was a quarrel between two young lovers who were reconciling with each other? Master’s woman was together with him, yet he dared to act like that!

He really was fierce.

Li Yunmu raised his two fingers and divine might appeared on their fingertips, which rushed toward the jade pipa in Liu Bailing’s hand. Upon seeing the overwhelming divine power, Liu Bailing forgot to remain on alert for a moment.

The instant the divine might collided with the jade pipa, dazzling five-colored light blossomed from the spotlessly white jade pipa. Strands of divine energy drifted out from within it and coiled around each other, forming a metasphere.

When Liu Bailing looked at it, she felt the presence of Ancient God Lakshmi. Her complexion instantly changed, and she hurriedly said, “Ancient God Lakshmi! You… quickly return our ancient god!”

Li Yunmu retrieved his divine might, and the five-colored light also retreated. The jade pipa then returned to its normal appearance.

“Now, you should be convinced,” Li Yunmu said with a slight smile while looking at Liu Bailing. The joy in his heart was growing slowly, and the feeling of taking the girl for himself rose in his heart.

Naturally, that feeling was not because of Liu Bailing’s appearance, but the fact that she was the holy daughter of Pipa Clan. She had decided to sacrifice herself to save her clan, which made Li Yunmu recall the time when the parallel planes were about to merge and his family and relatives were going to meet a tragic death. At that time, he had run to the Origin World to find a method to prevent that.

Li Yunmu saw Liu Bailing as a fellow sufferer and empathized with her.

The girl gave the jade pipa to Li Yunmu and solemnly said, “Now, I give Ancient God Lakshmi to you. I hope that you can resurrect her.”

“Prepare a room for me.”

Liu Bailing led Li Yunmu to her room, then began to clear up the mess with other villagers. Chen Xiu, who had been kneeling on the ground, looked at the room occupied by master, then followed Liu Bailing with a strange complexion.

In the room, Li Yunmu was sitting cross-legged while the jade pipa was placed on a table.

The system’s voice echoed in his mind, suspiciously asking him, [How do you intend to rescue her?]

“I don’t know!” Li Yunmu said in a deep voice.

[You don’t know and yet you promised that little lass to save Ancient God Lakshmi. You have developed some feelings toward that little lass; otherwise, why would you promise to undertake this task]

The system sighed in exasperation, then began to analyze the situation. [Ancient God Lakshmi used those children as bait to fool Asura. But in reality, she was hiding in this jade pipa, waiting to seize Liu Bailing’s body. As the holy daughter of Pipa Clan, she would naturally guard the jade pipa all the time.

[As long as Liu Bailing kept using it, the two of them would fuse with each other. After several days, the ancient god’s soul would’ve completely integrated with the little lass’ body and, from that moment on, she would be the new Ancient God Lakshmi. Are you hoping that this little girl will not disappear or do you want to make her disappear?]

Li Yunmu did not reply. When Liu Bailing used the jade pipa, he had sensed the presence of the ancient god within it. Therefore, he stopped Chen Xiu from fighting for the children emitting the five-colored light, since they were clearly bait.

The four young masters, however, did not look at the jade pipa. As far as they knew, as long as one of them took the children emitting the five-colored light, the others would go and ambush them mid-way.

The instant Ming Xiu decided to stay, Li Yunmu made up his mind to kill him and quickly dealt with him.

But the reason why he did so was just as the system said: When he saw Liu Bailing for the first time, he had developed some feelings for her, and didn’t want her to become Ming Xiu’s concubine or allow Ancient God Lakshmi to remove her soul from her body. But he himself was not completely honest with her either.

“That’s why I want you to summon the soul of Ancient God Lakshmi so I can have a chat with her,” Li Yunmu explained. When an ancient god had sealed herself in a near death state, only the system could wake her up.

An almost transparent wave of energy flew out from Li Yunmu’s mind and knocked against the jade pipa.

In an instant, it blossomed with five-colored light, illuminating the whole room. A globe of divine energy erupted from it. Within it, there was a ball of light.

With the system’s powers, the divine energy’s tentacle-like threads were removed from the metasphere, and the presence of an ancient god spread through the room once more.

“God father!” 1

A voice like that of a yellow oriole rang out, and the metasphere began to fly around. After circling around the room a few times, it returned to its original position.

“How can you have the presence of god father!” the voice asked with suspicion from the metasphere.

Li Yunmu looked at the metasphere, then asked with a completely calm expression and cold tone, “You are Ancient God Lakshmi? I didn’t expect that you, one of the seven ancient gods, would surprisingly resort to seizing your own people.”

“Hmph, why must this goddess explain her actions to you! Since they are my people, then when this goddess is facing difficulties, they must respectfully offer themselves. This is their honor. Even if you have defeated us, you still mustn’t interfere in the matters of Lanlou.”

“Oh, despite only being a wisp of a soul, you are still this arrogant?”

Footnotes:

Ch 807 Footnote 1

Here, Lakshmi means father who is a god, not godfather as one may want to read it at first.

Chapter 810 - Thief Asking For A Beating

Chapter 810: Thief Asking for a Beating

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

In the plaza of Pipa Clan, a group of elderly, sick, and women were standing behind a group of holy daughters. The villagers had grabbed the hands of the holy daughters while trying their best to talk them out of using their power.

“Lady holy daughter, you mustn’t attack. This person from Asura City is a subordinate of a god. That god is rescuing our Ancient God Lakshmi right now. After he comes out and learns that his subordinate is dead, he will be extremely furious.”

“Yes, yes, lady holy daughter mustn’t be too harsh with him.”

The holy daughters holding their music instruments frowned while looking at the villagers obstructing them. The holy daughter holding the zither looked at Chen Xiu standing on the lawn outside the wooden room, then turned toward the holy daughter in the lead.

“Sister Feng Ren, will you check what’s going on here?”

The leader of the holy daughters called Sister Feng Ren looked suspiciously at the villagers with distrust in her heart. When Pipa Clan encountered a great calamity, Liu Bailing used heavenly vision to let every holy daughter in Lakshmi City sense it so they would hurry over to help.

That was why the moment they reached Pipa Clan and saw Chen Xiu, who belonged to Asura City, they got ready to take action. However, just as they were about to attack, the villagers of Pipa Clan rushed to stop them.

According to what they said, the matter involved Ancient God Lakshmi and another god.

That confused Yunfeng even more, and she turned her attention to the villagers. “Narrate everything that happened here from the start.”

A woman with a child walked out from the villagers and respectfully saluted Yunfeng. “Lady holy daughter, it happened like this. A group of Asura City people passed through our clan’s territory. They shone a mirror on us, and the children of the village began to emit five-colored light and created a projection in the sky.

“That projection attracted the four young masters of Asura City. They attacked each other to be the ones to kidnap the children of the clan. Holy Daughter Liu Bailing and the rest of us tried to sacrifice ourselves to let the children escape into Lakshmi City, but unfortunately, all the children of Pipa Clan were caught and taken away, then this Asura person you wanted to attack walked out.

“Ridiculous!”

After hearing the villager’s story, Yunfeng’s face turned cold, and she said, “Ancient God Lakshmi has been recuperating in the divine palace ever since the campaign failed. How could she be inside the supreme treasure of Pipa Clan? You all believed their words so casually without worrying that it might be a trap set up by that god!”

The Pipa clansmen did not say anything. They just lowered their heads silently.

Yunfeng noticed that the villagers were comprised of only the elderly, sick, and women, then sighed without speaking anymore. If not for the battle to invade the Land of Ice, Pipa Clan’s last holy daughter would not have died together with the young and strong men of the clan.

Because of the battle, Pipa Clan decayed. Since they did not have the protection of the god level holy daughter nor the experienced men to guide the clan, they were left with only the elderly and children who had yet to mature. That was also why the holy daughter they chose only had the strength of an initial stage sage flux expert.

With that being the case, how could they resist the four young masters of Asura City, let alone being able to discern enemy traps.

“So where is Liu Bailing now? And where is that god of mysterious origins? We will first drive away that unknown god, then will discuss the matter of Asura City kidnapping your children with Liu Bailing.

“Although Ancient God Lakshmi doesn’t use power of belief to increase her strength and thus is the weakest among the ancient gods, this doesn’t mean that the people of other ancient gods can kidnap our people so unbridledly!”

Yunfeng’s words were cold, and when wearing a charming gongqun, she had a heroic spirit.

The villagers hemmed and hawed before pointing toward the room which Chen Xiu was guarding. “That lord god and holy daughter Liu Bailing are… in that room!”

Yunfeng didn’t reply, but a divine might erupted from her body. The cape behind her fluttered in the air, and a dazzling light burst forth from the red dot between her eyes, making her seem like a fairy descended from the heavens.

The other holy daughters looked at each other and revealed flabbergasted expressions before going after Yunfeng toward the wooden room.

Before they reached it, the door of the wooden room opened, and Li Yunmu walked out holding Liu Bailing. The girl who had a petite figure was motionless like a chick, but her cheeks burned bright red.

“Brazen thief, you dare to disrespect a holy daughter!” Yunfeng said with a zither floating above her hand in front of her.

She looked at Li Yunmu with an ice-cold face, then placed her lily white hands on the strings of the zither and began to play. Three of the holy daughters behind her also took out their music instruments to attack.

Once the sound laws appeared, the world changed, and a violent gale began to flow in all directions.

One after another, soundwaves transformed into generals riding on horses that rushed toward Li Yunmu or changed into heavenly fairies that flew into the sky while playing beautiful and charming music or caused barriers to appear one after another.

Li Yunmu looked at the generals rushing toward him and took a deep breath before forcefully blowing it toward them. A wave of violent wind appeared and scattered the soundwaves who had taken the shapes of generals.

After that, Li Yunmu lightly moved his hand toward the fairies flying in the sky, and the sky instantly returned to normal.

When faced with the layers of barriers in front of him, he took a step forward and entered them. After a moment, he walked out from the opposite end and stopped in front of the holy daughters.

One blow, one strike, and one step.

Three actions destroyed the attacks of four heavenly daughters. They were so startled that they could not speak for a long time.

Yunfeng looked at Li Yunmu, who had calm expression on his face, with her heart filled with vigilance. Just a moment ago, the four of them might not have used their full strength, but when all was said and done, it was still a combined attack of four gods. The soundwaves were filled with divine energy which was amplified by the musical instruments, so no ordinary god could resist them.

Even a peak god level powerhouse would cut a sorry figure when trying to defend themselves.

But in the end, this god of unknown origins had easily blocked them.

“Who exactly are you? Also, why aren’t you quickly releasing holy daughter Liu Bailing? Do it or you can forget about leaving Lakshmi City’s territory today! Besides, as an outsider in Lanlou, aren’t you afraid of being hunted down by the seven ancient gods?”

Yunfeng threatened Li Yunmu with her hands on the zither. If he took even one step forward, she would play the zither with her full strength.

“Seven ancient gods! Are there still seven ancient gods? Your Ancient God Lakshmi has been reduced to her soul form, and should be struck off from the list. Otherwise, how could the people of Asura City casually enter Lakshmi City’s territory?” Li Yunmu said with a smile while tightly hugging Liu Bailing, who had already lost all reason.

“Impudent! Our goddess was injured and is recovering in the divine palace. If you continue to speak rudely, we will stake all we have to exterminate you.”

The complexion of the holy daughters turned ugly.

Their expressions were filled with resolution, as if swearing their loyalty as holy daughters toward their ancient god.

Most of them were also giving death stares to Li Yunmu without paying any attention to Liu Bailing’s shadow which was constantly twisting and struggling.

Li Yunmu gave a demonic smile and said to the group of holy daughters, “Amusing, really amusing. You will naturally know whether the people of Asura City have entered the territory of Lakshmi City or not.”

chapters.title: Chapter 811 - Convinced
chapters.body:
Chapter 811 - Convinced

Chapter 811: Convinced

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Within an enormous tree outside Pipa Clan, Brunhilda looked at Li Yunmu holding the petite Liu Bailing in the plaza of the village. Her expression was indifferent, but she suddenly stretched her hand, putting it at Li Yunmu’s back, and ruthless pinching it.

Li Yunmu instantly woke up from the meditative state and glared at Brunhilda while suspiciously saying, “Little Bu, what the hell are you doing!”

“You still dare to ask me what is going on! On the contrary, it is my turn to ask you that question! Your shadow is tightly holding Pipa Clan’s holy daughter in his bosom without letting go! Have you become so unbridaled that you even dare to do so in front of your wife?”

Brunhilda frowned, releasing divine power through the hand pinching Li Yunmu’s waist and strengthening her grip.

Li Yunmu felt guilty, but he revealed an ignorant expression and anxiously said, “Wait, wait, you don’t need to take out young anger on my shadow’s actions on me. If you want to blame someone, then go find trouble with that shadow.”

After saying that, Li Yunmu immediately used Insect Step to run away, leaving behind afterimages in the sky. Brunhilda coldly snorted and then chased after him.

“If you have ability, then don’t run.”

On the plaza, Li Yunmu, who was holding Liu Bailing, was slightly startled, but soon a smile appeared on his face. The holy daughters became suspicious of it, and Yunfeng frowned, then coughed and said, “Brazen thief, you still dare to lie!”

Before her words could fade away, Li Yunmu snapped back to attention and slowly said, “Why would I lie?”

Li Yunmu released Liu Bailing from his embrace, then stepped forward and punched the air with both his hands. The holy daughters, despite their vigilance, sustained a heavy attack and fell a few meters back.

“This punch is the interest for attacking my subordinate.”

Li Yunmu withdrew his punch and then turned toward Chen Xiu lying on the lawn outside the room. “Alright, you’ve had enough sleep.”

As soon as he said that, the motionless Chen Xiu stood up and bowed toward Li Yunmu while saying with a smile, “Master, you finally came out.”

Chen Xiu’s smile was not because he was embarrassed for being seen through by Li Yunmu. If he had crawled back from the ground and faced the attacks of the four holy daughters, he would have been courting death. In such a situation, feigning unconsciousness was also considered as an ability.

Li Yunmu nodded and said to the system in his brain, “You should draw out Chen Xiu’s memories and project a vision in the sky.”

The system did not reply, but directly formed a black beetle which flew above Chen Xiu’s head. A ray of light shot out from its back, forming a screen in the sky. On it, the scene of Asura City’s people massacring mortals appeared, then it changed to the four young masters fighting over Pipa Clan’s children.

The holy daughters, who were blown away by the attack, looked at the screen in stupefaction, even forgetting about the blood flowing down the corners of their mouths. Neither of them had expected that the people of Asura City would go on a rampage in the territory of Lakshmi City.

Ever since they had become the holy daughters, the territories of the seven ancient gods had remained peaceful. People from the territory of one ancient god simply did not dare to casually step into the territory of another ancient god, let alone brazenly massacre mortals of other territories in broad daylight.

The holy daughters residing in Lakshmi City had not sensed anything, and their expressions changed. If it were not for the crisis of Pipa Clan, it was likely that they would have only sensed something was wrong after countless more mortals had been slaughtered. Suddenly, terrifying fear gripped their hearts.

Although Ancient God Lakshmi did not absorb power of belief, the number of mortals in every territory was fixed. If any of the ancient gods kidnapped mortals of other regions, their strength would be greatly amplified. The subtle balance existing between the seven ancient gods would instantly be broken, and the entire Lanlou would be caught in a fight over power of belief once more.

The black beetle flew away from Chen Xiu’s head and entered Li Yunmu’s head, disappearing there. The sky became peaceful, and the entire Pipa Clan sunk into grief, while the holy daughters entered contemplation.

In the meantime, Chen Xiu did not dare to even breathe loudly. After all, the scenes just then contained him massacring mortals.

If the four holy daughters thought of making a sacrifice for the departed spirits, how would he escape such a calamity?

While thinking of that, Chen Xiu retreated a few steps, walking behind Li Yunmu, where he lowered his head without making any sound.

“Now you should be convinced. At normal times, which ancient god would dare to do such a thing? Only when something has happened to an ancient god, would the other ancient gods be tempted. Without Ancient God Lakshmi, even if you all of you are gods of the twelve music clans, you will be reduced to the position of slaves.”

The group of holy daughters did not reply for a time. After a while, Feng Ren raised her head to look at Li Yunmu and slowly said, “If Ancient God Lakshmi has perished, then what are you, a god of unknown origins, trying to do? Asura’s plans can be understood, but what exactly are you intentions?”

“I can’t stand injustice. I helped retain the soul of your Ancient God Lakshmi, so you holy daughters should be grateful to me and not attack me,” Li Yunmu said while smiling.

Yunfeng coldly snorted at him. “Your distinguished self is really kindhearted. Even as a god from outside, you still rushed to Lanlou to assist our ancient goddess. Truthfully speaking, even if only a part of Ancient God Lakshmi remains, there’s no need for you rescue her. She is an innate ancient goddess while you are at most the same as us, only a god and nothing more.”

Li Yunmu smiled, then a demonic presence erupted from his body, which became more and more formidable. It almost instantly reached the level of an ancient god before disappearing. The minds of Yunfeng and the other holy daughters were assaulted by the formidable presence, and their expressions turned gloomy.

“Now you should believe me. Lakshmi whom you serve is an ancient goddess, and I am also an ancient god, so why should I not have the ability to rescue her?”

Yunfeng looked at the unconscious Liu Bailing, then slowly stood up from the ground and saluted Li Yunmu, showing her respect. She who wouldn’t believe anything previously was instantly convinced of Li Yunmu’s words after seeing his strength. Even if he had only revealed the presence of an ancient god and had not exposed the characteristic specific to an ancient god, she was still convinced.

His strength was simply formidable. He had easily injured four holy daughters with a wave of his hand, which was impossible to do unless he was an ancient god.

The other three holy daughters saw Yunfeng’s actions and gradually stood up as well. They bowed and properly saluted, showing their respect.

Yunfeng looked at Li Yunmu, then respectfully said, “I don’t know whether lord ancient god has already brought Ancient God Lakshmi back to life. If ancient goddess has already been rescued, then we request to have audience with her so that she can explain the situation to us and give us commands. This way, we holy daughters will know what to do.”
