chapters.title: Chapter 813 - Setting Out
chapters.body:
Chapter 813 - Setting Out

Chapter 813: Setting Out

When Li Yunmu thought of power of belief existing in the music instruments, Liu Bailing’s jade pipa came to his mind. It could raise her strength from initial stage sage flux expert to god level, providing an effect similar to the treasure used by Ming Xiu to increase his cultivation. All methods which could amplify a person’s strength were extremely rare.

All the methods to temporarily increase strength which Li Yunmu had seen previously also had aftereffects once used.

“Oh, tell me, how can using power of belief can increase your strength for a short time?” Li Yunmu asked while looking at Yunfeng with a gaze full of interest.

Upon seeing that Li Yunmu was interested, Yunfeng recovered her previous contempt and her face betrayed her pride.

“Ever since the power of belief appeared, it has always been used in Lanlou. Even after the first battle between gods, it was used in secret in Lanlou. But once True God disappeared, our gods they did it openly.

“There are two methods to use the power of belief. The first is to infuse some weapon with the power of belief. As long as you can circulate the power of belief in the weapon with your energy and use it as your own, it will greatly amplify your strength.

“Naturally, this boost in strength is short term. The merit of using this method is, however, that it doesn’t leave any residual aftereffects.

“Another method is to gather the power of belief directly in your body to increase your strength permanently. This makes it look like a different method, but in truth, you are still borrowing power.”

Li Yunmu then spoke while still thinking about what he had heard. “The power of belief gathered in the music weapon, when used to increase your strength, can be considered as borrowed power. But gathering the power of belief in your own body, how can that be considered as borrowing power?”

Yunfeng smiled, looking dazzling under the sunlight. Her crimson lips moved slightly and she slowly said, “Although the increase in strength provided by gathering the power of belief in your body is eternal, once it is used, it will create a connection with the mortals.

“If the mortals remain happy, then everything will be good and there won’t be any harm. But if the mortals stop believing in you, the strength raised by the power of belief will decrease greatly and may even harm your original cultivation.

“Therefore, in Lanlou, mortals are used to throw dirty water on one’s enemies. Only when the mortals begin to reject their old godn can a new god enter the scene.”

After saying that, Yunfeng saw that Li Yunmu was lost in thought, and she lowered her head to size him up. The gaze of the blushing Liu Bailing was also fixed on him.

At this time, Li Yunmu who was pondering over Yunfeng’s words, suddenly gained enlightenment.

It was clear to him why the True God wanted to destroy this power of belief. The system didn’t care about whether the mortals lived peacefully or were ruined and orphaned. Instead, it was concerned about the flaws of the power of belief.

Although power of belief was good in concept, it had a fatal weakness which could not be removed. It could act both as a reward and a restraint. Once the power of belief was used, it created an eternal connection with mortals which could not be severed. This connection would then influence the strength of gods for all time.

This was one of the reasons. The other one was that power of belief led to battles between gods.

“This musical instrument containing power of belief could raise Liu Bailing’s strength from initial stage sage flux expert to god. Then you all who are already gods should be able to raise your strength to ancient god realm after using the power of belief.”

Li Yunmu’s attention returned to reality, and he looked at the holy daughters. “But when I attacked just a moment ago, I didn’t sense the presence of any ancient god.”

Yunfeng’s complexion turned red, and she said with some embarrassment, “Lakshmi City doesn’t borrow power of belief to cultivate so its control over mortals is also not very strict and thus the amount of power of belief collected is also the lowest compared to the other six cities.

“Although we can use the musical instruments to increase our strength… Younger Sister Liu Bailing’s cultivation is very low, only at the initial stage of sage flux expert realm, so the amount of power of belief required to raise her strength to god level is also very low. If we want to reach the ancient god realm, that can only be done through gathering power of belief in our bodies.”

Li Yunmu nodded, his conjunction turned out to be right. If the power of belief could really increase the strength of twelve holy daughter to ancient god level so easily, Lakshmi City’s strength would not be the lowest.

“Since everything is explained, I will tell you my plan. Right now, the body and other soul parts of Ancient God Lakshmi are in Asura’s hands. If we want to obtain them, we will have to kill Asura. But given the present strength of Ancient God Lakshmi as well as Lakshmi City, it is almost impossible to do.

“So we can only borrow strength from others. The other five gods don’t know that Asura has invaded Lakshmi City. You all also know the regulations of Lanlou, that the seven ancient gods will manage their own regions and will never interfere or invade another’s territory.

“Since Asura broke this regulation, you all must let the other five ancient gods recuperating in the divine palace learn about this matter. Additionally, you must do so while avoiding letting the other five ancient gods find out about Ancient God Lakshmi’s situation, and for that, you must gather all of Lakshmi City’s power of belief in one weapon.”

Yunfeng nodded at first, but when she heard the final sentence, she frowned slightly.

“Lord ancient god, can you tell us why must all the power of belief be gathered in one weapon? If we do this, then the strength of our twelve holy daughters will decrease.”

“Our final aim is to use the alliance of the five ancient gods to deal with Asura. If we don’t have a certain amount of strength, the five ancient gods will first deal with Lakshmi City. Naturally, this weapon in which the power of belief is gathered won’t be used by you, but only Liu Bailing.”

After Li Yunmu finished speaking, he looked at the group of holy daughters.

When Liu Bailing heard his words, her eyes went wide, and an indescribable expression appeared on her face.

Yunfeng’s brows also creased slightly, but they smoothed out the next instant, and she said with a smile, “Lord is intelligent. So we will now take younger sister Liu Bailing and Pipa clansmen to Lakshmi City to prepare for everything.”

“As for the matter of spreading and forming an alliance to deal with Asura, I will leave it up to you as well. I will follow Chen Xiu and return to Asura City, then see if I can find an opportunity to kill Asura and rescue the children of Pipa Clan.”

While speaking, Li Yunmu looked at Liu Bailing. She also looked at him, her face turning redder by the moment and her heart growing restless. After his speech, she picked up the jade pipa lying on the table and followed the holy daughters out.

Before long, loud clamor came from outside. The noise was soon followed by the sound of something breaking, and then the village turned silent.

Chen Xiu looked at the heavenly daughters leaving with the Pipa clansmen, then turned around and entered the wooden room.

“Master, the Pipa clansmen have left with the holy daughters. What should we do now?”

Li Yunmu looked at Chen Xiu, then his body changed into black mist. It flew outside at a fast speed and entered the shadows on the ground, disappearing completely.

“Naturally, we must go to Asura City.”

chapters.title: Chapter 814 - Asura
chapters.body:
Chapter 814 - Asura

Chapter 814: Asura

When Chen Xiu heard the words ‘Asura City, his body shuddered all of a sudden. He hastily knelt on the ground in front of Li Yunmu and anxiously said, “Master, do you intend to abandon me? Did this little me do something wrong?”

When Li Yunmu, who was in pain because Brunhilda had grabbed his waist, saw Chen Xiu’s actions, he was somewhat stupefied and stayed silent for a long time. After a while though, he waved his hand.

“You did nothing wrong. I simply agreed to ally with Ancient God Lakshmi and help her deal with Asura so we can retrieve her divine body and soul. So in the trip to Asura City, we will follow behind you as your subordinates.”

When Chen Xiu heard the first half of the sentence, he sighed, but when he heard the second half, his heartbeat suddenly quickened. The ancient gods were going to act as his subordinates, so if he made the slightest mistake, his entire existence might be erased. After all, they were both ancient gods, and there was no way for him to refuse the matter.

“This little me understands,” Chen Xiu said and went to stand respectfully behind the two people.

Before him, Brunhilda pinched Li Yunmu’s waist ever harder and said with a frown, “Helping an ancient goddess retrieve her body and soul… Why don’t you speak truthfully instead? Isn’t it all for that holy daughter of Pipa Clan!”

Li Yunmu frowned, then hastily said, “Little Bu, quickly let go of me. I’m helping the ancient goddess not only for Liu Bailing but to obtain the Heavenly Grand Ritual. If we help Lakshmi , we will naturally also get our hands on Heavenly Grand Ritual without needing to use force. Isn’t that better?”

“Really?”

Brunhilda looked at Li Yunmu and saw that he didn’t seem to be lying. She then pulled away her lily white hand and placed it on his arm before softly saying, “Then we don’t need to pretend to be Chen Xiu’s subordinates and can easily find a corner to stay in Asura City.”

Chen Xiu looked at Brunhilda’s figure with excitement welling up in his heart. He really hoped that Li Yunmu would agree. If the two ancient gods acted as his subordinates, then even if they were pretending, it would still place enormous pressure on Chen Xiu.

Li Yunmu pulled Brunhilda close and explained his thoughts. “That won’t do. If we casually found a place to stay, we could not go to many places without alarming Asura. Although Chen Xiu is a descendant of a branch family, for better or worse, he is still considered as nobility. His authority in Asura City is much higher than that of mortals.”

Upon hearing his words, Brunhilda nodded and indifferently said, “Since this is the case, we will act as Chen Xiu’s subordinates. Speaking of which, I still haven’t seen any great clans until now. I must take a trip around Asura City.”

Brunhilda was the princess of the Land of Ice and an ancient god level powerhouse, so everyone she came in contact with was a high level expert. How could she know about something as low as clans?

“Well then, we will start on our trip to Asura City.”

After finishing their conversation, they sat down on the fierce tiger and began to advance towards Asura City with a frowning Chen Xiu following behind them.

While traveling through the jungle, the three of them heard the sounds of Asura City’s people engaging in wanton massacre of Lakshmi City’s villages as well as the miserable wails of mortals. A pensive melody followed that, and then everything returned to quiet all of a sudden.

Yunfeng and the other holy daughters had taken action very quickly. After returning to Lakshmi City, they made proper arrangements in regards to all matters.

First, they gathered the descendants of the twelve music clans and dispatched them to deal with the people of Asura City attacking their mortals. After that, they gathered the power of belief in all the weapons in one place, quickly concentrating it in the jade pipa.

After three days, a five-colored light blossomed out of Lakshmi City, pervading through the sky for a long time without dispersing. A formidable ancient god presence also appeared in a brazen manner, attracting the attention of the divine palace and startling the five injured ancient gods.

In the Asura City, Ancient God Asura also sensed that extremely familiar presence.

Asura City was like an enormous skeleton lying on the ground with its edges composed of an enormous circular wall. In the city, the lowest level mixed races and mortals lived near the edges and at the bottom. Above them, there was a region where the powerful and rich people lived, while the majority of upper skeleton was the territory of the four great clans.

As for the skull part, it was the mansion of the city lord. In a room formed of the head and eyes, what seemed to be a twenty year old youngster with black hair was reclining on a leather chair while holding a crystal goblet in his hand and slowly swaying it. Before him, a two-headed, three-armed middle-aged man wearing fancy clothes was kneeling.

“God father, Rahu Clan’s young master has returned with the group of children releasing multi-colored light. They all belong to the Pipa Clan. Right now, Luo Tian is waiting at the entrance. Do you want to see him?” the middle-aged man asked respectfully.

The black-haired youth sighed, then put down his goblet and went to a glass window nearby to look at the sky and said in a profound voice, “No need, let him return. As for those Pipa Clan’s children, imprison them in the city lord’s mansion for now. We’ll deal with them later.”

“Yes!”

After saying that, the middle-aged man’s expression tightened, and he immediately retreated.

The luxurious room sunk into silence once more. The black-haired youth gazed at the ancient god presence in the distance, then changed into his original appearance, which had three heads and six arms. A ruthless smile appeared on his three faces and he muttered to himself.

“Lakshmi, only a part of your soul remains, but you are still so restless. Truly disobedient.”

Asura calmed down then and reclined on the leather chair once more while slowly swaying the crystal goblet in his hand. He pondered over Lakshmi’s intent behind releasing her presence.

It was a fact that the majority of her soul had already been devoured. Only a small part had fled into the lower realms to possess a mortal. Mortals did not have cultivation, so she could not use the power of belief to strengthen herself. And if she wanted to possess a flux expert under god realm, it would require a lot of time.

Then how could she possess a body and recover her original cultivation in such a short time?

Could it be that Lakshmi had also began to congeal power of belief to cultivate like their elder brothers?

The smile on Asura’s face became even wider, which could terrify anyone under the illumination of a faint light.

“In any case, you shouldn’t even think about obstructing me in becoming a master god.”

Asura mumbled to himself, then lifted one of his free hands, and a dark flame appeared on his palm. The presence he emitted rose above the level of ancient gods and to just below master gods.

At that moment, the five startled ancient gods descended from the divine palace into Lakshmi City to search for the ancient goddess.

In the meantime, the two-headed three-armed middle-aged man’s expression in Asura City was ice-cold. He slowly walked to the mouth part of the skeleton and a magnificent hall where Luo Tian was sitting.

chapters.title: Chapter 815 - Idiot
chapters.body:
Chapter 815 - Idiot

Chapter 815: Idiot

Ashbi was sitting on the leather chair with his slightly swollen body protruding outwards and frosty expression on his face. Underneath him, Luo Tian was sitting with his tall and sturdy body. He excitedly said:

“Lord City Master, what is god father say, did he agree to see me.”

Luo Tian was extremely excited in his heart. First, he managed to capture the children releasing five coloured light then on the way, he encountered the ambush of Jasmine and Domingle but still managed to safely return to Asura City. After returning, he rushed to the city lord’s mansion to request his rewards.

Previously Asura had stayed in the Asura City instead of returning to divine palace to issue this mission so clearly it was extremely important.

Now he had already returned with the children emitting five coloured light, so the credit was naturally his. As for the rewards, he didn’t need to opportunity to become a god, as he already was a direct family descendant with extremely pure bloodline. So if he cultivated laboriously, he could gather the power of belief in his body and become a god.

What he wanted, was to enter the eyes of ancient god Asura.

After ancient god Asura devoured ancient goddess Lakshmi, he had destroyed the rules of Lanlou which had continued for thousands of years. SO naturally it would lead to the second war between gods over the power of belief. At this time, if he had already obtained ancient god Asura’s favour, then he would be able to soar quickly to heavens. After ancient god Asura devours the other six ancient gods, he would become the true master of one region, rising to master god.

Ashbi coldly snorted, looking at the excited expression of Luo Tian and said in a poor tone:

“You see me sitting here, do you think that my appearance resembles the situation when god father granted you audience? Really stupied!”

Hearing this, Luo Tian was startled for a long while. After a while, he suspiciously said:

“Then what does city master mean, god father had commanded to search for children emitting five coloured light in Lakshmi City’s territory. I found them and returned as soon as possible then why isn’t god father granting an audience to me.”

Ashbi looked at Luo Tian, contempt filled his face. After a long while he again opened his mouth:

“You want an explanation! Alright, you bring the children emitting five coloured light!”

Luo Tian looked at Ashbi then waved his hand indicating his subordinate to bring the children.

Soon, two bodyguards entered with a group of children walking unsteadily. The oldest among this group was only eight to nine year old, while the youngest was three to four and had just recently learned to walk. When they looked at the asura people with malevolent expression and oddly shaped bodies, a hint of confusion appeared in their big shining eyes and they began to wail.

“You yourself take a proper look at this group of pipa clan children!”

Ashbi angrily said.

Asura looked at them but he didn’t find anything different. Then he took out the dry heaven mirror from his black armour and shined it on the group of children, but nothing happened. Even the five coloured had also dispersed.

What happened??

Ashbi saw that Luo Tian had understood and waved towards the two bodyguards, saying:

“Put this group of Pipa Clan’s children into my prison and deal with them later.”

The bodyguards retreated, leading the bawling children away, leaving behind only a cold faced Ashbi and a dumbstruck Luo Tian in the room.

“How did this happen! This group of children was definitely releasing five coloured light at the Pipa Clan, then how did they become like this in the city lord’s mansion!”

Luo Tian said in an incredulous tone.

Ashbi sitting on the main seat, again revealed an expression of contempt. He knew that Rahu clan’s people were single minded, it wasn’t easy to make them understand anything. But he hadn’t expected that the present young master of Rahu Clan would be foolish to this extent. The problem was in front of them, but Luo Tian was still asking what happened here, simply a complete blockhead.

Each generation of the four great clans was inferior to the last one.

“How do you think this happened!”

Ashbi said resentfully.

“Can’t you see that you were swindled. As a young master of the four great clans, you can’t even see this point. At that time, god father had commanded us to capture the soul of ancient goddess Lakshmi and not to kidnap the children releasing multicoloured light. Illuminating under the dry heaven mirror is the only way to reveal that somebody has been possessed!”

Hearing this, Luo Tian didn’t reply but his complexion turned ashen. The glass of wine in his large hand instantly turned into dust. Next instant, he furiously stood up, the power exploding from his body turned the exquisite chair into powder.

“Where do you think this is!”

Ashbi looked at Luo Tian being impudent in city lord’s mansion, the fury in his heart exploded forth with the might of god suppressing Luo Tian.

Instantly, Luo Tian woke up and looked at Ashbi with ashen complexion, his tall and sturdy body trembled. He directly knelt on the ground, kowtowing to admit his mistake and said:

“I was wrong, lord city master.”

“Go away and control your anger.”

Saying this, Ashbi got up and left the visitor’s hall. Luo Tian inwardly heaved a sigh of relief, if city lord had really decided to punish him then even if he was the young master of Rahu Clan, he would still suffer a calamity.

All the members of four clans were Asura’s children, Luo Tian also called Asura as god father, like Ashbi. Although there didn’t seem to be any difference between the two but in fact the difference was large. After all, Ashbi was Asura’s first son, was directly connected to him by blood. The only people in the four great clans who could stand on the same level as city lord, were the four founders of every clan.

If Ashbi angrily punished him, Rahu Clan’s founder still wouldn’t come to save him.

Luo Tian calmed his heart and walked out of the city lord’s mansion. The few subordinates outside, surrounded him and anxiously said:

“What happened young master, ancient god Asura didn’t praise you.”

Hearing their words, Luo Tian almost lost control of his heart which he had calmed down and directly extended his large hand, slapping the subordinate who enquired to ground.

“Get lost!”

After saying this, Luo Tian sat on his elephant and prepared to return to clan to enquire with his father who was also Patriarch about what should be done next. Originally, their Rahu Clan’s strength was in the first place among the four clans, but their brains couldn’t compare to the other three clans who were always duping them with some plots and conspiracies. This maintained the balance between the four great clans.

After ancient god Asura issued this mission, Rahu clan had specifically allowed young master Luo Tian to take the treasure of the clan to plunder so as to allow Luo Tian to enter Asura’s eyes. As long as this matter was done properly, Rahu Clan would automatically become the number one among the four clans, and would enjoy even more power of belief.”

But presently their plan had fallen apart, Rahu clan’s advantage was also lost. With balance returning to the four clans, now they could only plan for the future.

Just as Luo Tian closed his eyes to rest, his felt that his elephant has stopped. He opened his eyes to see what had happened, and saw a group of people in the front, all of them were from two faced Morrow Clan. He slowly creased his brows and enquired:

“What are you Morrow Clan people thinking? You dare to come in the path of this young master, don’t you want to live? Quickly get lost!”

“Rahu clan young master, our Patriarch has a request!”

chapters.title: Chapter 816 - Great Trouble
chapters.body:
Chapter 816 - Great Trouble

Chapter 816: Great Trouble

Luo Tian riding his elephant, entered the residence of lofty Morrow Claan. He was already accustomed to this sort of extravagance, he saw it everyday at Rahu Clan. While proceeding towards the visitor’s hall, he was somewhat suspicious as to why Morrow Clan’s Patriarch had asked to see him, even inviting Jasmine and Domingle.

Could it be because of Ming Xiu?

Thinking of this, Luo Tian seemed to have felt it was somewhat strange. When he was at Pipa clan, after he won the group of children releasing five coloured light and was returning, Jasmine and Domingle had intercepted him before long to forcibly take the group of children. Only this Ming Xiu never appeared during the whole time.

This caused him to become suspicious as to whether Ming Xiu had already changed his character, stopped imitating dogs and stealing chickens.

The more he thought, the more he felt some happened with Ming Xiu. Only if some accident has happened to the young master of Morrow Clan Ming Xiu, would the Patriarch of Morrow Clan have the courage to take out the patriarch token to order the three young masters to come to their residence.

Although there were four great clans in Asura City and each of them managed their respective territories, but when patriarch token is taken out, then regardless of which clan’s members they are, everyone would have to follow it.

Under ordinary circumstances when nothing happened, no one would take out the Patriarch token.

While thinking over these matters, Luo Tian entered the visitor’s hall. Only a few people were seated in the large visitor’s hall. On the main seat, a man with relatively handsome appearance and three heads was sitting, he was the Patriarch of Morrow Clan, Jiao Xiu. Two people were sitting straight and tall below his seat, Jasmine and Domingle. When Luo Tian looked at the two of them, a hint of anxiousness appeared on their face.

“Patriarch Jiao Xiu, why exactly did you ask me to rush over here?”

Luo Tian immediately began to talk.

But Jiao Xiu who was sitting on the main seat, remained expressionless with his both eyes like a blackhole which could devour anyone’s soul. After a long time, Jiao Xiu opened his mouth:

“I called you over to ask you something. When you were returning with those children, did you encounter my son Ming Xiu on the path.”

Sure enough, it was this matter.

Luo Tian directly stated the facts:

“After coming out of Pipa Clan, I directly rushed to the Asura City without stopping for rest. Patriarch Jiao Xiu should know about the competition between four young masters, thus entering Asura City has been considered as the ending of the mission as always. I only encountered Jasmine and Domingle on the path, as for Ming Xiu, I never saw him.”

“Yes, Patriarch Jiao Xiu, when I and Domingle left out the Pipa Clan, Ming Xiu was already there. Following which, we both planned and ambushed Luo Tian to snatch those children but lost in the end. After that, we all returned to Asura City on our own and never happened to see Ming Xiu on the path.”

“I can also guarantee that I never saw Ming Xiu.”

Jasmine and Domingle who were sitting on their seats, also hastily supplemented.

Jiao Xiu, sitting on the main seat, looked at the three young master below and suddenly his complexion turned pale. He slowly said:

“Ming Xiu is dead, the jade tile filled with his presence which he left behind, has already shattered.”

His words were like a stone thrown on the surface of a calm lake, creating great waves. Regardless of whether it was Jasmine or Domingle or the stubborn minded Luo Tian, a hint of anxiousness appeared on their faces. Ming Xiu had unexpectedly died in the territory of Lakshmi City and now the intention of Jiao Xiu for calling them, was that he suspected them to be the killers.

Domingle and Jasmine’s complexion became increasingly more solemn. According to reason, now that they had already been interrogated, so naturally they must be released. The statement of three of them were identical which was a sufficient prove that the three of them weren’t lying. But presently Jiao Xiu hadn’t released them, and also gave the news of Ming’s Xiu death clearly implying that there was another possibility involving the three of them.

He suspected that the three of them had allied to deal with Ming Xiu and thus maintained identical confessions.

The three young masters felt that the visitor’s hall had become somewhat chilly. If they couldn’t get out in time then they really might not be able to get out.

Ever since the four great clans were born, the competition between young masters of each clan was an ordinary matter. But every young master acted within the norms, even when competing with each other, they wouldn’t try to axe the other young masters. Ordinarily, they would stop after a little competition battle.

But presently, Ming Xiu was dead which was a major event. This matter was a great trouble.

“Patriarch Jiao Xiu fears that we three young masters have killed Ming Xiu. Although we four compete with each other, but we naturally understand our limits. How could we kill him?”

Domingle restrained the panic in his heart and said with fake calmness.

“His words are the truth. As the young masters of our clan, we definitely have complied with the rules. Moreover, we aren’t foolish enough to kill one of the other young masters at this time.”

“That’s right!”

The three young masters continued explaining, but Jiao Xiu still didn’t let them leave. In fact, there wasn’t even the slightest change in his complexion.

Jiao Xiu said with his face frosty and calm voice:

“If it had been ordinary times, I naturally would’ve believed that you three would comply with the established rules and wouldn’t attack another young master. But the situation is special right now. God father has returned to Asura City, moreover he has also prepared to annex Lakshmi City and begin the battle of gods. Whichever clan among the four makes the most contributions will become the leader. And our older generations have already become used to the present system, and wouldn’t try to change it casually.”

“The only exception are you youngsters. As the young masters of four great clans, if you made enough contributions then naturally you will be regarded as important by god father. Therefore, you three conspiring to murder Ming Xiu isn’t completely impossible. After all, one obstruction less would mean extra opportunities for you. Right?”

These words were like an enormous stone being dropped on the head of the three young masters, causing their complexion to change. It was just as Jiao Xiu said, presently the circumstances were special so it was possible that anyone among them could break the rules. And the underlying meaning in his words was clear, he considered the three of them as his murderer.

Suddenly Jasmine’s eyes shined, she suddenly thought of another person and informed Jiao Xiu:

“Patriarch Jiao Xiu, I think you are wrong. If we three young masters had killed Ming Xiu, why would we come here after seeing patriarch token, wouldn’t it be the same as courting death? You yourself said that rules can be broken, we could’ve returned to our respective clan’s territory after seeing your patriarch token. Although your distinguished self is a mighty god, but you also wouldn’t dare to casually enter our clan’s residence, right?”

“What’s more, the people fighting for the group of children of Pipa Clan didn’t include only us four young masters, a descendent of branch family of your clan was also present. You should ask him to come over for interrogation.”

Hearing these words, Domingle suddenly recalled Chen Xiu and said to Jiao Xiu:

“Yes, that branch family descendent is called Chen Xiu, seemingly the relation between him and Ming Xiu wasn’t good. By the time I reached the territory of Pipa Clan, the subordinates of the two of them had already clashed with each other and Ming Xiu’s subordinate was killed.”

When Jiao Xiu heard these words, vigour filled his eyes and he mumbled:

“Chen Xiu.”

Chapter 831 - Duo Ju’S Thoughts

Chapter 831: Duo Ju’s Thoughts

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

The colosseum looked like a hollow cylinder from outside with four entrances from all four directions.

Half of the lowest layer was the resting and waiting area of the combatants, while the other side was where the beasts were kept. Each cage had a sliding iron door which opened directly into the fighting arena.

The first level of the hollow cylinder was the same, but the second and third levels were for the spectators. The common people who wanted to see battles in the arena would enter the second level to find a seat, while the majority of direct disciples of the four great clans sat in the third level and had a high raised platform. It provided them with the most clear sight of the fighting arena.

Some seats were especially reserved for the young masters and clan patriarchs as well as elders of the four great clans. Even if the other direct descendants wanted to sit there, they did not have the guts to do so.

At that moment a middle-aged man wearing luxurious clothes was walking up the platform. Two thick and solid arms sprouted out from his shoulders, and his arms were filled densely-packed eyes.

He was the manager of the colosseum, Duo Ju.

The colosseum was the business that belonged to the four great clans, and its manager changed every five years. The person for manager position was chosen by the four great clans in rotation. Duo Ju was assigned as a subordinate of Doro Clan.

After taking the post, he had planned to use the opportunity to serve the four young masters and make himself familiar with them, so that he could obtain the chance to achieve meteoric success in the future.

But before a long time had passed since he took office, god father descended into the mortal world to rest and recuperate and issued his two mission. After the four young masters obtained them, they gathered subordinates in the city and left toward Lakshmi City.

Duo Ju had been hoping that once the young masters returned, they would visit the colosseum, so he had been preparing for their visit. Yet once the battle concluded, the three young masters who had sat on the high platform were nowhere to be seen.

Duo Ju looked all around but didn’t discover any traces of the three young masters, so he waved his hand at a maid standing on the high platform and asked, “Where are the young masters?”

“The three young masters left, lord manager,” the maid replied honestly.

Already left?

Duo Ju waved his hand again, indicating for the maid to withdraw. While standing on the high platform, he looked at the excited and lively crowd underneath and mumbled to himself, “Could the three young masters have grown tired of watching this program?

“Or have they left to attend to some matters? I can’t understand. It hasn’t been long since they came, but they have already left.”

The three young masters had made a trip after a long time, so he wanted to use the great opportunity to get acquainted with them and properly serve upon them so that after his term as the manager of the colosseum concluded, he could become a subordinate of young master Domingle.

But what a pity… Duo Ju sighed and looked at the battle underneath with his thoughts wandering all around.

Li Yunmu arrived at the lowest level of the colosseum, which was the rest and recuperation lounge for combatants, with Brunhilda expressionlessly following behind him. The two young masters floated after them in mid-air.

In the lounge, the combatants were laughing and playing with each other. Only some of the newcomer combatants were sitting in the corner, with nervousness clear on their faces. Those who became combatants in the colosseum weren’t from the four great clans, but had all come from the lower city region. In order to survive, they could only mentally ready themselves to lose their lives and become combatants.

Some of the powerful victors were also present there. They had come with the extra aim of obtaining the recognition of the direct descendants of the clans, besides just earning money. If the direct descendants looked upon them favourably, they could shed the status of lower city region’s poor and would become the servants of the four great clans.

When Li Yunmu and Brunhilda entered, the entire lounge turned silent. All the combatants began to carefully size up the two of them. The powerful combatants sitting in the front row straightened their waists while staring at Li Yunmu. Everyone thought that the two of them were direct descendants of the four great clans who had come to pick servants.

After a moment of silence, a muscular man sitting in the first row stood up and respectfully said to Li Yunmu, “Lord, have you come to choose servants? I have fought in tens of matches and have always won. Perhaps you can…”

The moment he finished speaking, a lean youth stood up from the first row with countless cracks on his arms which were apparently eyes which did not open.

“Old bastard, step down. Regardless of how many you win, everything is because of brute strength. Those beasts are comparable to you in strength, so you naturally won. But in terms of strength, can you compare to the branch family descendants of the four great clans? Lord is definitely here to choose someone intelligent.”

When the muscular man looked at the youth, he grew indignant and loudly said, “My great strength is naturally an ability. Unlike you rat, who doesn’t have strength and can only rely on some schemes again and again.”

The rat laughed but did not retort. He turned to look at Li Yunmu and said to curry favor, “What sort of character is lord? If he lacks powerful people, he could easily find them. It’s easy to find a fighter but hard to find a strategist, do you understand?”

Li Yunmu looked at the old bastard and rat throwing barbs at each other with interest. Both of them were soon tired of quarreling, however, and turned toward him, apparently waiting for him to say something.

“You both seem to misunderstand. I am not here to select servants, but rather to bring people to participate in the colosseum competition. You two are quite interesting though. It looks like the bloodline of the four great clans in your blood didn’t awaken and so you were thrown into the lower city,” Li Yunmu said with a smile.

Once the old bastard and rat heard those words, their expressions darkened and they nodded indicating agreement.

“Since this is the case, then you both want to return to the four great clans, right?” Li Yunmu enquire.

The four great clans were like nobility in Asura City. Every poor person wanted to shed the identity of the resident of lower city and enter the four great clans as branch family descendants or perhaps as a servant.

The two men nodded, revealing a hint of zealotry in their eyes. Why were they staking their lives in the colosseum? Wasn’t it to attract the attention of the descendants of the four great clans sitting on the platform?

“That’s good. I have a task for you two. If you complete it successfully, I will recruit you as my subordinates.”

After saying that, Li Yunmu waved his hand, which slowly pulled Jasmine and Domingle hovering the air in front of everyone. When the people present at the scene saw Jasmine and Domingle’s appearances, they were startled, especially the old bastard and rat who had nodded moments earlier. They froze in place.

As long as any combatant wanted to become the servant of the four great clans, they would definitely remember the appearance of the majority of direct descendants as well as the young masters. And the two people floating in front of the crowd were certainly two of the young masters.

The entire lounge turned silent. None of the combatants sitting in the lounge made any sound, and some of them even lowered their heads, pretending that they saw nothing.

Rat’s body shuddered and he stammered out, “Lord, the task you said is?”

chapters.title: Chapter 841 - Killing Intent Rises
chapters.body:
Chapter 841 - Killing Intent Rises

Chapter 841: Killing Intent Rises

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

A golden light blossomed from the hands of Rahu Clan’s patriarch, and the projection of a giant which could support both heaven and earth appeared behind him. The projection extended its hands at the same rate as the patriarch and a powerful and firm presence filled the colosseum.

The devil beasts underneath sensed it and knelt on the ground one after another. When the descendants in the spectator stand took note of it, the image of a giant splitting heavens and earth covered their vision.

The attack arrived before the patriarch himself.

Li Yunmu looked at the flying patriarch of Rahu Clan and a similar image appeared in his eyes. Within it, he transformed into the heaven and earth which were about to be destroyed under the chop of the giant’s hand. The next instant, however, he snapped back to reality and looked at the patriarch of Rahu Clan closing in on him with his heart filled with vigilance.

Sure enough, there was a large disparity between different gods.

When the four great elders arrived, although only the elder from Rahu Clan had attacked, his attack only relied on brute force. Yet the patriarch of Rahu Clan had only used his two hands and unleashed such a mystical technique. Before his punch even hit, the seed of definite loss would already take roots in the heart of the enemy.

After he merged with the projection behind his body, the patriarch of Rahu Clan would have enough strength to even kill a god.

“Old bastard, you really can do it,” Li Yunmu mumbled. After understanding that he was the target of the mystical technique used by Rahu Clan’s patriarch, he was sure that the enemy wanted to kill him there.

Instantly, the Rahu Clan’s patriarch merged with the projection. In a moment, his entire body began to glitter with bright light, like he was a golden image of a god. His hands passed through space, covering the distance between him and Li Yunmu, and the image of transparent punches containing a hint of gold appeared in the sky.

Li Yunmu wasn’t the least bit flustered by those punches and revealed a charming smile. His body turned into a blur to evade them and stopped in the air to the left. He used his hands to form a sign in front of his chest, and the surrounding energy of the world quickly flew toward him as if it was being summoned.

Once the natural energy gathered, it was in the form of smoke, then it quickly congealed into a round shape and leapt into Li Yunmu’s hands. He threw the compacted world energy which had a spherical shape, and it instantly ruptured, turning into countless rays of small swords. They filled the entire sky and flew in all directions without obvious target.

“Go!”

With one command, the countless sword rays flew at the four patriarchs like charging soldiers.

When the Rahu Clan’s patriarch saw the speed at which Li Yunmu dodged, a hint of astonishment appeared in his eyes. Chen Xiu had become a god just recently and it was due god father using a large amount of power of belief to raise his cultivation. This type of advancement was simply too hasty. Although his cultivation advanced, his soul should not have been strong enough to wield it.

It should have been especially so for someone like Chen Xiu who had become a god all of a sudden. His soul strength should have remained at the level of his original cultivation. This means that although he possessed the strength of a god, the strength of his soul was equivalent to that of an initial stage sage flux expert.

The mystical technique which Rahu Clan’s patriarch had used first sowed the seed of certain loss in the heart of the enemy. Then, when his attack reached, the enemy would already be under the control of his trick.

If this mystical technique was used in front of the other three patriarchs whose strength was not far from him, it would naturally not be too effective. But when dealing with someone like Chen Xiu who had recently become a god, it should have been enough to get rid of him.

But the reality was that Li Yunmu was not influenced by the mystical technique and turned into a blur to easily evade it.

“God father has certainly bestowed him with a cultivation method,” the patriarch of Rahu Clan mumbled with a hint of killing intent in his eyes.

The people of Asura City attached a lot of importance to their bloodline, and their fighting skills and techniques were based on the ability of their bloodline. Because of this malpractice, although the strength of Asura City’s people was very formidable, there wasn’t much variation in their skills, which allowed their enemies to easily discover a flaw in their techniques.

Previously, Asura had discussed with the other six ancient gods this problem and had created divine techniques for his people by fusing the divine techniques of the other six gods. Afterwards, he bestowed them to the four great clans. Those divine techniques were considered as supreme treasures by the four great clans and unless one was a direct descendant, they could not inherit them.

The branch family descendants could only cultivate the cultivation methods of the clan. So if Chen Xiu was not bestowed a cultivation method by god father, how could he unleash a divine technique?

Rahu Clan’s patriarch looked at the sword rays charging at them and waved his enormous hands outwards, transforming them into giant palms to crush the sword rays. The moment the two collided, that sword rays ruptured.

At the center of Rahu Clan’s patriarch’s palms, minor wounds appeared. He looked at them healing slowly, and his mind wandered. The technique Chen Xiu unleashed with the cultivation of an initial stage god was capable of injuring four late stage gods, so how formidable was it?

In the sky, the other patriarchs looked at the sword rays in disdain and used their physical bodies to resist them. All three of them withstood them, but small wounds littered their bodies.

“You four great clans want to rebel! You actually dare to attack an ancestor! I will report this matter to god father!”

Li Yunmu looked at the four clan patriarchs who were incredibly astonished and a smile appeared on his face.

The patriarchs of the four great clans glanced at each other, and it was enough for them to agree on a plan. Previously, in the great hall of Morrow Clan, Jiao Xiu had called the other three clan patriarchs for a secret meeting to tell them about the information provided by the city lord. It was about how he had been concealing power of belief stolen over many years instead of using it to raise his cultivation to ancient god realm.

The ancestors of the four great clans had used their share of power of belief to raise their cultivation from peak god to ancient god, so when Asura descended from the divine palace, only the clan patriarchs of the four great clans and the city lord had come to greet him. The four ancestors pretended to be in seclusion and did not go out to meet him.

Why?

Because the four ancestors had already used the stolen power of belief to become ancient gods. The moment they appeared, god father would sense them.

If the four ancestors joined hands to attack god father, they could naturally do it, but god father had existed for a very long time. He had obtained an indescribable amount of power of belief and possessed an unknown level of strength.

Due to that, the four ancestors did not dare to be certain of their victory and continued hiding. They did not show up for anything at all.

In the meeting among the clan patriarchs, Jiao Xiu spoke about the apprehensions of the city lord. After all, a branch family descendant has been rewarded by god father. He was turned into a god and even became god father’s adopted son. And if that was not enough, he was even bestowed with a divine technique.

All those things clearly illustrated that god father had sensed something and wanted to support the creation of a new power in Asura City.

If Chen Xiu did not die, the stealing of power of belief by the four great clans would be exposed sooner or later.

At the instant the eyes of the four patriarchs met, they clearly understood what the other was thinking. Chen Xiu could not leave this colosseum alive.

Jiao Xiu sighed, somewhat hesitant in his heart over whether going against god father so openly was good or bad. But at that moment, he could not be bothered to think much. His body shuddered, and another him appeared behind him.

The matriarch of Deva Clan smiled at Li Yunmu. Her smile was filled with the sound of little bells and her impressive figure turning and posing. With the entire world as an arena, she left an afterimage with each step.

A gloomy smile appeared on the face of patriarch of Doro Clan. He extended his six arms to produce seals that would unleash his divine technique.

chapters.title: Chapter 842 - God Father Intervenes
chapters.body:
Chapter 842 - God Father Intervenes

Chapter 842: God Father Intervenes

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

The patriarch of Rahu Clan looked at Li Yunmu, but did not join the other three patriarchs to attack him. Three clan patriarchs were already sufficient to deal with Chen Xiu who was an initial stage god. He was only responsible for finishing and beheading Chen Xiu in close quarters battle.

Li Yunmu’s expression did not change, and the patriarch of Rahu Clan coldly laughed before flying down at the arena. In a breath’s time, he was already standing by the side of the three young masters and saw that none of the previous arrogance remained in their gazes. They were too numb for anything right then.

“Lord father, you finally came. If you hadn’t come, your treasured son would’ve been killed here. If you were the slightest bit slower, I would’ve died here.”

Luo Tian looked at Rahu Clan’s patriarch with apathy in his eyes. There was almost no life in him. He only managed to reply in a quivering voice because of his fear for death.

Neither he nor the other young masters were afraid of their cultivation being sealed, and the wounds from the beasts that they got during battle did not ache. Only Chen Xiu’s insistence on getting them killed in the colosseum terrified them.

The three young masters who had been pampered from childhood never thought that they could die. All of them had thought that regardless of however the situation changed in the future, the position of clan patriarch would be theirs.

Domingle’s pale and originally tensed complexion also collapsed after hearing Luo Tian’s words, and all twelves eyes on his six hands began to shed tears. The luxurious dress on Jasmine’s body was in tatters, revealing her white skin as well as some places which were infected by poison. She seemed to be a completely different person and could not even weep.

“Each and every one of you is useless. You, the young masters of four great clans, have become like this after going through a little bit of hardship. You must recall your identities and act accordingly in front of me.

“This time’s accident can be considered as a lesson about the importance of strength. After losing the fight over obtaining Ancient God Lakshmi’s soul, your cultivation had sill stayed at the ninth level of great flux expert realm.”

The patriarch of Rahu Clan revealed disappointment for the three young masters being unable to meet his expectations and spoke in a heavy tone.

The three young masters heard him clear and well, but did not dare to retort. They did not take his words to heart either, however. If anyone else had been in their place, the result would still be the same. If the opponent was ordinary, they wouldn’t have fallen to such desperate straits, but in front of a god, how could three nine level great flux experts resist? Even if they were sage flux experts, they still wouldn’t have been able to resist.

The expressions of the three recovered to normal, and three strands of divine energy left the hand of Rahu Clan’s patriarch to unseal their cultivation. In an instant, their cultivation base recovered, and a sense of security returned to the hearts of the three young masters.

After that, the patriarch of Rahu Clan turned toward the four great elders who were kneeling on the ground and coldly snorted before unsealing their cultivation too.

Four divine presences erupted, and each and every one of the devil beasts kneeling on the ground began to shiver.

“A group of bastards,” the patriarch of Rahu Clan said, and his hand enlarged to press on the arena. Dust flew everywhere, and the entire colosseum filled with miserable wails and random patches of blood.

After killing the thirty beasts with one fist, the patriarch of Rahu Clan turned his gaze toward the battle in the sky. The three late stage god patriarchs were filled with killing intent, and each of them used their most powerful abilities to attack Chen Xiu. In just a moment, the sky filled with all sorts of lights, which looked extremely beautiful.

Under the radiance, a line of blood flowed out of the corner of Li Yunmu’s mouth. His clothes were completely destroyed, revealing multiple wounds on his naked skin. The three clan patriarchs attacked him again, but he used the wind under his feet to unleash Heavenly Insect Step and immediately transformed into a blur, completely disappearing and then appearing at another position.

“He can still run around,” the patriarch of Rahu Clan mumbled. He stamped his left foot on the ground and soared upwards, transforming into a blur that rushed toward Li Yunmu.

In just a few breaths, the patriarch of Rahu Clan appeared in front of Li Yunmu with a cold smile on his face and began to fight with him. The punch from his enormous fist charged at Li Yunmu so fast that the people underneath could only see an afterimage. Li Yunmu constantly retreated under the attacks, which made it clear that he was the weaker side.

The four patriarchs wanted to kill him, so Asura in the city lord’s mansion had to come quickly. After all, it the fight was allowed to continue any longer, he would not be able to preserve his disguise. Under the attack of four late stage gods, an initial stage god like him could resist for a while but had to chance to escape alive.

Relying on his Heavenly Insect Step, Li Yunmu constantly dodged the attacks of Rahu Clan’s patriarch and continuously averted disasters. The three clan patriarchs standing on the side watched it with a frown.

Jiao Xiu looked in the direction of the upper city with a restless feeling. He then turned to the other two clan patriarchs and said, “We don’t have much time. We should attack together and kill him. Only victory is permitted here.”

After hearing his words, the other clan patriarchs used their most formidable techniques to attack Li Yunmu and their divine energy to restrict the space in which he could move.

The descendants sitting in the spectator stand watched the battle in the sky with envy on their faces. The fights between gods showed off great power and countless divine techniques. In their hearts, becoming a god was the final point of their cultivation.

Among those people, however, there was a group of branch family descendants with a strange expression on their face. On some faces, it has disappointment mixed in within it.

Although the branch family descendants were deeply afraid of Li Yunmu, but after all was said and done, Chen Xiu was also a minor branch family descendant previously. His sudden rise brought hope to them. If they really had some ability, their position or bloodline might not be a problem.

Yet right then, Chen Xiu’s death was almost certain under the joint attack of the patriarch of four great clans, and with that, his legend would disappear. Because of that, the hope rising in the hearts of branch family descendants began to collapse.

The four patriarchs attacked with their full strength.

They used a large amount of divine energy to unleash a formidable divine technique to imprison Li Yunmu in a small space. It turned the situation hopeless. If Li Yunmu did not reveal his true strength, he would die under the assault of the four great clan patriarchs.

The branch family descendants clenched their fists, feeling extremely nervous for that last bit of hope in their heart.

Not everyone was like that though. Excitement was on the faces of the three young masters and four great elders in the colosseum. All of them wished that they could kill Chen Xiu themselves. Only when he died would the shadow in their heart disappear.

Just when a multicolored divine technique was about to hit Li Yunmu’s body, the entire space became extremely heavy as if it was a marsh. All the living creatures slowed down, and even the divine technique which was about to hit Li Yunmu became extremely slow, proceeding at a snail’s pace.

Upon seeing that, Li Yunmu heaved a sigh of relief. Asura finally intervened.

Suspicion appeared on the faces of descendants as well as the three young masters in the battle stage. They did not know what exactly was happening.

In the sky, the four clan patriarchs sensed the change in space and sighed faintly.

Given that they had become gods a long time ago, they clearly understood that the change meant that god father has taken action. Sure enough, god father was thinking the same as them and wanted to deal with the four ancestors and even the four great clans. His intervention signified that he was watching the transformation of Asura City.

chapters.title: Chapter 843 - Private Discussion
chapters.body:
Chapter 843 - Private Discussion

Chapter 843: Private Discussion

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

The denseness made it feel like the gravity had been increased countless times and like even time had slowed down. A figure appeared in front of the four patriarchs in space, waved its hand, and the four patriarchs were thrown down into the arena like kites whose strings were cut.

One after another, four figures crashed into the ground with a loud noise like bullets.

Immediately after that, the figure moved his hand, and the divine techniques advancing toward Li Yunmu disappeared as if they had never existed. After that, the entire place recovered its original appearance and the audience no longer felt powerless as if they were caught in a marsh.

Under the bright sunshine, the figure became clear. It had three heads and six arms, wore a white gown, and had delicate skin like a twenty year old.

Li Yunmu looked at him and slightly bent down in the air, “I pay my respects to god father.”

When the descendants in the spectator stand saw Asura, excitement immediately appeared on their faces. They immediately stood up from their chairs and knelt on the ground with their foreheads directly touching the ground. A bright and clear noise resounded in the entire colosseum.

“Paying respects to god father!”

In the arena, fear appeared on the faces of the three young masters and four great elders who also knelt down to pay their respects. The four clan patriarchs crawled out of the pit with pale faces and also paid their respects with a line of blood coming out of the corner of their mouth.

Asura expressionlessly looked at the four great elders and softly said, “All of you, rise.”

Li Yunmu stood up and spat out a mouthful of blood with few coughs and a pale complexion. The descendants in the spectator stand stood up straight and excitedly looked at Asura. The direct and branch family descendants of the four great clans had only seen the golden idol of Asura during the ceremonies in their clans. As for the person himself, they had never seen him.

Upon seeing the Asura Clan’s ancestor, they were naturally very excited.

The expressions of the three young masters and four elders, however, turned unsightly, and they began to panic. It was especially so for the four clan patriarchs. They hadn’t expected such a turn of events in the least. Why would god father rescue Chen Xiu in such a timely fashion? It was as if god father had been paying attention to the situation in the colosseum since the start.

In their estimations, Chen Xiu should have died in another breath’s time.

But the change in the situation was also good, since it showed that god father valued Chen Xiu a lot more than he should. The four elders understood the meaning behind it clearly in their heart.

Soon, they would have to receive punishment for attacking an ancestor. If Chen Xiu had died just a moment ago, then even if god father was furious, he would not dare to do anything in front of the four ancient god ancestors.

Chen Xiu had not died, however, so the four great elders would receive punishment, but they were unwilling and unresigned toward it.

“Ashchen, come see me at the city lord’s mansion.”

But the scenario the clan patriarchs imagined did not happen. Asura did not pay any attention to them and just looked around the colosseum once before his figure disappeared from the sky.

Li Yunmu glanced at the four patriarchs in the colosseum, then turned around and flew toward Brunhilda.

“I will go to city lord’s mansion, you go find rat and old bastard and wait for me in the room in the four-story building,” he told her in a whisper.

Brunhilda nodded, but her eyebrows creased, revealing a hint of hesitation. “Be extremely careful. If Asura discovers something, attack him even if it means revealing your identity. I will sense your presence and immediately join you.”

Li Yunmu nodded, then soared into the sky and flew toward the upper city.

All the disciples in the spectator stand looked at each other, not understanding the situation. The branch family descendants heaved a sigh of relief, then rushed out of colosseum in high spirits.

The three young masters and four great elders on the stage also heaved sighs of relief. When Asura had appeared just a moment ago, they felt truly afraid that they would receive the punishment.

There were also a few people worried in the arena. They were the four clan patriarchs. Asura had left without saying anything after rescuing Chen Xiu.

There was no condemnation or punishment, which was a complete change in attitude from what everyone expected. It made the patriarchs of the four clans hesitate. If it was said that Asura attacking to subdue the four of them just then was the whole of their punishment, none of them would believe it.

“What should we do now?” Rahu Clan’s patriarch asked with suspicion in his voice.

Jiao Xiu frowned, then snorted coldly and looked at the other three patriarchs. “What can we do other than hurrying to find our clan ancestors for guidance. If god father really wants to attack our four great clans, we cannot sit still and wait.”

After the conversation, the four clan patriarchs turned into a blur and soared into the sky, quickly flying toward their respective clans.

Li Yunmu walked toward the city lord’s mansion at a slow pace. The large gate which was usually shut tightly was wide open right then.

Two rows of maids were kneeling orderly on the ground and said in unison, “Paying respects to ancestor.”

“En, get up.”

Li Yunmu waved his hand and entered the mansion.

Although he had never come to the mansion before, he could sense the source of the most powerful presence in the mansion and knew where Asura was. He walked there and entered a small room on the second floor. Once inside, he saw Ashbi kneeling on the ground with his body slightly shuddering. Asura was lazily lying on his leather chair while holding a glass of wine in his hand.

The wine glass contained spirit wine and emitted a sweet fragrance which filled the entire room.

“I pay my respects to god father!”

Li Yunmu walked to Ashbi’s side and gave a customary salute.

“En.”

While sitting on his leather chair, Asura replied in one word. His four arms above the shoulder were holding his hair and interweaving groups of them into a small braid. After a moment, the scattered long hair was arranged into a perfect braid.

When Li Yunmu took note of it, the feeling given off by Asura once he changed his hairstyle became different. His whole entire presence seemed to transform.

Previously, his long hair were only tied with a golden ring, which made Asura look like a direct descendants of the four great clans. He was beautiful with a hint of languidness. But after he changed his hairstyle… Despite wearing the same silk cloth, a sort of vicious temperament was added to him.

“I am not very happy about today’s matter!”

Asura looked at Li Yunmu with his mirror-like eyes.

Li Yunmu inwardly mused that if Asura was truly not happy, he would not have taken action. The events at the colosseum allowed Li Yunmu to guess Asura’s thoughts.

The only thing Asura was still in the dark about right then was whether the ancestors of the four great clans had become ancient gods or not. If he knew, he probably would have taken action a long ago.

Li Yunmu looked at Asura with a calm expression and replied without any nervousness. “God father, I wasn’t in the wrong in today’s matter.”

“Oh? With the great war about to happen in the near future, the four great clans of Asura City have been thrown in a mess by you. But you still think you aren’t in the wrong? Today, if I hadn’t rushed over to the colosseum on time, you would’ve been dead with your soul scattered.”

Asura’s tone was completely calm, without any hint of anger or discontent.

Li Yunmu stood completely straight and said with a hint of a smile on his face, “The matter in the colosseum happened solely because the three young masters insisted on provoking me. As the ancestor of Asura City, I naturally couldn’t let such a humiliation go unpunished.”
