chapters.title: Chapter 845 - Four Ancient Gods
chapters.body:
Chapter 845 - Four Ancient Gods

Chapter 845: Four Ancient Gods

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

After Jiao Xiu returned from the colosseum, he went through the main hall’s gate.

After entering, he closed the large gate and walked to the chair at the main seat. He sat down on it and pressed a deeply concealed push button under the chair. Instantly, a hole appeared under the main seat and Jiao Xiu began to fall down with the chair.

He fell through a passage that seemed endless. Only after a long time had passed did a bright light come from underneath and the chair smashed into pieces. Jiao Xiu slowly floated down after it. The place which he had reached was a completely sealed cave. At the top of it, countless night pearls were embedded.

A gate created from black metal was in front of Jiao Xiu. There were two small peacock lamps in front of it.

The cave, which was the destination of the secret pathway through the main hall, was the region where the ancestor of Morrow Clan was in seclusion. Only sufficient distance and the large door created from black metal could obstruct the ancient god presence from emitting out.

Jiao Xiu half knelt on the ground and said to the closed large door, “Ancestor, god father has sensed something!”

There was no reply from behind the large door at first. After a moment though, the thick black metal door opened, and a presence which was much more formidable than that of a god erupted.

“Come in,” an aged voice called out.

Jiao Xiu stood up and went through the large door. After entering, he saw another, smaller cave. The inside of it was illuminated by night pearls like the outside. There was only a stone bed in the cave and a petite man lying on it. He wore a sackcloth and looked very ordinary.

When he heard the sound of footsteps, he stood up from the stone bed, revealing his delicate face and white skin like that of an eighteen or nineteen year old. He seemed to be in his youth, his appearance only slightly different from that of Asura.

“Speak, what has god father discovered?”

A voice, inconsistent with his age, spoke from the youth’s mouth. It belonged to an old man who had seen all aspects of life and society.

Jiao Xiu glanced at the ancestor sitting on the stone bed and sensed the ancient god presence emitted from his body that had become even more powerful. It brought a sense of security appeared, and he narrated things as they stood.

“A branch family descendant from my clan was adopted as the sixth son by godfather. He raised that branch family descendant’s cultivation to that of a god and later when I went to city lord’s mansion to enquire with Lord Ashbi, lord told me…”

“Told you what?” the Morrow Clan’s ancestor asked with a frown when Jiao Xiu stopped speaking.

“He told me that the reason why god father raised the cultivation of that branch family descendant and bestowed the position of ancestor to him is to keep our four clans in check. Lord Ashbi also said that god father has only done this because he is resentful about the matter of stolen power of belief. He did this to show the four great clans that anything he has given, he can take it back.”

After Jiao Xiu finished speaking, he saw that the ancestor was frowning, and felt somewhat panicked in his heart. But he could not understand why the four ancestors were afraid of god father. After all, they had already become ancient gods by relying on the stolen power of belief. Regardless of how formidable god father was, he was still an ancient god. Given their higher numbers, they should be able to make god father fear them.

Then why did the four ancestors go into hiding when god father descended and refused to come out?

Morrow Clan’s ancestor sunk into deep contemplation, then asked, “Anything else happened?”

“Yes.” Jiao Xiu took a deep breath and nervousness appeared on his face. “That sixth ancestor sealed the cultivations of three young masters and four great elders before throwing them into the colosseum as fighters. He even used his divine energy to raise the cultivation of the vicious beasts to devil beasts to kill them.Because of that, we were forced to attack that sixth ancestor with an intent to kill. But unfortunately, at the last moment…”

“At the last moment, god father appeared, right?”

Without waiting for Jiao Xiu to finish, Morrow Clan’s ancestor opened his mouth. After saying that, he suddenly smiled and turned the topic to Chen Xiu, “Sixth brother recognized by god father is very clever, his methods and schemes are extremely profound.”

When Jiao Xiu saw that ancestor did not blame them, he heaved a sigh of relief inwardly. Then he immediately asked a question which had been bugging him from the start, “Ancestor, since god father has already sensed what’s happened, why don’t our four great clans launch a joint counter attack? If the four ancestors join hands, god father will certainly have to fear us.”

“Join hands?” Morrow Clan’s ancestor mumbled. “If we could’ve dealt with god father by joining hands, then we would’ve done so long ago and wouln’t have to hide underground, passing our days without seeing sunlight. The instant god father descended, we sensed that we aren’t his opponent. We thought that god father hadn’t sensed us, but alas…” Morrow Clan’s ancestor explained with a smile.

He then formed a semi circle in the air with his hand, and a pure white pearl appeared above it. The instant it appeared, Jiao Xiu sensed that it was power of belief. When he realized that, he took a deep breath and a fire appeared in his eyes.

Every living creature generated power of belief. After a large amount of it was gathered, it would take the form of strands. After those strands of power of belief were gathered, they would solidify into a ball of light. Usually the four clans would receive power of belief in terms of balls of light from the city lord’s mansion.

It was the most standard type of power of belief.

The power of belief in ancestor’s hand had already taken the shape of a pearl, which meant that countless balls of power of belief were gathered within it. Jiao Xiu did not know how much would one be able to rise in strength after using it.

Jiao Xiu snapped back to reality soon, and his complexion turned pale. He anxiously said, “You cannot, ancestor. Once this power of belief enters your body, I fear that god father will immediately sense it.”

“He has sensed me long ago. If he hadn’t, he wouldn’t have adopted a branch family descendant as a sixth brother. If I don’t absorb it now, then what’s the use of this power of belief?”

The ancestor of Morrow Clan swallowed the power of belief. The next instant, a faint light spread out from his abdomen, and soon, his whole body was surrounded by the power of belief. The presence of an ancient god erupted from his body and smashed open the black metal gate which was capable of hiding presence.

The ancient god presence gradually began to boil like a pot of water on the stove.

When Morrow Clan’s ancestor began to refine the power of belief condensed into a pearl, the unstable ancient god presence instantly erupted forth and smashed through the stone wall above him, going all the way up to the mansion. All the elders and descendants of the Morrow Clan saw it, and excitement appeared on their faces.

All of Asura City could sense that ancient god presence.

A moment later, similar ancient god presences soared into the heavens from the other three clans. They were all open and without restraint. When Ashbi kneeling in the city lord’s mansion sensed that ancient god presence, his expression turned ugly, and he fell on the ground paralyzed.

“What’s the benefit of declaring war on god father? It is certain death. You four, you are just courting death.”

Outside the Morrow Clan, Asura wearing a white gown raised his head and looked at the sky. He smiled after sensing the wild presences.

“Couldn’t wait to revolt?”

chapters.title: Chapter 846 - Everyone’S Thoughts
chapters.body:
Chapter 846 - Everyone’S Thoughts

Chapter 846: Everyone’s Thoughts

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

In the Morrow Clan, the descendants woke up from their cultivation after sensing the ancient god presence and walked out of their rooms while looking at the sky above the clan residence. After that, they formed a circle and began to discuss it.

“Our Morrow Clan also has an ancient god?”

“It is definitely lord ancestor. Only lord ancestor was a peak level god. Since he has become an ancient god, it has to be said that our Morrow Clan has gained an advantage over the other clans. The other three clans will be slightly suppressed by us.”

“Now that the ancestor has become an ancient god, he will be following in god father’s footsteps. Asura clan will have two ancestors, and the division of power of belief will also change. Perhaps Morrow Clan will be able to obtain even more power of belief, and the number of gods in our clan will also increase.”

One after another, the descendants commented on what they saw until their cheeks became slightly red from the excitement.

While they were talking, another three ancient god presences erupted from the other three clans. Upon noticing them, he descendants, who were all smiling, were startled and stayed rooted to the spot for a long time. Despite how much time went by, however, they could still sense the existence of three other presences, and astonishment appeared on their faces.

“Four-four ancient gods. My god, Asura Clan’s four ancestors have become ancient gods, which leaves only city lord Ashbi behind. If he also becomes an ancient god, then god father’s five sons will all be ancient gods. Asura Clan will have six ancient gods, so won’t the entire Lanlou’s power of belief will belong to our Asura City?!”

Once those words were spoken, the expressions of the descendants changed one after another, and excitement appeared on their faces.

If all of Lanlou’s power of belief was obtained by Asura City, then even branch family descendants would obtain enough power of belief to become gods.

All the descendants gathered in one corner of Morrow Clan. After sensing the four ancient god presences, they began to dream about the power of belief which they would obtain in the future.

In another place, however, in a room in the depths of the clan residence, god presences erupted one after another after sensing the ancient god presence, and many sighs echoed in the darkness.

“Ancestor has done it in the end.”

“Is it really a good idea to fight against god father? He created the whole of Asura race, and all the ancestors are his sons. Rebelling so openly… If their strengths are equally matched, then it is good. But if the ancestors aren’t his enemy…”

“Since ancestor has already done it, we naturally will stand behind gun. With the great war in sight, perhaps god father will be excited by the fact that the number of ancient gods under him has increased.”

The gods of Elder Council instantly divided into two factions and argued intensely.

Outside the Morrow Clan’s main gate, Li Yunmu looked at the four ancient presences souring into the sky without any expression. His heart was as clear as a mirror.

Asura had already attained the realm of quasi master god, so how could the four newly advanced ancient gods deal with him? The difference between their strength was like a gorge that couldn’t be crossed. They could not fight someone above their realm without any trump cards.

Moreover, not everyone had an opportunity like him and got to encounter the incarnate of True God, the system. And after Asura became a quasi master god, even Li Yunmu himself would have to consider whether to fight him or not. After all, his cultivation was stuck in god realm, even if he could fight against the master gods by using demonic energy.

If being completely honest, his strength was also comparable to that of a quasi master god, so he was evenly matched with Asura.

“Let’s go to see my third son, Ashmo.”

A slight smile appeared on Asura’ face, and he walked up the flight of stairs.

The tightly shut large gate was instantly opened by formidable divine presence. The guards sitting at the entrance stood up and looked at Li Yunmu and Asura and were instantly stunned. The next instant, they knelt down on the ground and respectfully said,””Greetings god father, ancestor.”

Asura nodded, then waved his hand to indicate for the guards to stand up and walked toward the main hall. On the path, they encountered several scattered descendants and attendants, all of whom knelt down on the ground to pay their greetings.

After the two of them left into the distance, the descendants slowly stood up and smiled widely.

“Sure enough, it was the ancestor who became an ancient god just now. So god father has come. It is the first time that god father has come to our Morrow Clan.”

“Seems like the division of power of belief is really going to change. After all, the Asura Clan will now have five ancient gods. I hadn’t expected that even we branch family descendants would be able to obtain power of belief.”

When Li Yunmu heard the discussions of the descendants, he gave an indescribable smile. Those young people were really naive; they really thought that their ancestor advancing to ancient god realm was a good thing. If Asura hadn’t discovered that some of the power of belief was missing, the four ancestors would not have revealed themselves.

The power of belief was extremely important, so how could Asura possibly divide it for lower status people?

Asura turned around to look at Li Yunmu and asked with a smile, “What are you laughing at?”

“I am laughing at those descendants full of impossible dreams. Now that the four elder brothers have openly revealed their ancient god presence in order to declare war upon your distinguished self, I fear that the days of the four great clans won’t be easy,” Li Yunmu said with a smile and a hint of excitement in his voice.

Fight, all of you keep fighting.

After they all used up their strength, he would be the one to obtain the benefits. He would be able to go to the divine palace and obtain the Heavenly Grand Ritual without much trouble, which was precisely his plan.

“The descendants naturally don’t think much and only feel that their ancestor advancing to ancient god is a good thing. Those in the Elder Council are somewhat different; they can think more. But their thinking also isn’t comprehension. Even my four sons are like that and don’t think much,” Asura said calmly.

“They can only blame themselves for being too hasty. Why did they attempt to do such a thing without full confidence? Who wouldn’t want to reach their level? They raised their head and looked at the divine palace and ancient god realm, but they didn’t take my strength in consideration and acted hastily. They are clearly my sons, but why don’t they show a little bit of intelligence?

“When master god was present, I concealed myself carefully and never displayed the slightest thought to exceed my position,” Asura said.

When Li Yunmu heard about that, he began to panic a bit. No wonder then that the True God had tried to ban the power of belief. It had both merits and demerits. It could increase one’s strength, but when all was said and done, the amount of power of belief was limited, so gods would naturally have to fight for it.

Progressing further in such an abnormal state was not the correct path.

The genuine correct path allowed the person of every realm to advance slowly and increase their strength step by step.

The intention of eradicating the power of belief became even stronger in Li Yunmu’s heart then. If he didn’t do so, the Origin World would remain stuck in the rut, which would turn out to be extremely dangerous in the future.

Even the system which was previously the True God had been forced to escape to the Origin World, so there clearly were even more dangerous things lurking outside.

If the strength of the Origin World did not change, then facing the enemy would be like throwing an egg on a rock. They would not have the slightest hope of victory. Only with changes could the world continue to survive and even more powerful people would appear within it.

Chapter 851 - The Decrees

Chapter 851: The Decrees

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

When Li Yunmu guaranteed their reward two times, rat’s heart filled with excitement. Sure enough, offending the three young masters and completing the mission had been an intelligent choice. When Li Yunmu had revealed his god level cultivation, he had considered that offending the three young masters might get his wishes fulfilled.

But rat, who had stayed in the colosseum for many years, was not certain that Li Yunmu would agree to what he wanted. Generally speaking, when an upper city descendant treated a fighter as important, they would bring him out of the lower city and into the clan residence in the upper city.

Apart from that, these descendants of the four clans would not provide any other rewards. After all, letting the fighters rise up from the lowest level was already an enormous reward.

But Li Yunmu allowed them to choose their own reward, and a wish which rat had thought would never be fulfilled rose to the forefront of his mind.

A hint of expectation appeared in his eyes and he nervously said, “Lord, I want the children of lower city to study cultivation, even if I have to sacrifice my contribution for it.”

When old bastard, who was kneeling beside him, heard his words, his expression changed, and he knocked his shoulder against rat.

“You are crazy! Lord, rat has spoken without thinking. I request that you don’t take offence,” he shouted out nervously.

“My words are correct. I want to use my contribution to exchange for the opportunity to allow the children of lower city to cultivate,” rat said resolutely with determined eyes.

Old bastard turned deathly pale as he looked at rat with anxiousness. He could not understand how rat, who was always so shrewd, could make such a request in front of a god. In Asura City, bloodline was everything. Those with pure bloodlines became direct descendants while those with impure bloodlines and mutated bodies became branch family descendants.

As for those who possessed impure bloodline and did not possess the different body structures were abandoned and thrown into the lower city. They did not have any relation with the four great clans.

Those who could become flux experts in Asura City and practice cultivation techniques were only the descendants of the four great clans. The residents of the lower city could not even think about it. Regardless of how much they contributed, the fighters could never raise such demands toward descendants.

If the residents of lower city started cultivating, then all the rules would be thrown into disorder.

When Li Yunmu heard rat’s request, he was greatly surprised. He hadn’t expected that such a shrewd person could raise this type request, which had the maximum possibility of being rejected, without any hesitation. He didn’t even care about sacrificing his contribution to say it.

Li Yunmu was rather interested in that and asked, “Oh, tell me, why do you have such a request?”

After hearing his question, rat felt that things may turn out well and became even more excited in his heart. Maybe a complete change which could turn the sky and earth upside down would happen in the lives of people of the lower city.

“Lord, all the people of the lower city come from the four great clans,” he said earnestly. “But because their bloodline is impure and they cannot grow the extra body parts, they are abandoned.

“But since I was born, I have never agreed to this rule. Why do those with impure bloodline and cannot sprout extra body parts are abandoned and cannot remain the descendants of the four great clans? Solely because of something not decided by us, we are the lowest level people in Asura City. We have to work hard every day to earn our living, and the only way to get out of this predicament is to obtain importance in the eyes of descendants of the upper city.

“Why can’t we have any other path? If the children of lower city could learn to cultivate, I believe that they wouldn’t be lacking compared to branch family descendants.”

Rat gave a large pile of explanations, and the more he spoke, the more excited he became. When old bastard kneeling on the side heard him, he began to panic in his heart. Such words were a complete breach of norms in Asura City. Any upper city descendant or god hearing it would feel furious.

After Li Yunmu heard it, he laughed loudly and forthrightly said, “Since you want the children of lower city to learn cultivation, then what about the adults? Your biased thinking isn’t good. I agree to your request. Not only the children of lower city, but even the adults shall also be able to learn martial skills.”

Adults will also be able to learn martial skills?

Old bastard suddenly raised his head and excitedly looked at Li Yunmu with astonishment all over his face. Rat was also extremely shocked. Before saying his request, he had already prepared himself to be rejected, but Li Yunmu had surprisingly agreed. Not only that, but he even chose to allow adults to learn martial skills as well.

Then wouldn’t the entire Asura City be thrown into chaos?

“Then lord, your distinguished self really agrees? If the majority of people of lower city are suddenly allowed to learn martial skills, the entire Asura City would be thrown into an upheaval” rat said softly with a hint of restlessness in his voice.

The reason why he wanted for the children of lower city to learn martial techniques was so they could defend themselves as well as obtain the opportunity to create a bright future for themselves.

If Li Yunmu agreed, then at least the fate of some people of lower city would be changed. However, it wouldn’t change the structure of Asura City and thus wouldn’t attract the attention of the four clans. But if all the adults of lower city would learn martial skills, like Li Yunmu said, then the lower city would not remain lower city for long.

“What, now you are afraid? Where did your determination from before go?. Since you want the people of lower city to change their fate, it shouldn’t be restricted to a small portion of them. The more people, the larger the transformation,” Li Yunmu said with a smile while taking a bite of the fruit in Brunhilda’s hand.

“I am afraid that the four great clans and city lord’s mansion will put pressure on your distinguished self.”

The excitement in rat’s heart disappeared and he began to feel anxious about the future.

“You don’t need to worry about that. Asura city’s structure has already been changed. If you have any problems, leave them to me…”

Just as Li Yunmu said that, he felt Ashbi’s divine presence erupt from the city lord’s mansion and envelope the entire Asura City.

Just as he became suspicious about the sudden eruption of divine presence from the city lord’s mansion, Ashbi’s solemn voice resounded through Asura City.

“The four ancestors rebelled against Asura City, so they were demoted to the position of ordinary residents and executed.”

The descendants of the four clans who were weeping bitterly were startled by those words, while sighs echoed from Elder Council one after another. Various thoughts jumped through everyone’s mind, but before any one of them could form, Ashbi’s voice echoed through the city once more.

“One of Morrow Clan’s branch descendants did a meritorious deed and was bestowed with god level cultivation base as well as the honor of becoming god father’s sixth son, an ancestor. From henceforth, City Lord Ashbi and SixthAncestor Chen Xiu will jointly manage Asura City.”

After saying that, Ashbi dissipated his divine presence, and Asura City sunk into silence.

In the main hall of Morrow Clan, Jiao Xiu who sat on the main seat had heard Ashbi’s two decrees, but he remained expressionless. Within a split second, the four clans ruling Asura City had been thrown out of the window, and in their place, a branch family descendant had risen.

What an irony.

“I want to see how much sand can a branch family descendant raise as he wields his authority in Asura City.”

Chapter 853 - Migration

Chapter 853: Migration

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Old bastard and rat hurriedly walked through the lower city’s gate and looked at the slum area whose edge could not be seen with a hint of excitement in their heart. When they walked forward, the children playing and shouting by the side of the street stopped. They recognized the two of them and excitedly ran over, surrounding them.

“Rat, old bastard, you finally returned. Since you returned alive, don’t go to the colosseum again, okay? I want you two to remain alive,” one of the children said emotionally.

The other children displayed approval of his words and began to pull old bastard and rat’s hands.

The only way out of Asura City’s slums was through the colosseum. They had to obtain the approval of descendants to shed the status of slum dwellers and become servants of the four clans. Every child of the slums understood this principle.

But only ambitious people would attempt it. The majority of people just hunted down beasts outside the city to survive.

In the eyes of the children, the people entering the colosseum only had two outcomes: They would either achieve meteoric success and become the servants of four great clans, or they would die. Because of that, when the kids saw old bastard and rat returning, they made all effort to dissuade the two of them from taking the risk again.

Rat touched the head of the child who had spoken first and said with a smile, “After coming back this time, not only will we return to the colosseum, we will take all the poor people there as well. There is an enormous opportunity for us there.”

“Yes, you all get ready,” old bastard said while picking up a child and hugging him.

The leader child was completely bewildered and could not say anything.

A few pale youths walked out of the slums and saw old bastard and rat. With a cheerful look, they walked over and asked, “You two returned from the colosseum?”

“Right, we came back to lead you all there. The city lord just announced two decrees, and you all must hear them. A branch family descendant has become the sixth ancestor and successfully took ownership of half of Asura City.

“To rule it, he wants to recruit his own power and said that the people from the slums can work as his subordinates. Everyone will also be allowed to learn martial skills,” rat said with a smile.

The group of youths was startled and suspiciously asked, “Really? Asura City’s lord wants useless people like us?”

“I have obtained the lord’s command to bring all the people of the slums to the colosseum. Lord said that from this moment on, Asura City will be divided into two parts. The region above the colosseum and upper city will be under Ashbi’s control, while our lord will control the region below the colosseum and lower city,” old bastard said while nodding.

After hearing the replies of the two men, the youths jumped up and rushed into the slums to inform others.

Ten people turned into a hundred, and a hundred into a thousand.

Before a long time passed, groups of slum dwellers packed their bags and filled the streets with cheerful expressions on their faces while speaking among themselves in whispers. Old bastard and rat walked in the front while carrying a few children.

They majestically advanced toward the middle city’s colosseum. The column of people behind them slowly passed through the gate and soon reached it too.

The branch family descendants of the four great clans guarding the gate were stupefied when they saw groups of slum dwellers holding their luggage enter the middle city. Soon though, the guards reacted and walked in front of everyone to stop them.

“You slum dwellers, what are you coming to middle city for!” he shouted out in a cold voice. “Don’t you know that only those slum dwellers who have the writ of the colosseum can enter the middle city?”

“You can no longer retreat,” another guard said. “All of you are sentenced to capital punishment.”

After hearing those words, the smiles on the faces of the slum dwellers froze, and they looked at each other in bewilderment. What the guards at the gate said was fact. The people of lower city region could not come into the middle city without the writ and they could never step into the upper city. But they had come over after being attracted by the offer to become subordinates of the sixth ancestor.

So how could they be stopped at the gate?

Some of the timid people retreated in the fear of capital punishment. For a while, silence filled the area near the gate.

Rat then looked at the guard, who had a cold face and a hint of ridicule in his eyes, and said with a snort, “I see that you want to receive capital punishment yourself! Just a moment ago, the city lord announced god father’s decrees. Didn’t you all hear that Asura City is now jointly managed by the city lord and the sixth ancestor, so what are the four great clans doing here?”

“Yes, yes. Sixth ancestor wants to recruit subordinates and asked us to report to the colosseum. What qualifications do you all have to obstruct our path and even threaten us on top of that?”

“You! You all! You all want to rebel!”

The faces of the guards grew dark, and they waved the weapons in their hand to intimidate the crowd.

Asura City had always been under the control of the four great clans and the city lord. The four ancestors had rebelled and died, so their authority had been taken away, but the sixth ancestor was only a branch family descendant, so what could he do? The authority was still in the hands of the four great clans, albeit not directly.

The slum dwellers were really courting death by mentioning something like that.

The guards looked at each other and immediately moved to attack the slum dwellers with their weapons.

A blade light flashed, and the guard jolted as if having hit stone. The space between his finger and thumb instantly started to ache.

When a few people raised their heads to see what had happened, they saw that the muscular old bastard had stopped the sword with his hammer.

“You all want to revolt!”

When the guards saw old bastard’s fiendish expression, thy grew a little worried. The guards at the gate of the middle city were branch family descendants of the four great clans, so they were restless when they faced such a large crowd of slum dwellers who were not much weaker than them.

“Get lost!”

Old bastard shook the hammer in his hand, and the guards flew several meters away before falling on the ground.

When the slum dwellers behind him saw that, a hint of excitement appeared on their faces. One after another, they began to cheer, and their laughter filled half of Asura City.

Rat chose that moment to raise his hand and shout out, “Let’s go!”

The guards looked at the rows of slum dwellers advancing toward the middle city with indignation, but in the end, they did not dare to fight them.

When the slum dwellers had disappeared from vision, the guards stood up and looked at each other.

“What should we do now? Those slum dwellers are certainly revolting. They came to middle city instead of obediently staying in the lower city. Even if the sixth ancestor controls half of Asura City, he cannot break the rules of the past.”

“What can we do? The lower city is no more, so what the hell are we guards doing here? We should go and explain this matter to the city lord. It’s impossible for us to handle this matter, but the four great clans and the city lord can.”

After saying that, the guards quickly rushed toward the gate to the upper city.

Old bastard and rat led the slum dwellers of lower city to the colosseum, which could barely hold so many people.

“My people, you have all finally come here. First, let me introduce myself. I am Chen Xiu, originally a branch family descendant of the four great clans. With time, I obtained the appreciation of god father, became the sixth ancestor, and am now in charge of half of Asura City.”

chapters.title: Chapter 854 - Great Orator
chapters.body:
Chapter 854 - Great Orator

Chapter 854: Great Orator

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Once Li Yunmu spoke, the densely packed slum dwellers occupying the colosseum followed the sound of his voice to find its source. Their eyes soon found him standing together with Brunhilda on the high platform of the third level. Immediately, each and every one of the slum dwellers raised their hands, took a deep breath, and loudly shouted the greeting with reverence on their faces.

“Respectful greetings sixth ancestor, respectful greetings sixth ancestor!”

Wave after wave, the voices echoed in an orderly manner as if the men and women had practiced it previously, and the sound resonated through the entire middle city.

When Li Yunmu heard the deafening sound and waved his hand, indicating the slum dwellers underneath to stand up. “Alright, all of you stand up. Now we will get down to business.”

The slum dwellers stood up while unable to hide the excitement from their faces. When Rat and Old Bastard had returned to the slums and spoken about the matter of recruitment, only a small portion of the youths had become extremely excited. The majority of adults still had many suspicions in their hearts. Since they had lived in Asura City from childhood, they knew that slum dwellers were the lowest form of existence and no one paid attention to them or cared about them.

If the sixth ancestor was really planning to get subordinates, why did he not choose the branch family descendants of the four great clans? Even if the majority of them would not agree to join him, a small portion who desired to raise their status would come to his side and follow him.

Even the most useless of branch family descendants were more formidable than the unarmed slum dwellers. After all, they were abandoned specifically because of being unable to awaken their bloodline ability.

But when they came to the colosseum and heard the word ‘people’ from Chen Xiu’s mouth, only one emotion remained in their hearts, and it was excitement.

They had been abandoned after birth and lived their life as the poor in lower city, where their existence was entirely dispensable. But at that moment, someone finally paid attention to them and wanted to recruit them.

Even if that person was the sixth ancestor who had obtained power in Asura City just recently and even if he was still a showroom commander without any troops or influence.

The poor people silently raised their heads and looked at Li Yunmu who seemed out of reach on the third platform, and a hint of zealotry appeared in their eyes. They eagerly waited for their new leader to say something.

“Now, you must earnestly and truly listen to what I have to say, because this relates to your future livelihood. I know you were abandoned and destined to remain at the lowest level from the time you were born because of your impure bloodlines, which made you unable to display your bloodline ability. You were destined to remain dispensable and invisible people of Asura City until the day you breathed your last.

“Some of you went to the colosseum to become fighters in order to survive, in order to get out and gain a narrow lease on life.

“But hear me now… From this moment onwards, your fates will change. Your life will be turned upside down. The whole Asura City will be shocked by your existence. All of you, you will no longer be the invisible people!”

When he shouted out the last words, cheers echoed through the colosseum, which took up half of the middle city. Li Yunmu used a hand to gesture the crowd to calm down, and the slum dwellers all quieted down so he could speak up once more.

“From the time Asura City was created, it was divided into three large regions. The middle and upper, these two regions form the foundation of the four great clans and the city lord’s mansion. Before, they administered all of Asura City, which was as it should be, but after the four ancestors rebelled and were killed, the four great clans lost their authority.

“This resulted in Asura City is being handed over to me and Ashbi. This means that now there’s only two sides.”

When saying the last line, Li Yunmu swung his sleeve wide, and a dot of light flew into the sky. It exploded in the air, forming a giant map of Asura City, which resided on an extremely gigantic.

When the slum dwellers saw the bright projection map, they sighed in astonishment since they found it extremely novel. Then, a black fog flew out of Li Yunmu’s hand and changed into a black pen that advanced toward the map to cut it. The Asura City was then clearly divided into two parts through the waist.

The colosseum lay at the edge of the division line, near the lower city.

“From this moment, the area above this division line is ruled by Ashbi and the four great clans, while the region under my control will be this part under the line, and it includes the lower city. All the places in this area is free estate for you.

“Naturally after forming the boundary, the entire region will undergo a transformation. Therefore, the first problem of manpower will arise. That’s why all those who possess innately formidable strength as well as those who are at the prime of their life must step forward.”

After Li Yunmu said that, he looked at the reaction of people underneath. The slum dwellers understood his words but did not know what to do.

There were indeed people who possessed formidable strength among them, but the crucial point was that even if the number of slum dwellers was extremely large, they would still have to spend at least a few years to completely transform such a large region.

And many things could happen in such a long time.

“I know what questions you all have. Given that the region is so large, how would you be able to reconstruct it in a short time? I have naturally prepared for this.

“All of you need to send your youth to work. This is the first requirement. Old Bastard will be responsible for counting the candidates.”

When Old Bastard standing at the front heard his name, he was stunned for a moment, then anxiously said, “Be at ease lord, your distinguished self can leave this matter to me.”

Li Yunmu nodded then continued. “The second matter is related to the field of martial skills. Previously, you all had no way to come in contact with the martial arts since you were the slum dwellers of lower city. But since you have become my people now, I will naturally spare no effort to find martial arts for you to cultivate, but…”

After Li Yunmu said the first half, the hearts of all slum dwellers froze, and their gazes focused on Li Yunmu, wanting to hear what exactly he wanted to say. Previously, only the descendants of the four great clans could learn martial arts, even if they were extremely ordinary. Regardless of how ordinary they were though, they were not something that people of lower city could access.

“Since you are now my subordinates, then regardless of whether you are male or female, old or young, talented or not, everyone will be allowed to cultivate. But these martial arts won’t be free and will need to be exchanged for with credit points. The source of these credit points will be the tasks you are about to undertake. Naturally, children aren’t included in this.”

His words were like a large stone falling into a calm lake and gave rise to large waves in the crowd of slum dwellers. They swiftly began to discuss the credit system with the people next to them in whispers.

When Rat, who was standing at the front heard mention of it, his small eyes began to shine, and the expression of worship appeared on his face.

He is really worthy of being the lord! Is there anything he didn’t think of?

Although Rat was not clear about the exact use of the credit points, it did not matter. When he heard that they could be obtained through manual labour, it was all that was important to him.

The credit points would presumably act like a currency: they could be obtained via investing what one has and then they could be used to buy things.

Among the slum dwellers, like any other people, there were all sorts of individuals, and so there were even some who wanted to reap without sowing. But after the launch of the credit point system, which could be used to exchange for cultivation methods, everyone would have to work and no one could take the benefits of others. In this manner, the sixth ancestors faction would quickly rise up.

chapters.title: Chapter 856 - Discussion
chapters.body:
Chapter 856 - Discussion

Chapter 856: Discussion

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

In the Morrow Clan, the god elders of the Elder Council who would usually be focusing on cultivation had gathered in the main hall. They formed two rows and looked at Jiao Xiu sitting on the main seat. Since the patriarch was not speaking, the two rows of elders turned into two factions who began to quarrel with each other. The name of Chen Xiu who had recently become one of the rulers of Asura City kept appearing in their conversation.

The elders on the left represented the faction in favor of getting close to him. They believed that the ancestor had encroached on what belonged to god father and was killed for that, but that was ancestor’s personal matter. If they were considered together with him, then god father would have exterminated the Morrow Clan as well. However, they were not wiped out, just deprived of their authority in Asura City.

Right then, only two people had control over Asura City: the city lord Ashbi and the recently advanced sixth ancestor Chen Xiu.

Regardless of whatever was said, Chen Xiu was a person of the Morrow Clan, so the left faction wanted to draw close to him and raise him as the new ancestor of the Morrow Clan. That would allow the Morrow Clan to gain control of half of Asura City, which would make them even stronger than they were before. It was something that could only be a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

The faction on the right side, however, raised the point that even if Chen Xiu’s cultivation was raised to god level and he had become the sixth ancestor of Asura City, he was still a branch family descendant with muddled bloodline. How could he be raised to the position of Morrow Clan’s ancestor?

Apart from that, the elders against the union also raised the point about how could there be a difference in the treatment of branch family descendants and how there were conflicts between the four great clans and Chen Xiu.

With so many matters on which their opinions differed, how could the Morrow Clan and Chen Xiu come together?

Because the number of people in both factions was identical, they kept quarreling in the main hall. All of them remained stubborn on their side, but could not convince the other party.

However, the only person who could make the strategic direction about the future direction of the clan was sitting on the main seat, and his name was Jiao Xiu.

While the elders of both factions were quarreling, Jiao Xiu remained motionless like a stone statue whose gaze was locked onto something straight ahead. When the elders of the two factions stopped quarrelling, a smile appeared at the corners of Jiao Xiu’s mouth upon seeing the figure coming to stand outside the hall.

“Come,” Jiao Xiu softly said.

Suspicion appeared on the faces of elders of both factions, and they followed the patriarch’s gaze toward the figure outside the main hall. The elders of the opposing faction revealed smiles and looked at the elders of the other faction sitting opposite them with joy. The elders of the left faction sighed, having just learned about the Morrow Clan’s future path.

The youth clad in luxurious clothes glanced at Jiao Xiu and the elders sitting within the hall. He slightly bowed and said, “Patriarch Jiao Xiu, the city lord invites you to the city lord’s mansion to have a chat.”

“The city lord has went through a lot of trouble. This patriarch will hurry over in a moment,” Jiao Xiu said with a smile.

The youth nodded, and his figure turned into a blur before it disappeared.

The elders of the left faction looked at the patriarch and asked with surprise, “We hadn’t expected that the clan patriarch would move so quickly, directly choosing the city lord’s side.”

After hearing those words, an elder of the opposing faction sitting on the right sneered and said, “Isn’t it obvious that lord patriarch has to make this choice? From time immemorial, Asura City has been managed by the city lord and the four great clans.

“Now that this clan has been deprived of its authority, we naturally must stand by the side of direct descendants. Could it be that you really support that sixth ancestor with his impure bloodline?”

At this time, a guard covered in dirt rushed out before all the god elders gathered in the hall. Upon seeing a meeting underway, he panicked. He was a branch family descendant so had he never seen so many gods gathered together.

After paying his respects, he nervously said, “Lord patriarch, I am a guard from the gate between lower city and middle city. Today something happened there. The slums dwellers of lower city rushed to the middle city while saying that sixth ancestor recruited them as subordinates.”

After he said that, there was no movement from the patriarch or the clan elders, so the guard slightly raised his head to take a look and saw a hint of mockery on Jiao Xiu’s face. The two rows of the elders, in the meantime, displayed different reactions. One side was laughing madly while the other side was frowning slightly.

“You retreat first,” Jiao Xiu said in a calm voice.

When the guard retreated, Jiao Xiu looked at the elders on both sides and slowly said, “In order to keep Morrow Clan’s appearance, elders, even if you disagree, don’t let your quarrel reach this stage. The sixth elder is only a branch family descendant of my clan, but God father raised him to become one of the rulers of Asura City and wants to see whether he is capable of managing or not.

“The four great clans are direct descendants so we naturally must follow the city lord. That is why the sixth ancestor can only recruit the slum dwellers of lower city. As for what kind of people live there, I do not think I need to elaborate. When I make the trip to the city lord’s mansion, elders, don’t start fighting because of this matter.”

After saying that, Jiao Xiu moved and disappeared from the main hall.

He reappeared in the sky in front of the door to the city lord’s mansion and just happened to arrive together with the patriarchs of the other three clans. The four of them looked at each other and entered the city lord’s mansion.

A maid standing behind the door led the four clan patriarchs to the main hall through the rock garden pond. Inside the hall, Ashbi was sitting on the main seat with his round belly hanging out and holding a cup of tea in his hand.

Jiao Xiu entered the main hall and took a seat, then asked city lord, “Lord Ashbi, this truly rarely seen. Why did you summon us today?”

The other three clan patriarchs also looked at Ashbi.

“Today I asked you all to come in order to divide the Asura City. Your four clans have lost their power, so you were meant to choose one of the rulers to serve. But you four came to the city lord’s mansion which clearly illustrates that you stand on my side. Naturally I welcome you all, but it also puts me in a difficult position. God father said that everything must be in balance; he didn’t want to see any side become weaker,” Ashbi said after taking a sip of his tea.

After hearing his words, the four patriarchs looked at each other but did not say anything. Ashbi’s meaning or perhaps god father’s meaning was not hard to understand. With the four ancestors out of the picture, god father did not wish for one side to become excessively powerful. If the four great clans stood by Ashbi’s side, Chen Xiu would definitely become vulnerable.

At that time, although Asura City’s control would be divided on the surface, in reality, the city lord’s mansion and the four great clans would still retain power.

“The city lord, we understand god father’s meaning, but sixth ancestor has already found his faction. Just a moment ago, a guard informed me that sixth ancestor recruited the slum dwellers of lower city as subordinates. Besides, the sixth ancestor did not request anyone among the four clans to follow him,” Jiao Xiu said indifferently.

Ashbi was startled by the news. He had dispatched people to summon the patriarchs of the four clans to discuss the matter of equality. Naturally, he had also dispatched a subordinate to find Chen Xiu so he would join them to discuss the division of power.

But he hadn’t expected that Chen Xiu would independently recruit his subordinates and bring to himself all the powerless slum dwellers of lower city.

While he was thinking about it, a voice echoed in the main hall.

“God father really considered my needs, surprisingly even thinking of splitting the four clans between me and elder brother. I understand god father’s kind intentions, but I don’t need the four clans as my subordinates.”

chapters.title: Chapter 857 - Is He An Idiot?
chapters.body:
Chapter 857 - Is He An Idiot?

Chapter 857: Is He an Idiot?

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Li Yunmu entered the hall with a calm and collected expression, then sat down on the seat next to that of Ashbi.

Ashbi looked at Li Yunmu with a hint of astonishment on his face. God father’s decision was to maintain a balance between the two factions.

As long as Chen Xiu accepted god father’s command, two of the four great clans would belong to him. This would advance his faction’s strength by leaps and bounds, and he would be able to contend with the city lord.

But he was saying that he did not want the four clans? Did that not mean that he would become a showroom commander with only a group of useless poor people under him?

“What did you say?” Ashbi enquired, still not believing that Li Yunmu had chosen to refuse the offer of two clans.

“I appreciate god father’s kind intentions, but there’s no need to partition the four great clans and give half of them to me to manage. Although the grudge between me and the four great clans isn’t beyond reconciliation, they will certainly not forget the matter of the colosseum with ease.

“Not to mention, if two of the four great clans really became my subordinates, would they sincerely work for me? Everyone knows the answer to this question. Thus, why the need for this superficial division?”

While speaking, Li Yunmu glanced at the four patriarchs sitting underneath with a smile at the corner of his lips.

The four clan patriarchs were expressionless, not showing any emotion on their faces. But a thought appeared in the minds of all four of them: This Chen Xiu does not seem to be an idiot.

After all, Li Yunmu was completely right in saying that even if two clans were brought under him by god father’s command, they would do so perfectly, without any flaws on the surface. But in reality, they would not assist him wholeheartedly.

But regardless of whatever was said, it was still better than nothing. While Asura assisted Li Yunmu, the two clans would work properly on the surface. This arrangement was much better than being a showroom commander with only mortal slum dwellers as subordinates.

“Since you are so insistent, I won’t say anything. But if you change your mind, talk to me and two clans will be put under your management.”

Ashbi nodded after saying that; he was only going through formalities. If Li Yunmu really wanted them, two clans would be his.

If he did not want them, then Ashbi was fine with that too. If the four clans belonged to him, it could be said that the control of all of Asura City would remain in his hands. As for Li Yunmu who had chosen a group of useless slum dwellers of lower city as subordinates, what could he possibly do?

Li Yunmu looked at the four silent patriarchs and obviously understood what they were thinking in their hearts. His main aim behind the visit, however, was to obtain control of half of Asura City. After the four clan patriarchs heard that, they would probably be unable to continue smiling.

Li Yunmu accepted the cup of tea brought by a maid and took a sip before speaking up. “As for the purpose of my visit, I want to discuss how to manage Asura City.”

Ashbi suspiciously looked at Li Yunmu and said. “Oh? Didn’t god father say that Asura City will be jointly administered by the two of us? You have some ideas about this?”

“Previously, the four great clans and you jointly administered the entire Asura City, so the fact that middle city belonged to the four great clans was understandable. But presently, the ancestors of the four great clans have been executed because of their rebellion and their clans don’t have any authority anymore.

“They are nothing more than ordinary people of Asura City. Thus, the branch family descendants of the four great clans occupying the entire middle city cannot be justified.

“Therefore, Asura City should be divided. In this way, it would also be convenient for both of us to manage it. What do you say?”

Before his words could fade away, the expressions of the four patriarchs turned gloomy. Even if their ancestors had died, which resulted in their privileges being stripped, they could remain at the peak of Asura City by relying on the gods produced in their clans over so many years.

In addition, after so many years, the resources of Asura City were firmly in the grasp of the four great clans. They ad not thought, however, that Li Yunmu who had risen to the current position from a low level would not be able to hold back his thoughts about suppressing the four great clans.

Ashbi looked at the reactions of the four clan patriarchs, and a profound smile appeared on his round face. His current situation was like that of a monkey watching the battle of two cats. Whatever happened, the conflict between the four clans and Chen Xiu would be beneficial to him.

If the four great clans lost their power in the conflict, they would be forced to rely on him. Thus, his power and influence would be stabilized.

If Chen Xiu could not fight against the four great clans, then they would retain their control, but they would have to submit half of that power to him in order to avoid god father’s suspicions.

“Then what do you say, how should we divide Asura City?” Ashbi enquired.

“Naturally by using the middle city as a boundary. The region of the upper city will be in your territory, while the region approaching the lower city, as well as the colosseum, will come under my territory,” Li Yunmu said casually.

Ashbi did not reply immediately. He lowered his head and took a sip of tea while sitting quietly without looking sideways.

Underneath him, the four clan patriarchs looked at each other, and Jiao Xiu sighed.

“Sixth ancestor’s meaning is that the branch family descendants of the four great clans will be driven out of your territory?”

“Driving out some people can’t be helped. Regardless of what sixth ancestor thinks, we are all of Asura race, so isn’t the matter of driving out people a little bit excessive? Or are you saying this because you have the intention of creating another country within the city?” the matriarch of Deva clan sitting beside Jiao Xiu slowly asked.

Li Yunmu gave her a look. The matriarch of Deva Clan was clad in light pink muslim, which revealed only her eyes which were like stars.

She had the appearance of a twenty year old, and even her voice was pure, like that of a young girl. If someone did not know beforehand that Jasmine was her biological daughter, they might end up mistaking the two of them as siblings.

Using her pleasant voice, the matriarch of Deva Clan wanted to portray Li Yunmu as a vile character who wanted to exceed his place. When Li Yunmu noticed that, he smiled slightly, but did not give any response to the allegation.

“I still haven’t said anything, and you gave the answer in my place? Are you a parasite in my stomach? Or should it be said that you, a grand matriarch of Deva Clan, don’t understand the social ranking?”

After hearing those words, the matriarch of Deva Clan was startled and killing intent appeared in her eyes. She forcefully suppressed it and said with a soft smile, “Sixth ancestor is correct, I was being impulsive. I hope sixth ancestor does not take offense.”

Li Yunmu did not pay any attention to the matriarch of Deva Clan and turned to Jiao Xiu to answer his question.

“Administering our respective territories does not mean creating another country in the city, but is only for convenience. You all can be considered as belonging to my elder brother’s side, while my power only includes the slum dwellers of lower city.

“If I and elder brother jointly administer the city, and the descendants of the four great clans humiliate those poor people, then should they be killed every time?

“Thus, in order to facilitate the administration, I want to use the boundaries to separate the two groups. I believe that the residences of the four great clans are large enough to properly accommodate the branch family descendants.

“This is what I came to discuss here. If my elder brother and I can come to an agreement, my subordinates will implement it.”

chapters.title: Chapter 859 - Iron Nuggets
chapters.body:
Chapter 859 - Iron Nuggets

Chapter 859: Iron Nuggets

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

When Li Yunmu left the city lord’s mansion, Ashbi announced the matters of lower city’s residents forming Ground Clan as well as the division of territory throughout Asura City.

When the people of Asura City heard the two decrees, some rejoiced while some were worried. When the slum dwellers residing in the colosseum heard the name Ground Clan, all of them began to cheer. They would no longer be the lowest denizens of Asura City.

Instead, they would be descendants of the fifth clan of Asura City.

Li Yunmu would be their ancestor, and the true symbol of clan in their heart.

There were many comments about it within the four great clans. When the bottom layer descendants spoke the name of Chen Xiu, they gnashed their teeth with their faces filled with envy. Who had expected that a trifling branch descendant would become an ancestor of Asura City and divide the territory with City Lord Ashbi, thus becoming the ruler of half of Asura City?

When the elders of Morrow Clan, which belonged to the faction that wanted to get close to Chen Xiu, heard the news, they looked at the elders of the other faction to continue with their cold war. If they had joined Chen Xiu and become his subordinates, then not only would all the resources and power of belief belong to them, close to half of the city would also be under them.

Chen Xiu’s territory was much larger than what they had when the four clans controlled Asura City together.

After the four patriarchs returned to their respective clans, they divided their resource lands into two and marked the boundary on a map. They attached the maps to a letter and gave it to a messenger. Four messengers then quickly came out of the mansions, but were stopped by the god level elders of the clans.

The elders opened the maps to check the division of resource lands, and their expressions changed. Without saying anything, they properly folded the personal letters and returned them to the messengers.

Soon after, the branch family descendants of the four clans residing in the territory of Ground Clan packed their luggage and prepared to move to the clan residence. Within a short time, the territory of Ground Clan was completely emptied out, since everyone else was gathered in the colosseum.

*****

Rat held a letter delivered by one of the four clans as he anxiously rushed to see Li Yunmu. He hadn’t thought that the four clans would be so fast in taking action and partition the resource lands so quickly.

The four sealed letters were very precious.

“Lord, lord, the four clans have sent the maps with the division of the resource lands.”

Rat stopped before the door while gasping for breath and knocked on it with all his strength.

“Come in.”

A clamorous sound came from the room.

When Rat heard the command to enter, he opened the door and walked inside. Once inside the room, he saw Li Yunmu wearing a large iron mask and rapidly beating a pile of iron with a weapon in his hands.

While he was doing so, countless dazzling sparks flew out of the pile of iron. They were followed by dense smoke.

Rat respectfully stood to the side and watched curiously with his tiny eyes. But the sparks flying out of the pile of iron were extremely dazzling and the smoke was somewhat suffocating, so he could not see what exactly was going on.

“Don’t look, or you will go blind,” Li Yunmu said through the iron mask.

After hearing that, Rat shuddered and anxiously closed his eyes.

After a long time, the ear-piercing sound disappeared. Rat could not hold back and opened his eyes slightly to take a look and saw that there were no sparks or smoke anymore. He opened his eyes wide then and took note of a dark and swarthy iron glove on Li Yunmu’s hand. It intrigued him.

It was a piece of battle armor, so why was Lord personally working on it? The dark and swarthy appearance also appeared excessively amateurish.

Without thinking much, Rat placed the letters delivered by the messengers of four clans in front of Li Yunmu and excitedly said, “Lord, the four clans delivered the maps marking the division of resource lands, so your distinguished self should take a look.”

Li Yunmu’s complete attention was on the dark and swarthy iron glove. When he heard Rat’s words, he spoke without paying much attention to him. “You open them and take a look at how the regions of resources were divided.”

“Alright.”

Rat took out one of the maps and began to look. When he saw the designated resource lands, his expression changed completely. The excitement from just a moment ago vanished without a trace.

After taking a thorough look at the map, he quickly opened the second and third letters.

He opened the letters from all four clans and placed them on the table. He then looked at the resource areas marked on the maps, and his expression grew dark.

He turned toward Li Yunmu and indignantly said, “Lord, you should see what resource areas the four clans handed over to us! They are repulsive. The four clans clearly want to send our Ground Clan descendants to death.”

Li Yunmu placed down the iron glove and looked at the resource areas marked on the map. They seemed kinda big and were distributed in all four directions out of Asura City.

The largest amount of resources was close to Asura City. The more outward the resources point was, the worse its quality. The area marked by the four great clans for Li Yunmu’s resources surpassed half of the total area.

But his resource lands were at the very edge of Asura City’s boundary and contained the lowest quality resources. The most important thing though was that they were close to the border with the territories of the other ancient gods.

In ordinary times, the borders were peaceful, but if war broke out, the first areas to suffer attacks would be the resource lands sent out to Li Yunmu.

When Li Yunmu saw that, a hint of a smile appeared on his lips. After he returned from the city lord’s mansion, he was aware that the four great clans would never let him obtain the resource lands which he wanted.

But in the end, he was still one of the rulers of Asura City, so the four clan patriarchs could not refuse him directly. Li Yunmu also did not mention which resource lands he wanted, so the four clan patriarchs naturally transferred the most dangerous and inferior resource lands to him.

Rat’s face was dark and his heart full of fury. When the city lord announced the two decrees and called the lower city’s residents the Ground Clan, he had become extremely emotional in his heart.

When he learnt about the division of resources, he became even more excited. Not only would they have their own clan, they would even get their own resource lands.

“I know that the four clan patriarchs harbor malicious intentions. Although the resource lands transferred by them are inferior and dangerous, the area is large, which is pretty good,” Li Yunmu said with a smile while inspecting the dark and swarthy iron glove inside out.

“Lord, the resource lands provided by the four clans are on the borders, so how will our Ground Clan manage them? Only half god level powerhouses can defend those resource lands, but the Ground Clan has only one god—you,” Rat said with hesitation.

Li Yunmu passed the dark and swarthy iron glove to Rat and said, “You try it out, see how are the results.”

What results? What sort of effect could an iron glove produce?

Rat disapprovingly put on the iron glove, waved it in the air, then said with a smile, “Lord, this iron glove doesn’t look good. If your distinguished self wants battle armor, you can ask other people to manufacture it. The workmanship of those people is very fine. I guarantee that it will be much better if they did it.”

Li Yunmu was startled. He then extended his hand and flicked Rat’s head with a smile. “Who said I want to create my own battle armor!”

chapters.title: Chapter 861 - Helpless Jia Luo
chapters.body:
Chapter 861 - Helpless Jia Luo

Chapter 861: Helpless Jia Luo

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

The arena of the colosseum was filled with people lying on their backs. The chairs on the first two levels of the spectator stand were dismantled, and people lay there too. Everyone was looking at the countless dots filling the night sky without feeling sleepy. Within a day, their identity has changed completely. From lowest class dispensable people of Asura City, they had become descendants of Ground Clan.

They were part of the fifth clan of Asura City. The discarded ones had suddenly risen to become on equal footing with the four clans of Asura City.

The reason behind the transformation was the sixth ancestor Chen Xiu, and every descendant of Ground Clan was grateful toward him.

“Finally, a day has come when we can proudly raise our heads and don’t need to kowtow when seeing the disciples of the four great clans.”

“Ah Mu, I heard that all children can cultivate martial techniques, so can I also learn some skills.”

“Naturally, lord ancestor has chosen to pass on martial techniques to all of us.”

“En, then I will cultivate those martial skills and defend Ah Mu, Ground Clan, and the ancestor.”

The sounds of soft discussions echoed throughout the colosseum. Every person was looking forward to the arrival of the next day. As long as they could obtain credit points by working and would use them to exchange for martial skills, they would benefit greatly.

The martial skills which they could only look at and never hope to obtain were finally within their reach.

At that moment, Rat rushed in while holding a pile of blueprints. When he looked at the densely packed people in the colosseum, he felt a headache coming. How could he choose those who can craft weapons from so many people? After thinking about it, he walked down the familiar path and arrived in the lobby of the lowest level.

Once he entered it, he saw Old Bastard standing in front of a group of muscular men sitting on the ground.

“I am very serious here. Ancestor asked me to choose people with high physical strength, and you all belong to the first batch. If any of you slack during construction, don’t blame me for being impolite. For participating in the construction, you will get 100 points each day.

“The lowest level martial art requires one thousand points to exchange. In other words, as long as you all work for ten full days, you can exchange them for one martial art. Naturally, this is under the premise that you all work earnestly. Every time you are caught goofing around while working, half of your credit points will be deducted. You must remember this warning in your heart and not blame me for not reminding you.”

Excitement filled the faces of the strong men sitting in three rows, and without paying any attention to the punishment mentioned by Old Bastard, they began to joke around. The reason why they came to him was to participate in the construction of houses and earn credit points. To their surprise though, the cultivation skill of lowest level only required them to work for ten days, so who would laze around.

Old Bastard looked at the eager expressions of the strong men sitting before him and nodded in satisfaction.

“Old Bastard, come here,” Rat shouted loudly while standing by the gate.

Old Bastard looked at Rat who was holding a pile of blueprints and suspiciously asked, “What the hell do you want? What is this in your hands?”

“Blueprints given by lord. I just left his room, and he gave me a mission. But when I was coming down, I saw people sleeping, so I did not think it good to rush there and choose people. Instead, I came here to ask if you have some people who are good at forging weapons. If you have, then send them to me.”

Old Bastard frowned. There were people who helped the four great clans in forging metals, so they had some understanding about it, but their numbers were extremely small. He also couldn’t guarantee that there was someone among the first batch of workers he had summoned who knew how to forge weapons.

Old Bastard turned towards the three rows of men and asked,”Does anyone among you know how to forge weapons? If there is, raise your hand.”

Everyone looked around doubtfully. In the final row, Jia Lou rolled his eyes and tried to shrink his well proportioned figure so that the person in front of him would hide his figure. Although he knew the techniques of forging since he had helped the four great clans, he did not want to lose out on participating in construction and obtaining 100 credit points every day.

In just ten days, he could exchange for a martial skill. With such a good job in front of him, why would he return to forging weapons?

Who did not want to become a powerhouse? He was no exception.

Two muscular men sitting by Jia Luo’s side turned to look around, and their gazes fell on him. Their eyes lit up, and they loudly shouted, “Jia Luo, didn’t you work in the forging factory of the four great clans? You should have some understanding about the forging techniques.”

Another man also stood up and excitedly spoke while pointing towards the hidden Jia Lou. “Yes, yes, Jia Luo, you can forge. Old Bastard, Jia Lou understands forging.”

Jia Lou’s expression turned ugly as he sat with his head down. He was most afraid of such a moment. His two friends sitting beside him had sold him out, and they did it with excitement on their faces. He was sure that he was done for now. The best job was out of his reach, and he would have to go and become a forging master.

Old Bastard shot a glance at Jia Lou. When he saw him hiding by bending his waist, he was about to say something, but Rat stepped forward first.

“If you understand forging, then come out,” he said with a smile. “Ancestor has commanded that we must rush to create the things in these blueprints starting from tonight. For every piece you create, you will obtain one thousand credit points.

One thousand credit points!

All the muscular men in the lobby cried out and raised their hands one after another. When creating one item was equivalent to one martial skill, who would not want to put a foot in such a profitable matter?

“I! I! I! I can forge, I am an expert.”

“I also can, choose me, I am better than him.”

“I possess great strength, so I can forge even faster.”

Rat looked at everyone raising their hands, and his expression turned gloomy.:

“Only those who really can do it should raise their hand,” he said coldly. “If you turn out to be fake and create useless things, then forget about credit points, you will also be penalized.”

The moment he said that, everyone lowered their hands and turned silent. Jia Lou, however, lifted his head then and raised his hand.

“I-I can forge.”

“Then you come out and follow me. Others continue with Old Bastard.”

Jia Lou walked with excitement after Rat, who was a head shorter than him. After making seven or eight turns, Rat found the forging room of the colosseum. Last time, when he was finishing the previous mission, he had went through the cages of the vicious beasts and passed by the forging room.

After searching for a long while, Rat found the forging room unused for a very long time and placed the blueprint on the table. He then turned to look at the tall Jia Lou.

“Since you can forge, take a look at these blueprints. If you can, start working right away. Tonight it will be just you, but tomorrow, I will choose more from among the descendants.”

“Hey, what is this thing in the blueprints?”
