Speaking of which, if you want to steal Heavenly Grand Ritual, you must first pass through the defensive spell formation laid by a master god and without attracting the attention of the five ancient gods. After that, you will have to infiltrate the sealed room and steal the Heavenly Grand Ritual from under the noses of the five ancient gods.”

After hearing her words, Li Yunmu’s eyebrows creased slightly. He hadn’t expected that the five ancient gods would treat the Heavenly Grand Ritual with such importance and would jointly protect it in a sealed room.

The spell formation between the divine palace and the sealed room was even more thorny. If he forcefully attacked it, he could naturally get his hands on Heavenly Grand Ritual, but it would attract the attention of the five ancient gods.

His plan was to initiate the second battle of gods between the five ancient gods and Asura, not to concentrate the attention of all the ancient gods on himself.

[I have a method to get across the spell formation of the divine palace,] the system suddenly said in Li Yunmu’s mind.

Li Yunmu frowned slightly, but the system had never cheated him. If it said there was a way to pass the formation, there really had to be a way. That meant that he only lacked the map of the divine palace to use the opportunity when the competition was happening to steal the Heavenly Grand Ritual.

“You don’t need to worry about the spell formation. I can deal with it. Give me a map of the divine palace,” Li Yunmu said.

He then though that the ancient goddess might not feel reassured so added a few more words. “Oh right, this stolen Heavenly Grand Ritual would delivered to Asura City so that the five ancient gods don’t suspect Lakshmi City.”

chapters.title: Chapter 890 - The Five Envoys
chapters.body:
Chapter 890 - The Five Envoys

Chapter 890: The Five Envoys

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Yu Rou who was waiting outside the hall, and she saw Li Yunmu coming out before long. When she glanced at the jade pipa on the divine altar in the hall, the five-colored red light had already pulled inside it.

“You finished your conversation so quickly?” Yu Rou asked in astonishment.

“How long did you think I would take? Let’s go,” Li Yunmu said with a smile.

They then went toward the hall where Brunhilda was residing. After walking halfway there, Li Yunmu turned to ask Yu Rou, “Oh right, are the envoys of the ancient gods already here?”

When the holy daughter who was following behind him heard the question, she nodded in agreement.

“Envoys have already arrived at the Music Clan. One of the holy daughter received them. By the way, lord, are you really going to let Ancient Goddess Brunhilda continue participating in the competition?”

“What about it?” Li Yunmu asked while walking before her. “This competition was proposed by Little Bu herself. It’s pretty good for me. At that time, the focus of the five ancient gods will be on this competition.”

…

Yu Rou did not reply. While she followed Li Yunmu, her thoughts began to run wild. Although the time Ancient Goddess Brunhilda spent in Lakshmi City wasn’t long, only a short few days, her relationship with Liu Bailing and the other holy daughters was very good. She didn’t have the least bit of arrogance.

Yu Rou found it hard to see Brunhilda’s husband, Li Yunmu, show no reaction about the matter of the competition between the ancient goddess and the five ancient gods. Apart from some anger at the start, he did not show anything else. He even agreed to let the competition proceed after talking with her.

It wasn’t an ordinary competition, however. It was for deciding her groom.

Since Ancient Goddess Brunhilda possessed formidable strength, in the end, none of the five ancient gods were suitable to marry her. Such a matter was inappropriate. If the husband of any person in the Music Clan encountered such a situation, they would be stamping in fury.

Could it then be that Li Yunmu didn’t love Ancient Goddess Brunhilda? It was most likely that. He didn’t love her, and it was why he began flirting with Holy Daughter Liu Bailing of Pipa Clan.

Men really are pigs.

By the time, the two reached the corner of the corridor, Holy Daughter Yu Rou suddenly said to Li Yunmu in a calm voice, “Lord, since I have delivered your distinguished self to the Music Clan, I will withdraw now.”

After saying that, she turned around and walked in the opposite direction without waiting for Li Yunmu’s response.

He stopped and looked at Yu Rou with a frown, finding it somewhat strange.

She had been acting properly until just a moment ago, so why did she suddenly walk away like that?

Not bothering to think too much about it, Li Yunmu went toward Brunhilda’s residence while minding his own business. When he returned to the main palace, Brunhilda was still sitting on the main seat, but Liu Bailing had already left.

“Returned so quickly?”

Brunhilda inclined her heard toward him, and a charming smile appeared on her lovely face.

Li Yunmu nodded, then walked to Brunhilda’s side and said, “Wait until the competition between you and the five ancient gods starts, then I will make a trip to the divine palace.”

“Trip to the divine palace? Why do you have to go there?” Brunhilda asked with a slight frown.

“I will steal the Heavenly Grand Ritual. Once I have it in my hands, the battle between gods will start.”

After saying that, Li Yunmu pulled Brunhilda into his embrace and said in her ear softly, “Little Bu, I haven’t seen you in a long time, so are you trying to kill me?”

Brunhilda turned to see Li Yunmu’s face. She knew what he wanted, so she only waved her hand and a layer of divine energy covered the entire hall.

…

Two days before the competition, the envoys dispatched by the five ancient gods had reached Lakshmi City a long time ago. They had also heard of the exceptional beauty of the newly appeared ancient goddess of Lakshmi City and wanted to personally see her.

Brunhilda was the first holy daughter of Pipa Clan, so it wasn’t like anyone who wanted to see her could do so. When the five envoys arrived, the music clans dispatched their holy daughters to receive them.

In the first two days after arriving, the five envoys were entertained by the holy daughters. They were also welcomed by descendants who entertain them with music and some excellent wines.

But the hearts of the five envoys weren’t present on the scene and they didn’t pay any attention to the arrangement of the holy daughters. All of their thoughts were focused on Brunhilda. After many reminders, the holy daughter dispatched to entertain them finally rushed to the main hall to consult with Brunhilda.

“Ancient Goddess Brunhilda, the envoys from the ancient gods are asking to meet you. They even used the names of the five ancient gods to threaten us. What do you think we should do?” one of the holy daughters said in a bad mood.

If the envoys hadn’t used the names of the ancient gods to threaten her, she wouldn’t have rushed over to speak.

Brunhilda looked at the holy daughter underneath with a hint of killing intent in her phoenix-like eyes. She could still accept the groom selecting competition mentioned by the five gods, since all of them were ancient gods with equal status.

But what was the status of the five envoys?

They were only the sons of the five ancient gods. The god realm could be considered as an untouchable heavens for others, but they were only five ants in her eyes. Yet they were relying on Lakshmi City’s weakness to be unbridled.

It seemed like they had to be taught a lesson.

Brunhilda stood up and was just about to speak when a pair of thick hands took hold of hers. Li Yunmu came out from behind the main seat and said in an icy tone, “You don’t need to take action in this matter. Those children are untactful and dare to find trouble for you. I will go with you to teach them a lesson.”

When the holy daughter sitting underneath saw Li Yunmu suddenly appear, she recalled that he was the lord she saw at the Pipa Clan and respectfully said, “When did lord arrive?”

Li Yunmu waved his hand in front of Brunhilda. She sensed a burst of warmth and focused her attention on him.

She looked at him and directly said, “Your appearance won’t do. If you followed me and the envoys saw you, wouldn’t the ancient gods in the divine palace find that something’s wrong? Quick, transform into Younger Sister Bailing.”

“…”

Li Yunmu looked at Brunhilda with a startled expression. He really couldn’t follow her as himself, going to find the envoys with the identity of a man. If the ancient gods behind the envoys sensed the emotions between the two of them, they would become suspicious. But if he used Liu Bailing’s identity, it would be completely safe.

But Li Yunmu was still unable to convince himself to transform into a woman. After thinking for a long while, he summoned a shadow which transformed into Liu Bailing’s appearance.

Li Yunmu then said, “Take my shadow with you.”

Brunhilda coldly snorted, then turned around and walked down the stage. She went outside while leading Li Yunmu’s shadow.

The holy daughter standing underneath was completely shocked and looked at Li Yunmu lying on the main seat with a hint of suspicion in her eyes. It wasn’t that the holy daughter hadn’t seen a technique to produce clones, but the refined clones could only have 10%-20% of the main’s body strength. Even if Li Yunmu was an ancient god, the clone he congealed could only have the strength of a god at most.

Could a single god win against five gods?

If a conflict erupted, Lakshmi City’s other holy daughters could not take action. Only Li Yunmu who had transformed into Liu Bailing could attack. After all, Brunhilda was impersonating the first holy daughter of Pipa Clan while Liu Bailing was the present holy daughter.

If her ancestor wasn’t respected, it was only natural that the present holy daughter would attack.

chapters.title: Chapter 891 - The Thoughts Of All Parties
chapters.body:
Chapter 891 - The Thoughts Of All Parties

Chapter 891: The Thoughts of All Parties

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

The conference hall of the Music Clan was originally used by the twelve holy daughters for secret meetings while the guests were received in another side chamber. But Ancient God Lakshmi was injured, and only Brunhilda remained, but she was unable to intimidate the five ancient gods.

Because of that, the envoys of the five ancient gods decided to take advantage of their strength and bully the weak. They insisted on using that hall to enjoy the music of beauties. In consideration of the general situation, Holy Daughter Hu Shi, who was responsible for entertaining the guests, could only let them use the hall.

At that moment, the five envoys were sitting on the stage while a group of beautiful women from the Music Clan were sitting underneath and playing instruments.

The main seat was occupied by the supposed leader Jia Tiankuang, the son of Garuda. He had a tall and straight figure, a handsome appearance, and a head full of blonde hair. If one only looked at his upper half, he could charm countless women, but if someone was to look at his lower half, they wouldn’t see ordinary human legs but a pair of clawed bird feet.

Jia Tiankuang’s golden eyes swept past the bodies of the women sitting underneath, but his expression was slightly gloomy. As a son of an ancient god, he was called an ancestor in Garuda Clan, so he had seen countless amazing beauties.

Although the women of the Music Clan were beautiful, they didn’t reach the stage of stunning in his eyes. Yet according to the legends passed down among the people of Lanlou, the women of Deva Clan of Asura City and the twelve music clans of Lakshmi City were world-shaking beauties.

But right then, it seemed like the Deva Clan was slightly higher than the music clans.

“All of them only have ordinary physical bodies. They aren’t anything interesting.”

Jia Tiankuang was distracted while he waved his hand to indicate for the Music Clan’s women to put down their musical instruments.

The women sitting underneath placed down their instruments with confused faces. Right then, only a bunch of initial stage sage flux experts were in the hall, since Holy Daughter Hu Shi had gone to Pipa Clan’s main hall.

What should they do then? Should they remain seated still?

Jia Tiankuang turned around to look at Pi Zhan, whose body was constantly transforming and asked, “How long has this Holy Daughter Hu Shi been gone for??”

“It has been quite some time. She is probably busy persuading that newly advanced ancient goddess.”

A smile was at the corners of Pi Zhan’s face. With his constantly transforming body, his smile seemed to be filled with part coldness, part ridicule, and part disdain.

The ancestor of Indra Clan, Di Fan, sitting beside Pi Zhan, coldly snorted, and a few electric sparks were emitted from the lightning imprint between his eyebrows. He disdainfully said:

“Ancient God Lakshmi was injured by Asura, so the strength of Lakshmi City has reached rock bottom,” he said disdainfully. “They need the protection of our god fathers, and this newly advanced ancient goddess is still trying to put on airs? Isn’t she afraid that we will fling our sleeves and leave?”

“But she can act like this. After all, she is an ancient goddess. It is a position equivalent to that of our god fathers. Although we are ancestors, we are only gods,” Ye Tian, the ancestor of Yaksha Clan, with deep blue skin and a pair of sharp fangs, subconsciously replied. His moon-like dazzling eyes were constantly drifting around, which made it difficult to read his thoughts.

Ye Tian’s words caused the expressions of the other four envoys in the hall to turn gloomy. As long as one had sufficient strength, they could possess corresponding strength in all of Lanlou. The ancient god realm was just one step ahead of the god realm.

The elders and clan patriarchs of the seven clans of the seven ancient gods in Lanlou were all gods. Only after rising to the level of ancient gods would they attain the position of god fathers, and the treatment they received would become completely different.

But that was only under ordinary circumstances. The seven ancient gods were suspicious of each other but still maintained a subtle equilibrium. Right then, however, Lakshmi City was vulnerable. Its ancient goddess was heavily injured by Asura and possessed only 5% of her original strength.

Asura’s strength was deep and unmeasurable, and he was able to preserve his complete strength during the last battle. He did not receive any injuries.

When the five ancient gods descended on Asura City, they clearly sensed it. They weren’t completely sure of everything, but they returned directly to the divine palace to use the Heavenly Grand Ritual to recover their injuries. The five ancient gods wanted to use the opportunity of the ancient goddess being injured to swallow Lakshmi City.

Fortunately, a previous holy daughter of Lakshmi City had already reached ancient god realm. When the five ancient gods saw Liu Qing’s breathtaking beauty, all their thoughts of swallowing Lakshmi City disappeared. They were even ready to ally with Lakshmi City for the breathtaking beauty of Liu Qing.

“The present Lakshmi City is extremely vulnerable and has incurred the hatred of Asura. The subtle balance between the seven ancient gods has been destroyed long ago, and the battle of gods is imminent. If Ancient God Lakshmi doesn’t ally with our god fathers, she’ll be the first one to fall,” Jia Tiankuang said indifferently.

“I want to see how much of a breathtaking beauty is this Liu Qing that even our god fathers were charmed.”

The other four envoys also revealed smiles, but they didn’t say anything. The aim behind the arrival of five of them was to see Liu Qing. If they did not get to see her, there was no meaning in them coming in advance.

Liu Qing was an ancient goddess, so her position was naturally respectable, even in the eyes of the five ancient gods. The envoys might be the sons of ancient gods, but they could not ask Liu Qing to come out with their own mouths.

Jia Tiankuang, however, could do it. Garuda possessed tyrannical strength among the five ancient gods, so even his sons felt a sense of superiority before the others.

Jia Tiankuang was someone who dared to speak their intentions. When the envoys of the other four clans instigated him, he directly asked Holy Daughter Hu Shi to bring Liu Qing out for him to see her.

Truly brazen.

When the women of the Music Clan sitting underneath heard the arrogant words of the five envoys which were filled with contempt toward Lakshmi City, their hearts filled with resentment. An unpleasant look entered their eyes.

Those Music Clan’s women felt that their strength was insufficient. If they had gods or even half gods, they might have jointly attacked the five envoys.

Ye Tian, who was sitting on the stage, looked at the Music Clan’s women and said with excitement, “You bunch of Music Clan’s descendants are really interesting. You look like you want to eat us with your gazes.”

When he said that, Jia Tiankuang, who was feeling slightly neglected, turned to look at the women of the Music Clan, and a cold light flashed past his golden eyes.

These trash with ordinary bodies dared to look at him with such gazes?

Jia Tiankuang coldly snorted, and a divine presence erupted from his body. It was followed by a golden light that leaped out from his body and wantonly jumped around the hall. One after another, threads of divine energy mixed with wind energy rushed toward the women of the Music Clan.

They clenched their teeth and tried to play their musical instruments with difficulty. But when the wind energy attacked, all of them were blown away and knocked against the wooden gate. When they fell down and spat out a mouthful of blood, they raised their heads and looked at the golden light flying around in alarm.

They were only initial stage sage flux experts, so compared to Jia Tiankuang, who was the son of an ancient god, the difference between them was like that between heaven and earth. Once the golden light containing divine power appeared, none of them could stop it.

The four envoys sitting next to Jia Tiankuang smiled without any intention of stopping him. They didn’t care in the slightest about whether the group of the Music Clan’s women sitting underneath died or not. The only thing they cared about was the reaction of the holy daughters after they learned of this matter.

chapters.title: Chapter 892 - It Is Not The Time
chapters.body:
Chapter 892 - It Is Not The Time

Chapter 892: It Is Not the Time

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

The golden light containing divine power turned into golden blades, which thickly dotted the roof of the hall.

While trembling, they turned into a blur and rushed toward the Music Clan’s women who were still lying on the ground. Fear appeared in their eyes, but none of them dodged.

First, because even if they dodged, they would still die. Without a holy daughter present, they wouldn’t be able to stop the unexpected calamity. Second, Jia Tiankuang was punishing them for disrespect, but they would still do it if given another chance.

There were other considerations in their minds as well. Even if Lakshmi City was vulnerable, they wouldn’t permit others to disrespect it or the music clans. It didn’t matter whether the other party was the heir of an ancient god or not.

When the golden blades dropped, they were frozen in the air using a formless energy.

“From when are the others permitted to meddle when the descendants of the Music Clan commit mistakes?” a cold feminine voice asked. It echoed through the whole hall.

The woman’s voice was deep and relaxing. When Jia Tiankuang, who was about to angrily demand an explanation, lost all his anger upon hearing it. There was only one thought in his mind, and it was to see the owner of that voice.

The four envoys sitting by his side also had the same thought. They were certain that the owner of the voice was certainly a beauty which could ruin a country.

Everyone looked outside the hall and saw an unusually tall woman coming over. She had long and gentle hair which was bound with a golden ring on her back. Her skin was fair, but there was a hint of anger in her phoenix-like eyes. Strangely though, it made her look fresh and charming.

Like a witch or an immortal, she was a heaven-shaking beauty.

When the girls of the Music Clan who were unable to get up from the ground saw the golden blades frozen in the sky, they turned toward Brunhilda and paid their respects.

“Paying respects to the ancient goddess.”

“All of you stand up. For provoking the five envoys, you won’t receive a meal tonight. Now go to the medicine hall and get yourself treated,” Brunhilda said with a wave of her hand.

From the moment she entered the scene, the five envoys weren’t able to take their eyes off her. Even when they heard her punishment for the girls of the Music Clan, they didn’t pay the slightest attention.

If it had happened before, there would be no need to speak of Jia Tiankuang, even the other four envoys would have demanded a heavy punishment for the women of the Music Clan. But right then, the five of them were completely enchanted and did not have the mind to consider other things.

Jia Tiankuang’s claws hidden under the table tightly clutched at the golden threads of the carpet. His expression was full of surprise.

A chair appeared in Brunhilda’s hand out of nowhere, and she sat down on it. She calmly looked at the distracted envoys and slowly said, “Do the five envoys want something from this ancient goddess?”

Li Yunmu and Holy Daughter Hu Shi stood behind her and looked at the five envoys with unkind thoughts in their heads.

When they had come over just a moment ago, the three of them had investigated everything happening in the hall. If they hadn’t rushed over in time, the leader, Jia Tiankuang, would have really cut apart the weak women sent to entertain him.

They were in the residence of the music clans, Lakshmi City. If someone dared to be so arrogant and unbridled in their territory, who wouldn’t be angry. But Lakshmi City wanted to ally with the five ancient gods, so attacking their sons dispatched as envoys wouldn’t do anything good.

Holy Daughter Hu Shi sighed to conceal the killing intent in her eyes. Li Yunmu was standing next to her with crossed arms. Just a moment ago, the five envoys had angered him somewhat by bullying the weak, but now the time of them were staring wide-eyed at Brunhilda, which made him feel violated.

“Before I came, god father told me that Lakshmi City had one more ancient goddess who is a heaven-shaking beauty. I didn’t believe him and came to Lakshmi City in advance.

“I hadn’t expected to see that you, Ancient Goddess Liu Qing, are just like what god father told me. One glance is sufficient to make anyone fall for a lifetime.”

When Jia Tiankuang heard Brunhilda’s voice, he was intoxicated. After a while, he slowly returned to reality, relaxed his claws, and a hint of smile appeared on his face.

“Just like god father said, one glance could make anyone fall in love for a lifetime. Ancient Goddess Liu Qing is even one level higher than those of Deva Clan from Asura City.”

Pi Zhan, with his transforming body, also returned to reality and said emotionally, “God father really has a good eye. The woman he cares about is really different from everyone else. There will always be beauties who will be different from others.”

The five envoys continued one after another. Their words, apart from singing praise for Brunhilda, were also filled with the feeling of appreciating objects.

Brunhilda looked at the five envoys and said in a calm voice, “The five envoys really praise me too highly. But this goddess doesn’t understand one thing, do the sons of other ancient gods don’t have any understanding of social structure?

“I am an ancient goddess, while you are only gods. According to the rules, when you all see me, you should pay your greetings to show your respect. But you all still haven’t moved from your positions, so what’s the meaning of this?

“Could it be that the gods of present no longer even have the understanding of the the most basic regulations?”

When she said that, smiles appeared on the faces of all the envoys. In their eyes, even Brunhilda’s cold words were like sweet talk. But despite being fond of her, they didn’t let go of their arrogance. Lakshmi City was vulnerable and could only rely on an alliance with the five ancient gods.

Although they used the word alliance, the five envoys were clear in their heart that they would be establishing a subsidiary relationship. Lakshmi City would turn into a subordinate city for the five ancient gods.

It might nominally remain under the control of Ancient Goddess Lakshmi, but secretly it would be controlled by the five ancient gods. Even the newly advanced ancient goddess had already been turned into a bargaining chip, so what social structure was she talking about?

“Ancient Goddess Liu Qing must be joking. The condition for the alliance between the five ancient gods and Ancient Goddess Lakshmi is you. After the competition, you will eventually become our god mother, so in order to get intimate, we didn’t pay our respects,” Ye Tian, who had deep blue skin, said.

Brunhilda did not reply, but examined the five envoys. Li Yunmu, who was standing behind her, walked to the front at that moment.

“Competition hasn’t even begun and you five envoys dare to be so certain of our victory,” he said coldly. “If the five ancient gods can win against my ancestor, then this time’s disrespect could be considered as forgotten. But if none of the five ancient gods win, then you five will die.”

When Jia Tiankuang heard Li Yunmu being so unbridled, he frowned and turned his gaze towards the source of voice to see another beauty. Although she couldn’t be considered to be heaven-shaking like Ancient Goddess Liu Qing, she was still extremely beautiful.

Moreover the more one looked at her, the more beautiful she appeared. The unhappiness in his heart quickly dissipated and he softly said to Li Yunmu, “Where do you come from, little sister?”

When Li Yunmu looked at Jia Tiankuang, a hint of displeasure appeared on his face. He was impersonating Liu Bailing at that moment, but when he saw the naked lust in Jia Tiankuang’s eyes, he still felt nauseous in his heart.

“I am the holy daughter of Pipa Clan, and my position is completely different from yours. What, do you think that you can suppress me by using the position of an ancient god’s son?”

Li Yunmu pushed down the nausea in his heart and took three deep breaths before relaxing his hands which had balled into fists.

chapters.title: Chapter 893 - Want To Make Me A Concubine?
chapters.body:
Chapter 893 - Want To Make Me A Concubine?

Chapter 893: Want to Make Me a Concubine?

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

When being so vigilant, Li Yunmu gave an exquisite smile, but his eyebrows creased slightly.

Jia Tiankuang looked him in the eyes and became even more fond of him. “Since you are a holy daughter of Lakshmi City, I naturally cannot suppress you. Even if I could, this wouldn’t be the time.”

Li Yunmu might have possessed formidable strength, but he still retreated a few steps in fear. When Brunhilda sitting on her chair heard the conversation between Jia Tiankuang and Li Yunmu, a smile appeared at the corners of her lips.

It seemed like Jia Tiankuang had fallen for Liu Bailing, or should it be said for Yunmu.

When Brunhilda thought of it, she couldn’t stop her smile. Hu Shi, standing behind her, saw Jia Tiankuang’s warm gaze, and her expression became strange.

She had been married for a long time, so she could naturally see the feelings between men and women. However, it was lord who was impersonating Holy Daughter Liu Bailing. When Hu Shi realized that, she felt her blood run cold.

“Hmph, Elder Brother Tiankuang really can intimidate people. A few words were enough to scare the holy daughter into retreating several steps. This holy daughter, what are you known as? My god father is Vishnu, and I am the third son Pi Zhan.”

Pi Zhan’s body stabilized and didn’t continue transforming any longer when he looked at Li Yunmu with his eyes shining.

“My god father is Yaksha, and I am the fourth son Ye Tian.”

“My god father is Indra, and I am the second son Di Fan.”

When the holy daughter got so scared that she retreated a few words from Jia Tiakuang, Pi Zhan introduced himself. The other three envoys also introduced themselves one by one.

When the four of them looked at Li Yunmu, a strong desire to possess him appeared in their hearts. After all, regardless of how much of a heaven-startling beauty Brunhilda was, she was still someone that belonged to their god fathers.

The four of them had no way to dip a finger in that pie.

But the holy daughter before them was different. She was only a holy daughter of Lakshmi City. After the alliance, Lakshmi City will become a subsidiary city of the five clans, so obtaining a clan’s holy daughter wouldn’t be difficult.

Moreover, with their status of the sons of ancient gods, a holy daughter was perfectly compatible with them, and all five of them thought that way.

Brunhilda’s smile became increasingly brighter. It was the first time she had encountered such an amusing matter. Although the five envoys were ganging up on her husband, she found it quite funny.

Her continuous smile made Holy Daughter Hu Shi standing behind her to also curl her lips upwards to form a slight smile without making any sound.

“Do the five of you want to catch me?”

Li Yunmu smiled instead of being angry while looking at the passionate gazes of the five gods.

Jia Tiankuang was slightly startled and suspiciously asked, “Holy daughter, what do you mean by saying catching you?”

“Catching me means that you all want to take me your wife?”

A smile was at the corners of Li Yunmu’s lips, but killing intent was rising in his heart.

Take him as wife….

When the envoys of five clans heard his words, they were slightly startled. Ye Tian and Fan Di laughed a few times, but didn’t reply. Pi Zhan lowered his head and shook it, without saying anything.

Shiva Clan’s envoy, who had been sitting with his eyes closed, opened his eyes, revealing a pair of crescent moons in them, and curiously looked at Li Yunmu.

After a moment of silence, Jia Tiankuang looked at the four envoys before turning to Li Yunmu and said, “It could be assumed that holy daughter has misunderstood something. As the son of an ancient god existing from ancient times, I already have a wife. But seeing your youthful beauty, I want to let you become my concubine.”

When he threw those words out, the smile on Holy Daughter Hu Shi’s face froze. The smile on the face of Brunhilda sitting on the chair also disappeared, and she expressionlessly looked at the five envoys. Neither of them had thought that the five envoys would speak such words.

The five didn’t know that Li Yunmu was disguising himself as Holy Daughter Liu Bailing, but speaking such frivolous words was already wrong. However, Jia Tiankuang was saying things like letting him become his concubine.

A true holy daughter wouldn’t be able to maintain her good temperament after hearing such words, let alone an ancient god level expert like Li Yunmu.

The trouble right then was too large.

Li Yunmu, standing in front, didn’t make a sound. Holy Daughter Hu Shi was afraid that some accident might happen, so she wondered if she should call the other holy daughters.

At that moment though, Brunhilda saw threads of demonic energy coming out of Li Yunmu. Her gaze focused, and she said, “You go and close the door.”

Holy Daughter Hu Shi glanced at Li Yunmu, then turned around to close the door.

Jia Tiankuang, who was sitting on the stage, saw the silent Li Yunmu and explained with a smile, “Actually, the difference between wife and concubine is only that of status. With your extremely beautiful appearance, if you followed me back to my clan, you would definitely become my favored concubine. At that time, your position and status wouldn’t be lacking compared to that of the principal wife.”

When the four envoys heard his words, a hint of contempt appeared in their eyes. Unless the holy daughter was a three-year-old child, how could she not know that a concubine was inferior to wife? Regardless of how much the husband doted upon her, she would remain a concubine with a lower position.

Moreover, the position of a holy daughter in Lakshmi City and that of an ancient god’s son was equal. If she really became a concubine, it would be like a slap to Lakshmi City’s face.

The holy daughter had also previously addressed Liu Qing as ancestor, so she was probably the heir of an ancient god.

Jia Tiankuang said his speech in the presence of Ancient Goddess Liu Qing, which was tantamount to saying that he didn’t place her in his eyes. In addition to that, with his status of a god, he had previously requested Holy Daughter Hu Shi to invite Ancient Goddess Liu Qing to meet with them.

After being disrespected two times, it could be assumed that Ancient Goddess Liu Qing’s heart would be filled with fury.

When the five envoys had left, their god fathers had repeatedly urged them to act properly in Lakshmi City and treat Ancient Goddess Liu Qing respectfully. But ever since they arrived, the four envoys had been instigating the arrogant Jia Tiankuang to do such things. When they saw him being interested in the holy daughter, the four chose to act as one and make sure he kept on acting out.

It was all in order to make Ancient Goddess Liu Qing hate Jia Tiankuang and even Garuda.

Jia Tiankuang saw that Li Yunmu was still not talking, and his expression turned dark. “Holy daughter needn’t hesitate. You should be clear about the crisis Lakshmi City is facing right now. My god father Garuda is the leader of the five ancient gods, and your choice will also be related to whether Lakshmi City is successful in forming an alliance with the five gods. The fate of many people depends on your choice.”

After saying this, Jia Tiankuang waited for Li Yunmu to make a choice.

He believed that after he said so much, the holy daughter would understand what to do. At that moment, he only needed to wait for the holy daughter to agree.

After a long time, Li Yunmu, who was standing before the stage, raised his head and looked at the leader Jia Tiankuang and said with a sneer, “Done talking?

“If you are done talking, then I will speak. The alliance between the five ancient gods and Lakshmi City is in order to jointly deal with Asura and not to turn Lakshmi City into your subordinate state. Don’t try to take the attitude of a superior.

“Moreover, Ancient Goddess Liu Qing is the ancient goddess of Lakshmi City, and her position is equal to that of the five ancient gods. The disrespect all of you show is a great offence. This is the first thing.”

While saying that, Li Yunmu transformed into a blur and rushed toward Jia Tiankuang who was acting as the leader. The next instant, he appeared in front of Jia Tiankuang and unleashed a punch filled with divine power.

Jia Tiankuang, who was still sitting on his seat, saw the punch in front of him, and a smile appeared on his face. When the punch touched him, he turned into an afterimage.

chapters.title: Chapter 894 - I Will Punch Your Birdhead
chapters.body:
Chapter 894 - I Will Punch Your Birdhead

Chapter 894: I Will Punch Your Birdhead

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

“Why is a holy daughter being so violent? You should accept the truth. The only path of survival in front of Lakshmi City is to ally with the five ancient gods and become a subordinate state.

“Although the word subordinate state sounds a little unpleasant, actually being under the five ancient gods isn’t so bad. I, as the son of an ancient god, will take you as a concubine and rescue you from this abyss of suffering.”

Jia Tiankuang’s voice came from the other end of the hall. At some point in time, only an afterimage was left behind on the seat. The main body was looking down from the sky.

Li Yunmu pulled his fist back. He turned around to look at the smiling Jia Tiankuang and said, “I was actually giving you face. Even if Lakshmi City falls in battle, we wouldn’t become slaves of the five ancient gods. You are thinking too much. Additionally…”

After saying until there, Li Yunmu disappeared from in front of the main seat. The expressions of the envoys sitting motionlessly until that moment froze after seeing her movement.

A doubt took root in everyone’s heart at that moment. The music clans of Lakshmi City walked the path of sound laws, so when did a holy daughter with such a fast speed appear?

When Jia Tiankuang saw that Li Yunmu’s figure was an afterimage similar to his, he became vigilant in his heart and turned his attention to the energy fluctuations in the surroundings. As someone who stood at the pinnacle of the god realm, he naturally wouldn’t place an initial stage god like the holy daughter in his eyes. But if he was beaten by a sneak attack, he would turn into an enormous joke.

“You think your speed is fast, eh?”

Li Yunmu did not finish speaking before he suddenly appeared behind Jia Tiankuang and attacked with a punch bubbling with divine energy.

Before Jia Tiankuang could respond, the punch struck his back, and waves of divine energy entered his body. They were mixed in with a hint of black power.

The attack sent Jia Tiankuang flying, and he crashed into the ground, below the steps of the stage.

“You-you little girl are being too impudent! I will have to teach you a lesson.”

Jia Tiankuang sensed a burst of pain coming from his back. The divine power which was injected in his body began to wantonly roam around in his body, and his expression tightened. No one had dared to act toward him like that before. Among the five envoys that came, his strength was the highest.

Just a moment ago, if he hadn’t thought of showing leniency and became somewhat absent-minded, how could the little girl appear behind him without him detecting her?

Jia Tiankuang used the divine energy in his body to purge the enemy’s divine energy which was wantonly running around in his body, but he lost his focus the next moment and was surprisingly unable to control the divine energy in his body. Even after trying again, the situation did not change.

Jia Tiankuang raised his head and looked at Li Yunmu in the sky.

“You little girl, what exactly did you do?” he demanded in an ice-cold voice.

“What? I just sealed your cultivation. Aren’t you very good at running? Now continue doing that!” Li Yunmu said with a sneer.

When he thought of Jia Tiankuang’s careless actions as well as his words from just a moment ago, he felt a wave of nauseousness in his heart.

He moved and arrived in front of the panicking Jia Tiankuang, then he just let his punches loose without any pattern. Without cultivation, Jia Tiankuang was a completely ordinary person with the exception of a divine body and a formidable regenerative ability.

While being hit by countless punches, Jia Tiankuang was sent flying again and again. That envoys behind him also used divine power to intentionally push him in front of Li Yunmu.

When the four envoys saw the battered and exhausted Jia Tiankuang, sneers appeared on their faces. The four of them were really delighted by seeing the usually arrogant Jia Tiankuang in dire straits.

“You aren’t a holy daughter from Lakshmi City! Lakshmi City’s holy daughters only walk the path of sound laws and never step on the path of close quarter combat. Who exactly are you?”

Jia Tiankuang looked at Li Yunmu while wildly spitting out blood with dread in his eyes.

How could a holy daughter of Lakshmi City walk the path of close quarter combat? Garuda was the fastest among the seven ancient gods, so being his son, Jia Tiankuang had also inherited this innate skill, so his speed was the highest among the envoys.

But even if the fact that a holy daughter of Lakshmi City wasn’t cultivating sound laws, but rather walking the path of close quarters combat was forgotten, her speed surpassed that of Jia Tiankuang, who had an innate gift in terms of speed! How could this make any sense!

When he spoke, the entire main hall went completely silent. The four envoys looked at Jia Tiankuang whose whole body was covered in blood as if they were looking at an idiot.

Li Yunmu’s punches hadn’t used any divine power, and there wasn’t even a hint of any martial art in the way he attacked, so how could Jia Tiankuang’s accusations hold any value.

The only thing that needed explanation was her speed at first, but Ancient Goddess Liu Qing had probably done something which allowed a holy daughter, who was an expert at controlling sound laws to catch up to Jia Tiankuang. After that happened, he was beaten until he turned foolish.

Li Yunmu looked at the wide-eyed Jia Tiankuang and grinned. “Why am I not a holy daughter of Lakshmi City? Who said that the holy daughters of Lakshmi City can only walk the path sound laws? I will punch your birdhead as much as I want.”

After saying that, his body trembled, and he turned into a blur that appeared at Jia Tiankuang’s side. One after another, small holes appeared on Jia Tiankuang’s body. They came with the sound of bone breaking and blood seeping out.

Clang.

Li Yunmu returned to his original position while Jia Tiankuang fell on the ground, unconscious. The main hall was quiet for a time then.

After a long time, Di Fan stood up and walked out. The thunder sparks coming from the lightning imprint between his eyebrows were extremely eye-catching.

“The holy daughter should’ve already vented her anger. Just a moment ago, Brother Tiankuang’s words were indeed disrespectful, and we all apologise toward you. There’s also Ancient Goddess Liu Qing to consider.

“We four urged Brother Tiankuang to not request Holy Daughter Hu Shi to call for your distinguished self, but Brother Tiankuang had always been arrogant and obstinate, so the four of us couldn’t do anything,” Di Fan said with a smile, pushing all the responsibility on the unconscious Jia Tiankuang.

But at that moment, Jia Tiankuang managed to regain consciousness, and when he heard what was being said, he spat out another mouthful of blood.

Li Yunmu looked at the four envoys and smiled in amusement.

Brunhilda, who was sitting before him, looked at Di Fan who had walked out to handle the matters and frowned.

“You say that everything was Jia Tiankuang’s responsibility and that the four of you were unable to persuade him, so does that mean that he alone is stronger than the four of you?”

When she asked that question, Di Fan was slightly startled and wondered why she was using reason which went against common sense.

After a moment of silence, he explained himself. “Naturally, that’s not the case. The five of us chosen by the five ancient gods have comparable strength, so apart from innate skills, there isn’t much difference between us.”

“If that is the case, how were you all unable to stop him? Doesn’t it mean that you just didn’t want to stop him?” Brunhilda asked casually while looking directly at Di Fan, who was averting his eyes from her.

Di Fan’s expression went stiff, and his smile froze on his face. With Jia Tiankuang quitting, they should have gained an advantage, but they hadn’t expected that Ancient Goddess Liu Qing would be so overbearing. Any intelligent person could see through the matter, but whether they would bring it out in the open was another matter.

When Ancient Goddess Liu Qing directly spoke the truth, wasn’t she implying that the four envoys had ulterior motives?

chapters.title: Chapter 895 - Looking For Trouble
chapters.body:
Chapter 895 - Looking For Trouble

Chapter 895: Looking for Trouble

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Di Fan was a profound schemer, and he quickly went through all possibilities while looking at Ancient Goddess Liu Qing. In the meantime, the imprint between his eyebrows crackled with electricity and some sparks flew out.

The other three envoys were expressionless. When the four of them first saw Liu Qing, they were naturally attracted toward her. She was definitely a heaven-shaking beauty just as their god fathers had said.

But appreciation was appreciation. Those who failed to appreciate kindness didn’t need to be shown any concern.

If the status and strength of an ancient god were put to the side, the four envoys hadn’t taken action while Jia Tiankuang, the only one who had acted out, was beaten unconscious. He should have been the perfect scapegoat, but despite him being put in place, the matter of showing disrespect toward an ancient goddess had not ended.

Di Fan hadn’t expected that Ancient Goddess Liu Qing would continue to focus on it without letting go.

She was just like someone who asked for another slap on the face after getting a sweet date when hit the first time.

It was clearly someone who failed to appreciate kindness.

“Although we four possess strength similar to that of Jia Tiankuang, his god father Garuda is the leader among the five ancient gods, so we four also treat Jia Tiankuang as the leader,” Di Fan said in a calm voice, but his expression was no longer cheerful like before.

Brunhilda looked at Di Fan’s expression and stayed silent for a while. Then, she said with a smile, “Treating him as the leader is the same thing. Asking me, an ancient goddess, to come and see you gods of a younger generation… Why do you all feel that your position is comparable to mine or even higher?”

Di Fan was expressionless and did not say a word. The expressions of the other three envoys who still remained seated were also somewhat gloomy.

Speaking in terms of cultivation, they naturally couldn’t compare to her. But in terms of status, they weren’t very inferior. All of them were first generation descendants of ancient gods.

“Ancient Goddess Liu Qing sure knows how to jest. We four are very respectful toward your distinguished self, but all of us here are the heirs of ancient gods, so no one could be persuaded by others and would continue to cling to their own dogmatic ways. We were unable to control him, so what is your distinguished self trying to say?”

Di Fan, with his figure constantly changing, spoke in a calm voice without giving the slightest fault for the opponent to nitpick upon.

When Brunhilda heard his words, she didn’t continue speaking, but the expression of Holy Daughter Hu Shi standing behind her turned unpleasant. In her eyes, the four envoys might be respectful on the surface, but their words were still filled with sarcasm.

Li Yunmu spread his legs and crossed his arms in front of his chest. If he had been in his original form, it wouldn’t have been anything inappropriate, but with him looking like Liu Bailing… Her chest might be small, but when it was pushed up, it still rose.

Di Fan’s expression was gloomy, but when he saw the swelling mountains, his expression changed, and he said with a cough, “Ancient Goddess Liu Qing, let this matter pass over, or else everyone will become agitated from all the noise.”

“What a joke! Just because you said to forget, we should forget it? Do you think that this is already your territory? This is Lakshmi City, the domain of Ancient Goddess Lakshmi. Even if she is still in seclusion, my ancestor is present here. The final say belongs to her!”

After saying that, Li Yunmu noticed Di Fan’s reaction and immediately put down his hands.

The four envoys looked at the holy daughter who was trying her utmost to make things difficult, and their expressions grew dark again. The four of them were the heirs of ancient gods, so even if they hadn’t attained ancient god realm, they were still at the peak of the god realm. As long as they joined hands, even an initial stage ancient goddess like Liu Qing might not be able to make them stay.

“Ancient Goddess Liu Qing, does that mean that you still want to find trouble with the four of us?” Ye Tian, who was covered in deep blue color from top to bottom, asked with some disdain.

We give you a little face and you think that you have the ability.

Brunhilda looked at the four envoys who had unpleasant expressions and narrowed her eyes.

“Don’t kill them,” she finally said languidly.

The four envoys immediately stood up after hearing her words. Divine energy bubbled forth from their bodies, and the surrounding energy changed erratically.

The lighting imprint between the eyebrows of Di Fan crackled while shining with silvely light. On his side, Pi Zhan transformed again and took the shape of a god with two arms. He held a divine blade sparkling in gold in each hand, while his feet were on an enormous lotus flower. He possessed boundless divine energy.

Ye Tian moved, and a deep black metal fork appeared in his hand. He held it up high, and the smell of blood spread through the hall.

The envoy of Shiva Clan who hadn’t said anything until then remained calm and collected. Although divine energy hadn’t rushed out of his body, his two pupils possessing crescent moons were staring at Li Yunmu.

Soon, an extravagant sound resounded through the entire hall.

The four envoys had revealed their full strength and took out their hidden trump cards. After all, Liu Qing was an ancient goddess. If they took her lightly, the ones suffering the calamity would be them.

When Holy Daughter Hu Shi sensed a bright and clear divine presence coming from the four envoys, her expression changed. Although she was one of the oldest holy daughters in Lakshmi City and her cultivation had already reached late stage god level, it was still inferior to that of the four ancient gods. She felt her heart hanging in suspense after sensing the presences of the four envoys.

If she fought with any of them alone, she might not necessarily come out alive.

Holy daughter Hu Shi leaned over and asked softly, “Lord, do you really intend to fight them?”

Brunhilda looked at the four envoys who were prepared to fight and said without any concern, “How can we still continue pretending? With me and him here, Lakshmi City won’t suffer in the slightest. The envoys came with such grand preparations, so they naturally aren’t content with knowing their place. We must make them suffer to teach them a lesson.”

“Your grand battle plan should be very difficult to deal with, right?” Li Yunmu wondered aloud.

As he said those words, his figure disappeared from the spot, and the four envoys looked around seriously. It was just like what had happened with Jia Tiankuang.

But although the four of them were paying attention to Li Yunmu, their true focus was on Ancient Goddess Liu Qing.

They believed that Jia Tiankuang was beaten so badly by a holy daughter only because of Liu Qing helping her secretly. Otherwise, with Jia Tiankuang’s peak god level strength, how could he be beaten without any resistance?

Thud, thud, thud, thud.

Four loud sounds echoed, and the four envoys, who thought they were completely prepared, were blown away and fell on the ground in all directions. When they crawled back up, they sensed that there was no response from the divine energy in their bodies.

Everyone’s expressions changed, and they looked at Liu Qing sitting calmly on her wooden chair with dread in their heart. Before they knew it, their cultivation bases were sealed. It wasn’t something an initial stage ancient god could do.

Di Fan looked at Brunhilda and said nervously, “Ancient Goddess Liu Qing, we came to Lakshmi City so that our god fathers could possess our bodies and participate in the competition. By sealing our cultivation so this little girl could deal with us, aren’t you afraid that our god fathers will blame you?”

Brunhilda pretended to not have heard him and continued to look at her lily-white hands absent-mindedly.

Damned woman!

Only resentment remained in Di Fan’s heart. Before he could speak though, a blur flew over, and he felt a powerful force smash into his chest. It blew him away and slammed him into the wall. It was enough for him to lose consciousness.

The other three envoys huddled together and looked in all directions for escape.

chapters.title: Chapter 896 - : Suspicious Point
chapters.body:
Chapter 896 - : Suspicious Point

Chapter 896: Suspicious Point

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

“Damn that Jia Tiankuang for provoking this disaster.”

“Damn it, this woman definitely isn’t an initial stage ancient god. Furthermore, that girl who walks the path of close quarters combat seems to be very violent. Could it be that this Music Clan has abandoned the path of sound laws and has started walking the path of close quarters combat?”

“What’s the use of saying these things now? It would be better if we thought of a way to not end up like Di Fan.”

The three envoys looked at the completely empty hall while on guard against Li Yunmu coming from anywhere. The three of them felt endless regret in their heart and wondered why they had thought to provoke Ancient Goddess Liu Qing.

From the time they came, the four of them were secretly discussing how Lakshmi City was vulnerable and agreed to the competition for that reason. Otherwise, why would they agree to offering up their ancient god?

With the situation like that, the four of them were sure in their hearts that after the alliance, Lakshmi City would turn into a subordinate territory of the five ancient gods. Thus, from the time they came, the five envoys acted unbridled.

But what happened afterwards wasn’t according to conventional reasoning. They came to find trouble with Lakshmi City, but it backfired on them.

A blur came out from the shadow of a pillar and flew directly toward the trio.

The next instant, the depression created from the punch appeared on the bodies of the three envoys, and they lost consciousness after spitting out blood. Li Yunmu returned to his original place. He looked at the five envoys scattered in all directions and said helplessly while shaking his head, “Really boring. Even with such momentum, they couldn’t even land one hit.”

“So what should we do now?” Holy Daughter Hu Shi enquired.

“Return the five envoys to their houses to rest. They are tired. Continue other things as usual. The five ancient gods won’t find trouble with Lakshmi City before the competition ends,” Brunhilda said carelessly.

When she said that, Li Yunmu moved and pulled her to take her away. The next moment, only Holy Daughter Hu Shi remained in the hall. When her eyes came to rest on the five envoys lying on the ground, she felt extremely refreshed in her heart. After some time passed, a couple servants came from outside and left with the five envoys. Holy Daughter Hu Shi was following behind them.

Brunhilda returned to her palace with Li Yunmu. The moment they reached the front door, Li Yunmu by her side turned into a shadow and entered through the door. Once Brunhilda also went inside, she saw Li Yunmu lying on the main seat with a carefree attitude.

He glanced at Brunhilda and casually asked, “All settled?”

Brunhilda slowly walked next to the main seat and said with a slight smile while leaning on his shoulder, “Asking a question to which you already know the answer. You clearly saw what your shadow clone did.”

Li Yunmu didn’t reply. Jia Tiankuang’s words had caused his scalp to go numb. At that time, he was impersonating Liu Bailing, but seeing Jia Tiankuang’s passionate gaze, he was still affected. His first thought was to pretend that he hadn’t seen or heard anything, but he hadn’t expected that Brunhilda would see through his plans.

This one incident would make him the butt of all jokes for eternity.

“The next few days the five envoys should remain peaceful. They will be good until the competition which is in two days,” Li Yunmu said to shift the topic. “I will then steal Heavenly Grand Ritual and return to Asura City to start the battle of gods.

“At that time, you need to look after Lakshmi City and also the Ground Clan that I created. When the time comes, allow them to migrate to Lakshmi City. After all, Lakshmi City’s environment is pretty good, and it would make it more convenient for you to look after them.”

Brunhilda nodded and then asked, “Once the battle of gods starts, what do you intend to do?”

Li Yunmu wasn’t an idler. He stayed in Lanlou to start the battle of gods because he had a particular aim. When he came to Lanlou, he had rescued a group of mortals and imparted martial skills to them. His attempt to start the battle of gods in advance was also related to his aim. It was just that Li Yunmu had never told Brunhilda the reason.

“Do what… Something like power of belief cannot be allowed to exist in this world. All the infected gods need to be eliminated. If they aren’t removed, the world won’t change. You don’t need to worry though. Even if you are also a god, you haven’t relied on the power of belief to advance,”Li Yunmu said and turned around to embrace Brunhilda.

“Naturally, I’m not worried. However, the gods of Lanlou have all used the power of belief. Don’t you find it strange? True god created this world and is the father of all living creatures, but even if he disappeared, the gods of other areas didn’t dare to use it,” Brunhilda said slowly.

She then looked at Li Yunmu with her forehead creased. When Li Yunmu didn’t reply, she sighed and continued to speak.

“Unless you have someone backing you, you won’t be able to do so. Although True God created the world, he didn’t control everything happening in the world. All the matters were left to master gods to oversee. The master gods of other regions followed the command and didn’t touch the power of belief, but the master god of Lanlou still continued to use it before he disappeared.”

Yes, only Lanlou among the five regions of the Origin World used power of belief. The other four regions hadn’t even thought of touching it.

When the power of belief was just discovered, the gods of the five regions occupied their territories and developed their influence over the mortals to ensure a steady flow of power of belief.

Later, they began to occupy the territories of other gods to obtain even more power of belief. At that time, the first war of gods began.

It attracted the attention of the True God who moved to stop it and passed down the command prohibiting the use of power of belief.

Afterwards, when the True God disappeared, the master gods were sealed. If Lanlou used that opportunity of no one being present to disregard the prohibition and still continue to rely on power of belief, that could not be justified.

The ancient gods of the other four regions waited for the master gods’ return. If the master gods returned to see the ancient gods still using power of belief.

They would try to suppress it for sure, but the seven ancient gods of Lanlou weren’t afraid in the slightest. The backing which Brunhilda spoke of…

“You say that before the master god of Lanlou was sealed, he still continued relying on power of belief?” Li Yunmu asked with suspicion and a frown on his face.

Brunhilda nodded, then said, “I am not exactly sure what happened between True God and the five master gods, which resulted in them being sealed and disappearing, but what I know is that after the battle of gods ended and the True God passed down his command, the master god of Lanlou still kept on using the power of belief. The seven ancient gods underneath him were also the same.

“Moreover, True God knew it, but didn’t stop them.”

Multitudes of thoughts ran through Li Yunmu’s mind. The True God knew but didn’t stop them? Why exactly was that?

The True God had disappeared and become a system. But when Li Yunmu asked about what had happened in those days, the system didn’t agree to entrust the matter to him and instead kept saying that there was a potential enemy waiting for him.

When he learned about the hidden enemy, he thought that it could only be a power from outside the Origin World, but when he heard Brunhilda’s words, he wondered whether this enemy was hidden among them or if perhaps it was the master god of Lanlou.

chapters.title: Chapter 897 - Ancient Gods Descend
chapters.body:
Chapter 897 - Ancient Gods Descend

Chapter 897: Ancient Gods Descend

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

“Are you still not ready to talk about the matter of that year?”Li Yunmu enquired in his brain.

But there was deathly stillness in his mind. The system was clearly pretending to not have heard him.

But why exactly was it not saying anything even now? Li Yunmu thought about it but couldn’t understand it. He didn’t continue asking, however. If the system wanted to speak, then it would do so, without waiting for him to ask about it.

But the system wasn’t speaking and Brunhilda’s words caused a sense of crisis to rise in Li Yunmu’s heart.

“Among the seven ancient gods of Lanlou, apart from Ancient Goddess Lakshmi, all the other six ancient gods use power of belief. If you kill those six ancient gods, then once the master gods returns, he will naturally settle debts with you. Perhaps you don’t place ancient gods in your eyes, but you don’t have the least bit of assurance against winning against master gods,” Brunhilda said without any hesitation, but with a frown on her face.

“My present strength is only at quasi master god level. But with demonic transformation, I might not completely lose against a master god.”

Li Yunmu took hold of Brunhilda’s lily-white hands to console her.

When she heard him, she shook her head. “You don’t understand. Although the difference between quasi master gods and master gods is only one step, an unsurpassable ravine exists between them. In the eyes of a master god, there’s no difference between quasi master gods and ancient gods. Both of them can be pinched to death.”

Li Yunmu had never thought that the difference between master gods and quasi master gods would be so huge. But even if a master god returned and saw that someone had killed six of their ancient gods, they shouldn’t find the person to take their revenge.

After all, the one who removed the five seals would be Li Yunmu. They should all thank him for removing their shackles.

What was more, even if the master god wanted revenge, given the presence of the True God, their strength wouldn’t be enough to achieve that.

“Don’t worry. Even if the six ancient gods have backing, I also have it. Alright, let’s not discuss these eyesores. There are more important matters waiting for our attention.”

“What matters…”

Before Brunhilda could finish, she realized what matter Li Yunmu was talking about. She rolled her eyes and took the initiative to snuggle with Li Yunmu.

Since she learned that Li Yunmu had an illegitimate daughter outside, she thought of having their own child. For this reason, it was better if they tried for it any time there was a moment when no one would disturb them.

Time continued to pass. For gods, two days went by in a wink.

During that time, Li Yunmu and Brunhilda stayed inside the palace, trying their utmost to sow a seed. Ever since Li Yunmu came, Liu Bailing intentionally avoided Brunhilda and suppressed the thoughts in her heart by keeping herself busy with the holy daughters of the Music Clan.

When Liu Bailing saw the five envoys for the first time, she was quite intimidated.

They were said to be very arrogant, but they took a few steps back after meeting her and shut themselves in their rooms on the grounds of being out of sorts.

Among the holy daughters, Hu Shi happened to be by Liu Bailing’s side then and told her about Li Yunmu impersonating her and beating the five envoys violently. When Liu Bailing heard that, her fair face turned bright red, and she said in an extremely soft voice, “Destroying my reputation like that… Who will marry me now?”

Once the two days passed, everyone in the Music Clan began to prepare the mansion and built a stage in the center of the lotus pond. They also set up spectator stands all around it. One after another, Music Clan’s descendants rushed to take their seats nervously.

The competition right then was related to Lakshmi City’s new ancient goddess. If she lost, Lakshmi City’s position would be greatly reduced and it would turn into a subordinate to the five ancient gods.

The eleven holy daughters appeared suddenly with Brunhilda and sat down on the competition platform. Before long, the five envoys also arrived on the competition stage.

After being beaten viciously, the five envoys respectfully nodded toward Brunhilda and said, “Ancient Goddess Liu Qing is early.”

“Naturally I wanted to come a little bit earlier. It would be better to cut off the plans of your god fathers prematurely,” Brunhilda said while holding a cup of tea.

Jia Tiankuang sneered then sat down in front of the holy daughters. Although the two sides weren’t at war, the mood on stage was extremely serious.

The next instant, multicolored light blossomed in the sky. Five rays of light suddenly appeared and dropped on the bodies of the five envoys. After the lights disappeared, the five envoys opened their eyes one by one and erupted with divine presence.

“Liu Qing, you came early. We five were a little slow.”

“Hahaha, we haven’t seen each other for only a brief few days, but I already feel that three autumns have passed.”

The faces of the five envoys were filled with smiles while speaking with Brunhilda.

She forced a smile on her face and softly said, “Since you’ve come, then let’s begin. Who among you will come first?”

It was the day of the competition, so all the descendants of the Music Clan were gathered at the lotus pond. The entire residence was completely empty.

When Li Yunmu walked out from the palace, he glanced in the direction of the lotus pond and sensed the eruption of the divine presences.

“Phew, releasing divine presence just after descending. I wonder how will you be able to smile after losing Heavenly Grand Ritua,” Li Yunmu mumbled.

“You want to steal Heavenly Grand Ritual?”

A sharp and clear feminine voice echoed from behind, and Li Yunmu turned around to see Liu Bailing looking at him with a strange expression.

Li Yunmu looked at Liu Bailing’s blank expression and said with a smile, “Why did you come here? Being a holy daughter, don’t you need to be present on the stage?”

.

Liu Bailing saw his passionate gaze, and her face turned slightly red. She lowered her head and said, “What will I do there? I am only someone who recently became a holy daughter, so my strength still hasn’t reached the god realm. If I go, I will only lose face for Lakshmi City.”

Li Yunmu nodded and asked, “Then why did you come here? To find me?”

When he said that, Liu Bailing’s face turned even redder, and she lowered her head more. She had appeared in the vicinity of Brunhilda’s palace to find Li Yunmu.

After learning from Holy Daughter Hu Sh that her reputation was gone, she naturally wanted to borrow this opportunity to ask Li Yunmu about what exactly was he thinking.

But when she reached the palace, she had second thoughts about her decision. After all, she was a holy daughter of Lakshmi City. If she directly spoke such words, she would probably be laughed at by others. After thinking for a long while, she still decided to walk on ahead to find Li Yunmu to clarify.

Liu Bailing thought about the words stuck in her throat and forcefully swallowed them. “I came to find you to ask about Pipa Clan’s children. Are they doing alright?”

Li Yunmu looked at Liu Bailing who had lowered her head and said with satisfaction, “They are safe. Asura wouldn’t attack weaklings. You can be calm. Wait until I steal the Heavenly Grand Ritual, then the five ancient gods and Asura are bound to fight. When that happens, I will rescue those children.”

Liu Bailing nodded and softly said, “Be careful.”
